Romans11:28 Baaru Hanna ciine ra, i te ibareyaŋ araŋ sabbay se. Amma Irikoy suubanyaŋo ciine ra, ngey no ga ti borey kaŋ Irikoy ga ba doŋ kaayey sabbay se." 
Romans11:29 Zama Irikoy nooyaŋey da Irikoy ceeyaŋo, a si ba ye i gaa." 
Romans11:30 Waato araŋ wo, araŋ wangu ka Irikoy gana, amma sohõ araŋ du suuji i ganayaŋ-jaŋa do." 
Romans11:31 Yaadin mo no ngey din kaŋ yaŋ wangu ka gana sohõ, i ga hin ka du suuji, wo kaŋ araŋ du din do." 
Romans11:32 Zama Irikoy na boro kulu daabu ganayaŋ-jaŋay ra, zama nga ma suuji cabe borey kulu se." 
Romans11:33 Hay! Mate kaŋ Irikoy laakalo arzaka ga guusu nd'a! A bayra mo, yaadin no a go! A ciitey baa da fintalyaŋ. A fondey mo bisa fahamay gaa!" 
Romans11:34 Zama: «May no na Rabbi miila bay, Wala may no ka ciya a saawarekasina?" 
Romans11:35 May no jin k'a no, hal a m'a yeti a se?»" 
Romans11:36 Zama hay kulu fun a do, Hay kulu goono ga te a do, i ga ye a do mo. Darza ma ciya a wane hal abada! Amin!" 
Romans12:1 Yaadin gaa, nya-izey, ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray Irikoy suujey sabbay se: araŋ m'araŋ gaahamey salle sargay fundikooniyaŋ, hananteyaŋ, kaŋ yaŋ ga kaan Irikoy se. Woodin araŋ saajaw goy no kaŋ ga saba nda fahamay." 
Romans12:2 Araŋ ma si araŋ boŋ sasabandi nda zamana wo _alhaalo|_, amma wa naŋ Irikoy m'araŋ bare, k'araŋ laakaley tajandi. Yaadin gaa no araŋ ga du fayanka ka Irikoy miila bay, kaŋ ga ti ihanno, da yadda hari, da timmante." 
Romans12:3 Zama, gomni kaŋ Irikoy n'ay no boŋ, ay goono ga ne araŋ boro fo kulu se: a ma si fongu nda nga boŋ haŋ kaŋ ga bisa mate kaŋ ga hima nd'a, amma a ma bara nda lalabu lasaabu, mate kaŋ cine Irikoy na cimbeeri neesijo zaban araŋ boro fo kulu se." 
Romans12:4 Zama mate kaŋ iri gonda jare boobo gaaham folloŋ ra, jare kulu mo goyo go waani," 
Romans12:5 yaadin mo no iri, kaŋ ga ti iboobo, iri ciya gaaham folloŋ Almasihu ra, iri boro fo kulu mo care gaaham jareyaŋ no." 
Romans12:6 Iri boro kulu gonda nooyaŋ waani-waani, sanda mate kaŋ cine Irikoy na gomni no iri se. To. Boro kaŋ du annabitaray m'a te da cimbeero* kaŋ cine a du." 
Romans12:7 Boro kaŋ du saajaw goy ma nga boŋ no saajaw goyo se. Boro kaŋ ga dondonandi ma nga boŋ no dondonandiyaŋo se. 
Romans12:8 Boro kaŋ ga yaamar ma nga boŋ no yaamaryaŋo se. Boro kaŋ ga no m'a te da bine folloŋ. Boro kaŋ gonda jineborotaray m'a te da anniya. Boro kaŋ ga suuji cabe m'a te da farhã. 
Romans12:9 Baakasinay ma si te da munaficitaray. Wa ilaalo fanta, wa gaabandi ihanno gaa." 
Romans12:10 Wa bara nda baakasinay care se danga nya izeyaŋ kaŋ ga ba care. Araŋ ma care beerandi ka care daŋ jine. 
Romans12:11 Wa ciya kokoranteyaŋ, manti hawfunoyaŋ. Wa haw daŋ araŋ biney ra ka may Irikoy se." 
Romans12:12 Wa farhã beeje ra, kankami ra mo araŋ ma suuru. Wa mo ye adduwa ra." 
Romans12:13 W'araŋ arzaka fay-fay ka hanantey gaakasinay, wa yaw gaay mo." 
Romans12:14 Wa albarka gaara borey kaŋ yaŋ g'araŋ gurzugandi se. Wa albarka gaara, manti laaliyaŋ." 
Romans12:15 Wa farhã farhantey banda, wa hẽ hẽekoy banda." 
Romans12:16 Araŋ ma bara nda laakal folloŋ care se. Araŋ ma si laakal da hari beeriyaŋ, amma w'araŋ biney ye ikayney gaa. Wa si ciya boroyaŋ kaŋ ga boŋ jare." 
Romans12:17 Wa si boro kulu laala bana nda laala. Wa ceeci ka te haŋ kaŋ ga boori borey kulu jine. 
Romans12:18 Da fondo go no, wa te araŋ hina kulu ka goro nda laakal kanay, araŋ da boro kulu game ra." 
Romans12:19 Ya ay baakoy, araŋ ma si bana, amma wa nangu cindi Irikoy futa se. Zama i n'a hantum ka ne: «Banayaŋ ya ay wane no. Ay no ga bana.» Yaadin no Rabbi ci." 
Romans12:20 Amma day: «Da ni ibara haray, m'a no ŋwaari. D'a jaw, m'a no hari. Zama woodin teeyaŋ gaa no ni ga danj'ize gusam a boŋo boŋ.»" 
Romans12:21 Wa si yadda laala ma hin araŋ, amma wa hin laala ihanno teeyaŋ ra." 
Romans13:1 Tilas kala boro kulu ma nga boŋ ye ganda hinkoyey se, zama dabari kulu si no kaŋ manti Irikoy do no a fun. Hinkoyey kaŋ go no mo, Irikoy no k'i waadu." 
Romans13:2 Woodin sabbay se, boro kaŋ goono ga wangu hini, Irikoy waado no a goono ga wangu. Borey kaŋ ga wangu mo ga kande ciiti ngey boŋ." 
Romans13:3 Zama koyey manti humburkumay hariyaŋ no goy hanno teeko se, kala day goy laalo teeko se. Ni ga ba ma si humburu hinkoy, wala? To, kala ni ma hari hanno te, a ga saabu ni se mo." 
Romans13:4 Zama nga wo Irikoy goy-teeri no ni se ni boriyandiyaŋo se. Amma da ni goono ga goy laalo te, ma humburu. Zama manti yaamo no a go ga takuba jare bo. Zama nga wo Irikoy goy-teeri no kaŋ ga dukuri bana boro se kaŋ goono ga goy laalo te." 
Romans13:5 A se no a ga tilas boro ma nga boŋ ye ganda, manti dukuro sabbay se hinne bo, amma bine lasaabo sabbay se mo." 
Romans13:6 Daliili woodin se no araŋ ga jangal bana mo, zama hinkoyey wo Irikoy goy-teeriyaŋ no a goyo se. I goono ga kookari woodin ra waati kulu mo." 
Romans13:7 Wa boro kulu no nga wane: jangal, jangal tako se, dwan nooru, dwanyey se. Wa bara nda humburkumay, nga kaŋ to i ma humbur'a se. Wa beerandi mo nga kaŋ to beerandiyaŋ." 
Romans13:8 Araŋ ma si bara garawkooniyaŋ boro kulu se, kala day care se baakasinay, zama boro kaŋ ga ba nga gorokasin na asariya toonandi." 
Romans13:9 Zama lordey* kaŋ ne: «Ni ma si zina, ni ma si boro wi, ni ma si zay, ni ma si bini , » woodin yaŋ da wo kulu kaŋ cindi mo margu sanno wo ra kaŋ ne: «Ni ma ba ni gorokasin danga ni boŋ cine.»" 
Romans13:10 Baakasinay si goy laalo te nga gorokasin se. Woodin sabbay se no baakasinay ya asariya toonandiyaŋ no. 
Romans13:11 Araŋ ma woodin te, za kaŋ araŋ ga alwaato bay. Saaya to gumo kaŋ araŋ ga tun jirbi, zama sohõ faaba maan iri gaa ka bisa alwaato kaŋ iri cimandi." 
Romans13:12 Cino beeri, mo maan boyaŋ. Iri ma kubay te-goyey kaa ka furu, iri ma annura wongu jinayey daŋ." 
Romans13:13 Iri m'iri diraw te da daa hanno, sanda zaari kwaaray, manti nda annasuwa wala nda baji haŋ-ka-buguyaŋ, manti nda zina wala furkutaray, manti nda yanje wala canse." 
Romans13:14 Kal araŋ ma Rabbi Yesu Almasihu faka, araŋ ma si fongu mo nda mate kaŋ araŋ g'araŋ gaaham ibaay laaley kungandi nd'a." 
Romans14:1 Boro kaŋ sinda gaabi cimbeeri* ra, araŋ m'a ta, amma manti zama araŋ ma kakaw sikka sanni boŋ." 
Romans14:2 Boro fo gonda cimbeeri kaŋ ga naŋ a ma hay kulu ŋwa. Afo mo, kaŋ sinda gaabi, a si ŋwa kala kassi nda tuuri izey baano-baaney." 
Romans14:3 Boro kaŋ ga hay kulu ŋwa ma si donda bora kaŋ siino ga ŋwa. Bora din kaŋ siino ga ŋwa mo ma si ŋwaakwa ciinay da taali, zama Irikoy n'a ta." 
Romans14:4 Nin no may kaŋ ga boro fo tam ciiti? D'a kay wala nd'a kaŋ, woodin a koyo sanni no. Amma a ga kay, zama Rabbi gonda dabari k'a kayandi." 
Romans14:5 Boro fo ga zaari fo lasaabu kaŋ a bisa zaari fo beeray. Afo mo koyne ga lasaabu kaŋ zaari kulu ga saba. Boro kulu ma woodin tabbatandi nga bina ra. 
Romans14:6 Boro kaŋ goono ga zaari fo haggoy, Rabbi se no a goono g'a haggoy. Boro kaŋ goono ga hay kulu ŋwa, Rabbi se no a goono g'a ŋwa, zama a ga Irikoy saabu. Boro kaŋ siino ga ŋwa mo, Rabbi se no a siino ga ŋwa, a ga Irikoy saabu mo." 
Romans14:7 Zama iri boro fo kulu si funa nga boŋ se, boro kulu mo si bu nga boŋ se." 
Romans14:8 D'iri go fundi ra, Rabbi se no iri goono ga funa. D'iri bu mo, Rabbi se no iri ga bu. Yaadin gaa d'iri funa wala nd'iri bu, iri ya Rabbi wane yaŋ no." 
Romans14:9 Daliili kaŋ se Almasihu bu, a ye ka funa mo, nga neeya: zama nga ma ciya buukoy da fundikooney kulu se Rabbi." 
Romans14:10 Amma nin: ifo se no ni goono ga ni nya-izo guna nda taali? Wala ni mo koyne: ifo se no ni goono ga donda ni nya-izo? Zama iri boro kulu ga kay Irikoy ciiti karga jine! 
Romans14:11 Zama i n'a hantum ka ne: Rabbi ne: «Ay ze d'ay fundo, ay se no kange kulu ga gurfa. Deene kulu mo ga Irikoy _darza|_ seeda.»" 
Romans14:12 Yaadin no, iri boro fo kulu ga kande nga bumbo te-goyey Irikoy jine." 
Romans14:13 Yaadin gaa, iri ma si ye ka care guna nda taali. Amma wa bara nda miila woone: boro kulu ma si hartayaŋ hari daŋ nga nya-izo jine, wala hay fo kaŋ g'a zeeri." 
Romans14:14 Ay bay, ay tabbat mo Rabbi Yesu ra kaŋ hay kulu si no kaŋ ga harram da nga boŋ. Kala day, boro se kaŋ g'a lasaabu harram hari, to, bora din se kay, a ga harram." 
Romans14:15 Amma nda ŋwaari fo sabbay se ni nya-izo bina sara, manti baakasinay goy no ni goono ga te koyne. Ni ŋwaaro sabbay se ni ma si boro kaŋ se Almasihu bu halaci." 
Romans14:16 Wa si naŋ haŋ kaŋ ga boori araŋ se ma ciya laala ciinay hari. 
Romans14:17 Zama Irikoy koytara manti ŋwa da haŋ no, amma adilitaray no, da laakal kanay, da farhã Biya Hanno ra." 
Romans14:18 Zama boro kaŋ ga may Almasihu se yaadin cine ga kaan Irikoy se, yaddante mo no borey jine." 
Romans14:19 Yaadin gaa, iri ma ceeci haŋ kaŋ ga laakal kanay tonton, da mo haŋ kaŋ ga care no jina-koyyaŋ." 
Romans14:20 }waari fo sabbay se ni ma si Irikoy goyo zeeri. Daahir, hay kulu ga halal. Kulu nda yaadin a si boori boro se kaŋ g'a ŋwa ka ciya katiyaŋ hari boro fo se." 
Romans14:21 Haŋ kaŋ ga boori ga ti boro ma si ham ŋwa, wala a ma si duvan* haŋ, wala mo a ma si hay kulu te kaŋ ga naŋ ni nya-izo ma kati." 
Romans14:22 Cimbeero* kaŋ ni gonda, ni m'a gaay ni boŋ se Irikoy jine. Albarkante no boro kaŋ si nga boŋ kalima haya din ra kaŋ a goono ga yadda nd'a ka te." 
Romans14:23 Amma boro kaŋ ga sikka du ciiti d'a ŋwa, zama a siino ga ŋwa cimbeeri boŋ. Hay kulu mo kaŋ manti cimbeeri do no a fun ya zunubi no." 
Romans15:1 Amma iri wo kaŋ ti gaabikooney, a ga hima iri ma borey kaŋ yaŋ sinda gaabi gaa ngey londibuuna ra. Iri ma si te haŋ kaŋ ga kaan iri boŋ se." 
Romans15:2 Iri boro kulu ma te haŋ kaŋ ga kaan nga gorokasino se a booriyaŋo se kaŋ g'a no jina-koyyaŋ. 
Romans15:3 Zama Almasihu bumbo mana te haŋ kaŋ ga kaan nga boŋ se. Amma mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Ni wowkoy wowey kaŋ ay boŋ.» 
Romans15:4 Zama hay kulu kaŋ i n'i hantum doŋ, i n'i hantum zama iri ma dondon se, hal iri ma du beeje suuro da bine-gaabo do kaŋ Irikoy Tira Hanney g'iri no." 
Romans15:5 Irikoy kaŋ ga suuru nda bine-gaabi no m'araŋ no laakal folloŋ araŋ da care game ra, Almasihu Yesu fonda boŋ," 
Romans15:6 kaŋ ga naŋ da bine folloŋ, da me folloŋ mo, araŋ ma iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu Irikoyo, kaŋ ti a Baabo mo, beerandi." 
Romans15:7 Woodin sabbay se, araŋ ma care ta, mate kaŋ cine Almasihu n'araŋ ta Irikoy darza se." 
Romans15:8 Zama ay ga ne: Almasihu ciya saajawko Yahudancey se Irikoy cimo se, zama a ma alkawley kaŋ yaŋ Irikoy sambu doŋ kaayey se tabbatandi." 
Romans15:9 Zama dumi* cindey mo ma Irikoy beerandi a suujo sabbay se, mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Woodin se no ay ga saabu ni se dumi cindey game ra, Ay ma sifayaŋ baytu te ni maa gaa.»" 
Romans15:10 A ne koyne: «Ya dumi cindey, wa farhã Rabbi jama banda.»" 
Romans15:11 A ne koyne: «Ya dumi cindey kulu, wa Rabbi sifa. Dumey kulu, m'a sifa mo.»" 
Romans15:12 Koyne mo, Isaya ne: «Yasse kaajo ga bagu ka fatta, nga mo no ga tun ka dumi cindey may. A ra no dumi cindey ga beeje sinji.»" 
Romans15:13 Kala Beejekoyo m'araŋ toonandi nda farhã kulu da laakal kanay mo cimandiyaŋ ra, hal araŋ ma yulwa beeje ra, Biya Hanno dabaro ra." 
Romans15:14 Amma ay bumbo ga tabbat araŋ boŋ, ay nya-izey, kaŋ araŋ bumbey goono ga to da booriyaŋ, araŋ to da bayray kulu, araŋ ga hin mo ka care yaamar." 
Romans15:15 Kulu nda yaadin, ay hantum araŋ se da bine-gaabi hay fooyaŋ boŋ, hal ay m'araŋ fongandi. Ay na woodin te za kaŋ Irikoy na gomno wo no ay se," 
Romans15:16 hal ay ma ciya Almasihu Yesu goy-teeri dumi cindey se. Ay goono ga Irikoy goyo te kaŋ ga ti Baaru Hanna feyaŋ, hala dumi cindey kaŋ yaŋ Biya Hanno n'i ciya hanante ma ciya sargay yaddante Irikoy se." 
Romans15:17 Yaadin gaa, ay gonda darza hari Almasihu Yesu ra, Irikoy goyo kaŋ ay go ga te ra." 
Romans15:18 Zama ay si te bine-gaabi ka hay kulu sanni te, kala day hayey din kaŋ Almasihu te ay do, kaŋ yaŋ naŋ dumi cindey n'a gana, _ay|_ sanno d'_ay|_ te-goyo do." 
Romans15:19 A na alaamayaŋ da dambara hari goyyaŋ te _ay do|_, Biya _Hanno|_ dabaro ra. Yaadin no, za Urusalima kwaara ka windi kala Ilirikum laabu, ay na Almasihu Baaru Hanna waazu nango kulu." 
Romans15:20 Daahir, ay ga anniya haw mo ay ma Baaru Hanna waazu nangu kaŋ i mana jin ka Almasihu waazo te, zama ay ma si cina boro fo daba boŋ," 
Romans15:21 mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Borey kaŋ yaŋ a baaro mana kaa i do, ngey wo ga di. Ngey kaŋ yaŋ mana maa mo ga faham.»" 
Romans15:22 Woodin no k'ay ganji sorro boobo ay ma kaa araŋ do. 
Romans15:23 Amma sohõ, muraadu kulu mana cindi ay se ne laabey ra. Za jiiri boobo mo ay go ga beeje ay ma kaa araŋ do." 
Romans15:24 Waati kaŋ ay ga koy Espanya, ay gonda beeje ay ma kabay ka di araŋ. Waato kaŋ araŋ n'ay bina farhandi kayna araŋ game ra banda, ay gonda beeje araŋ m'ay gaakasinay mo da hindoonay kaŋ ga kond'ay noodin." 
Romans15:25 Amma sohõ ay goono ga koy Urusalima* zama ay ma konda gaakasinay hanantey se. 
Romans15:26 Zama a kaan Masidoniya nda Akaya laabey ganakoy se i ma nooyaŋ fooyaŋ te alfukaarey se kaŋ yaŋ go Urusalima hanantey game ra. 
Romans15:27 Oho me, a kaan i se. I gonda garaw ngey gaa mo. Dumi cindey du ngey baa Yahudancey albarkey ra, kaŋ fun Irikoy do. Yaadin gaa, garaw go dumi cindey gaa i ma Yahudancey saajaw i ndunnya arzakey ra." 
Romans15:28 A binde, waati kaŋ ay na woodin ban ka albarka wo kawaatimandi i se, ay ga kabay araŋ do ka koy Espanya." 
Romans15:29 Ay ga woone bay mo: waati kaŋ ay ga kaa araŋ do kulu, ay ga kaa da Almasihu albarka toonanta." 
Romans15:30 Sohõ ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray, nya-izey, iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu sabbay se, da Biya _Hanno|_ baakasinay sabbay se mo: araŋ ma gurjay ay banda araŋ adduwey ra Irikoy gaa ay se." 
Romans15:31 Wa gaara ay ma du ka faaba Yahudiya* laabu borey kaŋ yaŋ si gana kambey ra. Woodin banda, hal ay saajaw goyo kaŋ ay gonda Urusalima ra ma ciya yadda hari hanantey se." 
Romans15:32 Hala mo ay ma kaa araŋ do farhã ra Irikoy miila boŋ ka fulanzam araŋ banda. 
Romans15:33 Sohõ day, Irikoy kaŋ ti Laakal-Kanay-Koyo ma bara araŋ kulu banda. Amin!" 
Romans16:1 Ay g'iri nya-ize waybora Fibi sifa araŋ se, saajawko no Almasihu* marga se kaŋ go Sankariya." 
Romans16:2 Araŋ m'a kubayni Rabbi ra, mate kaŋ a ga hima hanantey se. Araŋ m'a kambu za hay kulu ra kaŋ a ga laami nd'a araŋ gaa. Zama nga bumbo na gaakasinay te boro boobo se, hala nda ay mo se." 
Romans16:3 Wa Birisila da Akila kaŋ yaŋ ti ay goykasiney Almasihu Yesu ra fo. 
Romans16:4 Ay fundo sabbay se i na ngey boŋ salle. Manti ay hinne no ga saabu i se, amma Almasihu margey kulu kaŋ go dumi cindey game ra mo." 
Romans16:5 Wa Almasihu marga kaŋ go ga margu i windo ra mo fo. W'ay baakwa Epinetus fo. Nga no ga ti Almasihu ganako sintina Aziya laabo ra. 
Romans16:6 Wa Maryama fo, kaŋ na goy boobo te araŋ se." 
Romans16:7 Wa Andaronikos da Yuniyos mo fo kaŋ yaŋ ga ti ay nya-ka-fo-siney d'ay kasu hangasiney. I gonda maa hanno diyey do. I jin ay se mo Almasihu ra. 
Romans16:8 Wa Ampliyatos fo, kaŋ ay ga ba Rabbi ra." 
Romans16:9 Wa Urbanos fo kaŋ ti iri goykasin Almasihu ra, d'ay baakwa Istacis." 
Romans16:10 Wa Appeles fo, yaddante no Almasihu ra. Wa Aristabulos almayaaley fo." 
Romans16:11 Wa Herodiyon fo, ay nya-ka-fo-sina, da mo Rabbi ra waney kaŋ yaŋ go Narsisos almayaaley ra." 
Romans16:12 Wa Tarifana da Tarifosa fo, kaŋ yaŋ goono ga goy Rabbi ra. Wa Barsida kaŋ borey ga ba gumo fo, kaŋ na goy boobo te Rabbi se." 
Romans16:13 Wa Rufus fo, kaŋ ti Rabbi wane suubananta, nga nda nga nya, kaŋ te ay mo se nya." 
Romans16:14 Wa Asinkiritos fo, da Filigon, da Harmasa, da Batarubas, da Harmisa, da nya-izey kaŋ yaŋ go i banda." 
Romans16:15 Wa Filologus fo, da Yuliya, da Niriyos da nga wayme, da Olimpas, da hanantey kaŋ yaŋ go i banda." 
Romans16:16 Wa care fo da baakasinay garbe sunsumyaŋ hanna. Almasihu margey kulu g'araŋ fo. 
Romans16:17 Sohõ ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray, nya-izey, araŋ ma haggoy da borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga fay-fayyaŋ te. I ga taali teeyaŋ hari daŋ araŋ game ra mo kaŋ ga waana dondonandiyaŋo kaŋ araŋ jin ka dondon. Araŋ ma banda bare i gaa." 
Romans16:18 Zama ngey kaŋ yaŋ go yaadin, manti iri Rabbo Almasihu se no i go ga goy, amma ngey bumbey gundey se. I me kaana da i sanni baana do no i ga boŋ-dogonay biney halli." 
Romans16:19 Araŋ ganayaŋ baaro to boro kulu do. Ay binde goono ga farhã araŋ se. Amma ay ga ba araŋ ma ciya laakalkooniyaŋ ihanno ciine ra, araŋ ma ciya ihannoyaŋ mo ilaalo ciine ra." 
Romans16:20 Irikoy kaŋ ti Laakal-Kanay-Koyo mo ga waasu ka Saytan* mumuru araŋ cey cire. Iri Rabbo Yesu gomno ma bara araŋ banda. 
Romans16:21 Ay goykasino Timotiyos g'araŋ fo, nga nda Lusiyas, da Yason, da Sosipater, ay nya-ka-fo-siney." 
Romans16:22 Ay Tertiyus kaŋ goono ga tira wo hantum, ay g'araŋ fo Rabbi ra." 
Romans16:23 Gayos g'araŋ fo, nga kaŋ kwaara ay zumbu, kaŋ ga Almasihu marga borey kulu kubayni mo. Arastos kaŋ ti kwaara nooru gaaykwa, d'iri nya-izo Kuwartos, ngey mo g'araŋ fo." 
Romans16:24 Iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu gomno ma bara araŋ kulu banda. Amin! 
Romans16:25 Wa darza no Irikoy se! Nga no ga hin k'araŋ sinji, ay Baaru Hanna boŋ, da Yesu Almasihu wane waazo boŋ. Woodin ga te mo gundo bangandiyaŋo boŋ kaŋ go tugante za zamana sintinayey ra." 
Romans16:26 Amma sohõ Irikoy n'a bangandi k'a bayrandi dumi kulu se annabey tirey ra, nga lordo boŋ, nga kaŋ go no duumi, hal i ma cimi fonda gana." 
Romans16:27 Wa darza no Irikoy follonka kaŋ laakalo sinda cine se hal abada abadin Yesu Almasihu do! Amin! 
1Corinthians1:1 Ay no Bulos. Irikoy n'ay ce nga miila boŋ ay ma ciya Almasihu* Yesu diya. Iri nya-izo Sostano go ay banda. 
1Corinthians1:2 Iri go ga Irikoy marga fo kaŋ go Korint kwaara, ngey kaŋ yaŋ ciya hananteyaŋ Almasihu Yesu ra, kaŋ yaŋ Irikoy ce i ma bara hananteyaŋ. Iri go g'i fo, ngey nda borey kulu mo kaŋ yaŋ goono g'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu maa ce, nangu kulu kaŋ i go. Nga ga ti i Rabbo d'iri wano mo." 
1Corinthians1:3 Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara araŋ banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun iri Baabo Irikoy da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu do. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ay ga Irikoy saabu waati kulu araŋ se d'a gomno kaŋ a n'araŋ no Almasihu Yesu ra sabbay se. 
1Corinthians1:5 Hay kulu ra a n'araŋ arzakandi Almasihu do, araŋ sanno d'araŋ bayra kulu ra." 
1Corinthians1:6 Irikoy na seeda kaŋ iri te Almasihu boŋ tabbatandi araŋ game ra 
1Corinthians1:7 hal araŋ mana jaŋ nooyaŋ kulu waati kaŋ araŋ goono g'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu bangandiyaŋo batu. 
1Corinthians1:8 Nga no g'araŋ tabbatandi hala bananta, hal araŋ ma bara boroyaŋ kaŋ sinda taali iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu zaaro ra." 
1Corinthians1:9 Irikoy ya Naanaykoy no, nga kaŋ n'araŋ ce hal araŋ ma furo nga Izo, kaŋ ga ti iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu, markasina ra." 
1Corinthians1:10 Sohõ binde, ay nya-izey, ay g'araŋ yaamar iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu maa gaa: araŋ boro kulu ma te sanni folloŋ. Fay-fayyaŋ ma si bara araŋ game ra, amma araŋ ma bara margante care banda laakal folloŋ da saaware folloŋ ra." 
1Corinthians1:11 Zama Kuluwe windi borey do ay maa araŋ baaru, ay nya-izey, kaŋ i ne: canda-canda go no araŋ game ra." 
1Corinthians1:12 Haŋ kaŋ se ay na woodin ci ga ti araŋ boro fo kulu gonda nga kambe sanni. Afo ga ne: «Ay wo Bulos boro no.» Afo ga ne: «Ay ya Abolos wane no.» Afo ga ne: «Ay ya Kefas wane no.» Afo mo ga ne: «Ay wo Almasihu wane no.» 
1Corinthians1:13 Day mate nooya? Almasihu wo fay-fayante no? Wala i na Bulos kanji araŋ sabbay se no? E! I te araŋ se baptisma Bulos maa ra no? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ay ga Irikoy saabu kaŋ ay mana baptisma te araŋ boro kulu se, kala day Kirisbos da Gayos," 
1Corinthians1:15 zama boro kulu ma si ne araŋ du baptisma ay maa ra! 
1Corinthians1:16 (Amma ay na baptisma te Istifana almayaaley se mo. Woodin banda ay si bay hal ay na baptisma te boro fo se.) 
1Corinthians1:17 Zama Almasihu man'ay donton ay ma baptisma te se, amma ay ma Baaru Hanna waazu se. Woodin mo, ay ma s'a te da sanni gonitaray. Zama d'ay ga woodin te, Almasihu kanjiyaŋ* bundo ga ciya yaamo." 
1Corinthians1:18 Zama kanjiyaŋ bundo sanno ya saamotaray no borey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga halaci se, amma iri kaŋ goono ga du faaba se Irikoy dabaro no." 
1Corinthians1:19 Zama i n'a hantum ka ne: «Ay ga laakalkooney laakaley halaci, fahamantey fahama mo, ay g'a ganandi.»" 
1Corinthians1:20 Man laakalkooni? Man hantumko? Man zamana wo kakawko? Manti Irikoy na ndunnya wo laakalo himandi saamotaray no? 
1Corinthians1:21 Zama za kaŋ Irikoy laakalo ra, a te hala ndunnya mana Irikoy bay ngey laakaley do, a kaan Irikoy se nga ma cimandikoy faaba «saamotaray» waazo do." 
1Corinthians1:22 Zama Yahudancey ga alaamayaŋ hã. Garekey mo ga fahamay ceeci," 
1Corinthians1:23 amma iri wo, iri goono ga Almasihu kaŋ i kanji waazo te. Sanno wo ciya katiyaŋ hari Yahudancey se, saamotaray mo no dumi* cindey se." 
1Corinthians1:24 Amma borey kaŋ yaŋ Irikoy ce, da Yahudancey no wala Garekey no, i se Almasihu ya Irikoy dabaro no da Irikoy laakalo mo." 
1Corinthians1:25 Zama Irikoy laakal-jaŋa bisa borey laakal. Irikoy londibuuna mo bisa borey gaabi. 
1Corinthians1:26 Ay nya-izey, wa fongu da mate kaŋ araŋ go kaŋ Irikoy n'araŋ ce. A mana ndunnya wo laakalkooni boobo, wala dabarikooni boobo, wala darzante boobo ce bo." 
1Corinthians1:27 Amma Irikoy na ndunnya saamotaray harey suuban hal a ma laakalkooney haawandi. Irikoy na ndunnya londibuuney mo suuban hal a ma gaabikooney haawandi. 
1Corinthians1:28 Ndunnya kayna hayey, da hayey kaŋ yaŋ i ga donda mo, Irikoy n'i suuban. Oho mo, hala baa hayey kaŋ yaŋ si no, a n'i suuban zama a ma hayey kaŋ yaŋ go no ciya yaamo." 
1Corinthians1:29 Zama boro kulu ma si fooma Irikoy gaa. 
1Corinthians1:30 Amma Irikoy no k'araŋ daŋ Almasihu Yesu ra, nga kaŋ Irikoy do a te iri se laakal, da adilitaray*, da hananyaŋ, da fansa," 
1Corinthians1:31 hal a ma bara mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Boro kaŋ goono ga fooma ma fooma Rabbi ra.» 
1Corinthians2:1 Ay mo, nya-izey, waato kaŋ ay kaa araŋ do, ay mana kaa da sanni gonitaray, wala laakal wane, ka Irikoy seeda waazu araŋ se." 
1Corinthians2:2 Zama ay miila ay ma si hay kulu bay araŋ game ra kala day Yesu Almasihu hinne, nga kaŋ i kanji." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ay goro araŋ do da londibuunay, da humburkumay, da jijiriyaŋ gumo." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ay sanno d'ay waazo mo manti nda fahamay sanni waaniyaŋ no kaŋ ga te sigaw, amma i te da Biya* _Hanno|_ cabeyaŋo da dabari mo," 
1Corinthians2:5 hal araŋ cimbeero ma si bara boro laakal boŋ, amma a ma bara Irikoy dabaro boŋ." 
1Corinthians2:6 Amma iri goono ga laakal salaŋ toonantey game ra, day manti zamana wo laakalo, wala zamana wo koyey wano, ngey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga bisa." 
1Corinthians2:7 Amma iri goono ga Irikoy laakalo salaŋ, gundu* wane, sanda wo kaŋ doŋ a go tugante, kaŋ Irikoy waadu iri darza se za waato zamaney mana te." 
1Corinthians2:8 Zamana wo koyey kulu mana bay laakalo din gaa, zama d'i bay a gaa, doŋ i si Rabbi darzakoyo kanji." 
1Corinthians2:9 Amma a te mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Hayey kaŋ mo mana di, kaŋ hanga mana maa, kaŋ mana furo boro bine ra mo, hayey din no Irikoy soola borey kaŋ ga ba r'a se.»" 
1Corinthians2:10 Amma iri se no Irikoy n'i bangandi Biya _Hanno|_ do. Zama Biya _Hanno|_ goono ga hay kulu fintal. Baa Irikoy hayey kaŋ ga guusu, a g'i fintal." 
1Corinthians2:11 Zama may no ga boro muraadey bay, da manti bora biya* kaŋ go a ra? Yaadin mo no, boro kulu si Irikoy muraadey bay, kala day Irikoy Biya." 
1Corinthians2:12 Iri wo, manti ndunnya biya no iri du bo, amma Biya kaŋ fun Irikoy do, hal iri ma hayey kaŋ Irikoy n'iri no nga gomno do bay." 
1Corinthians2:13 Hayey wo iri goono g'i salaŋ, manti nda sanni kaŋ Adam-ize laakal ga boro dondonandi, amma iri goono g'i salaŋ da wo kaŋ Biya Hanno g'iri dondonandi. Iri goono ga Biya Hanno harey deedandi nda Biya Hanna sanney." 
1Corinthians2:14 Amma boro kaŋ ga nga Adam-ize daa laala gana si Irikoy Biya harey ta. I ga ciya a se saamotaray. A si hin k'i bay mo, zama Biya Hanno do no boro g'i fayanka." 
1Corinthians2:15 Amma boro kaŋ ga Irikoy Biya gana ga hay kulu fayanka. Nga bumbo mo, boro kulu s'a fintal." 
1Corinthians2:16 Zama i ne: «May no na Rabbi miila bay hala bora m'a dondonandi?» Amma iri wo, iri gonda Almasihu miila." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ay mo, ay nya-izey, ay si du ka salaŋ araŋ se danga boroyaŋ kaŋ ga Irikoy Biya gana, amma day danga boroyaŋ kaŋ go bine ibaay* laaley banda, danga boroyaŋ kaŋ go attaciriyayaŋ Almasihu ra nooya." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ay n'araŋ no wa araŋ ma haŋ, manti ŋwaari tiŋo bo, zama waato araŋ mana hin a. Oho, hala hõ mo araŋ si hin a," 
1Corinthians3:3 zama baa sohõ araŋ go bine ibaay laaley banda. Za kaŋ canse nda kusuuma go araŋ game ra, manti bine ibaay laaley banda no araŋ go? Manti araŋ go ga dira Adam-ize alhaali ra no?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Zama waati kaŋ araŋ boro fo go ga ne: «Ay ya Bulos wane no!» Afo mo ma ne: «Ay wo Abolos wane no!» Manti Adam-ize alhaali no araŋ go ga te? 
1Corinthians3:5 Ifo ga ti Abolos binde? Ifo ga ti Bulos mo? Goy-teeriyaŋ no kaŋ do araŋ cimandi, mate kaŋ Rabbi na boro fo kulu no." 
1Corinthians3:6 Ay wo duma, Abolos mo na dumaro haŋandi, amma Irikoy no ka naŋ a beeri." 
1Corinthians3:7 Yaadin gaa, bora kaŋ ga duma wala bora kaŋ ga haŋandi manti hay fo no, amma Irikoy no kaŋ ga naŋ a ma beeri." 
1Corinthians3:8 Sohõ binde, bora kaŋ ga duma nda bora kaŋ ga haŋandi, i kulu afolloŋ no, boro kulu mo ga du nga alhakko nga goyo boŋ." 
1Corinthians3:9 Zama iri ya Irikoy goykasinyaŋ no, araŋ mo Irikoy faro da Irikoy cinaro no." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ay binde, Irikoy gomno boŋ kaŋ a n'ay no, ay na daba sinji, mate kaŋ cinako goni kaŋ gonda laakal ga te, amma boro fo go ga cina a boŋ. Amma boro kulu ma haggoy da cinayaŋo kaŋ dumi nga ga cina a boŋ." 
1Corinthians3:11 Zama boro kulu si hin ka daba fo sinji, kaŋ waana wo kaŋ i jin ka sinji, nga kaŋ ti Yesu Almasihu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Boro kulu mo kaŋ goono ga cina daba din boŋ, da wura no, wala nzarfu, wala tondi darzakoy, wala bundu, wala subu, wala buunu , boro fo kulu goyo ga bangay." 
1Corinthians3:13 Zama zaaro din g'a bangandi, za kaŋ danji ra no Irikoy g'a neesi. Danjo bumbo mo ga boro kulu goyo neesi, hala dumi kaŋ no." 
1Corinthians3:14 Da bora goyo kaŋ a cina a boŋ ga cindi, bora ga du alhakku." 
1Corinthians3:15 Da bora goyo ton, a ga mursu nd'a, amma nga bumbo ga du faaba, danga boro kaŋ fun danji ra punti." 
1Corinthians3:16 Araŋ mana bay kaŋ araŋ ya Irikoy fuwo no, Irikoy Biya mo go araŋ ra da goray?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Boro kulu kaŋ na Irikoy fuwo halaci, Irikoy g'a koy halaci, zama Irikoy fuwo ya hanante no, kaŋ ga ti araŋ." 
1Corinthians3:18 Boro kulu ma si nga boŋ halli. Araŋ game ra boro kulu kaŋ ga tammahã nga te zamana wo laakalkooni, naŋ a ma bare ka ciya saamo, hal a ma du ka ciya laakalkooni nda cimi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Zama ndunnya wo laakalo ya saamotaray no Irikoy do, mate kaŋ i n'a hantum ka ne: «Ay ga laakalkooney di ngey boŋ hiila ra.»" 
1Corinthians3:20 I n'a hantum ka ne koyne: «Rabbi ga laakalkooney miiley bay, kaŋ yaamoyaŋ no.»" 
1Corinthians3:21 Yaadin gaa, boro kulu ma si fooma nda boro! Zama hay kulu araŋ wane no." 
1Corinthians3:22 Da Bulos no, wala Abolos, wala Kefas, wala ndunnya, wala fundi, wala buuyaŋ wala sohõ hayey, wala hayey kaŋ go kaa , i kulu araŋ wane yaŋ no." 
1Corinthians3:23 Araŋ mo Almasihu wane yaŋ no, Almasihu mo Irikoy wane no." 
1Corinthians4:1 Iri mo, kal i m'iri lasaabu Almasihu goy-teeriyaŋ, da Irikoy gundu jine funeyaŋ." 
1Corinthians4:2 A binde, haŋ kaŋ i ga ceeci jine funa gaa ga ti i ma bora gar da naanay." 
1Corinthians4:3 Amma ay wo, manti hay fo no ay do araŋ m'ay gosi, wala i ma kond'ay alkaali kwaara. Oho, ay si baa ay boŋ gosi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Zama ay mana taali kulu bay ay boŋ gaa, amma woodin kulu s'ay hanandi. Amma ay neesikwa ga ti Rabbi." 
1Corinthians4:5 Woodin sabbay se, wa si Almasihu goy-teerey ciiti za alwaato mana to. Wa naŋ hala Rabbi ma kaa. Nga no ga kubay ra hari tugantey kaa taray kwaaray, ka bine miila lasaabey bangandi mo. Waato din boro kulu ga du nga saabuyaŋo Irikoy do." 
1Corinthians4:6 Hayey din, nya-izey, ay n'i himandi misa ay boŋ gaa da Abolos gaa mo araŋ sabbay se, hal araŋ ma dondon iri do haŋ kaŋ ga naŋ araŋ ma si daaru haŋ kaŋ i hantum gaa. Zama araŋ boro fo kulu mo ma si te boŋbeeray ka baar'a-baar'a te." 
1Corinthians4:7 Zama may no k'araŋ beerandi ka bisa care? Ifo no ni se mo kaŋ manti nooyaŋ no? Za kaŋ Irikoy no ka ni no nd'a, ifo se no ni goono ga fooma, danga manti nooyaŋ no?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Baa sohõ araŋ wo to, araŋ te arzakanteyaŋ, araŋ na koytaray ŋwa kaŋ iri baa si a ra! Ay ga ba haciika araŋ ma koytaray ŋwa, hal iri mo m'a ŋwa araŋ banda." 
1Corinthians4:9 Zama a ga hima ay se kaŋ Irikoy na iri, kaŋ ga ti diyey daŋ kokor banda, danga borey kaŋ i na buuyaŋ ciiti dumbu i boŋ. Zama i n'iri ciya gomdo hari ndunnya borey da malaykey* se." 
1Corinthians4:10 Iri wo saamoyaŋ no Almasihu sabbay se, amma araŋ ciya laakalkooniyaŋ Almasihu ra! Iri wo londibuunoyaŋ no, amma araŋ ciya gaabikooniyaŋ! A go, araŋ du darza, amma iri wo kaynandiyaŋ!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Hala sohõ alwaati woone ra iri go ga maa haray, iri go ga maa jaw, iri go ga jaŋ bankaaray, i go g'iri kutubo, iri sinda iri boŋ fu." 
1Corinthians4:12 Iri go ga goy gumo nda iri kambey. I go g'iri wow, amma iri go ga albarka gaara. I go g'iri gurzugandi, amma iri go ga suuru." 
1Corinthians4:13 I go g'iri jance, iri go ga baani sanni te. I go g'iri ciya danga ndunnya ziibi, fisi kulu dumi, hala hõ." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ay mana woodin hantum araŋ se zama ay m'araŋ haawandi bo, amma ay ma kaseeti araŋ gaa danga ay izeyaŋ kaŋ ay ga ba cine." 
1Corinthians4:15 Baa araŋ du dondonandiko zambar way Almasihu ra, kulu nda yaadin araŋ sinda baaba boobo, zama ay no k'araŋ hay Almasihu Yesu ra Baaru Hanna do." 
1Corinthians4:16 Woodin sabbay se binde ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray araŋ ma ciya ay dondonkoyaŋ. 
1Corinthians4:17 Woodin se no ay na Timotiyos donton araŋ do, nga kaŋ ciya ay se ize kaŋ ay ga ba Rabbi ra, naanaykoy mo no. A g'araŋ fongandi d'ay teerey Almasihu Yesu ganayaŋ ra, mate kaŋ cine ay go g'i dondonandi nangu kulu Almasihu* marga kulu ra." 
1Corinthians4:18 Araŋ boro fooyaŋ te boŋbeeray danga day ay si ye ka kaa araŋ do. 
1Corinthians4:19 Amma da Rabbi yadda, ay ga kaa araŋ do d'a tonton kayna. Waato din gaa no, ay ga bay boŋbeeray koyey gaa, manti i sanney hinne bo, amma hala nd'i dabarey." 
1Corinthians4:20 Zama Irikoy koytara, manti nda sanni no bo, amma dabari no." 
1Corinthians4:21 Ifo no araŋ ga ba? Ay ma kaa araŋ do da goobu, wala ya kaa baakasinay da lalabay biya ra no?" 
1Corinthians5:1 I go g'araŋ baaru dede kaŋ zina go araŋ game ra. Zina woone dumi i s'a gar baa dumi* cindey game ra, hal araŋ boro fo gonda nga baaba wande." 
1Corinthians5:2 Araŋ te boŋbeeray mo! Araŋ mana te bine saray, hala bora din kaŋ na woodin te, araŋ m'a kaa araŋ game ra." 
1Corinthians5:3 Zama haciika ay wo, baa kaŋ ay si noodin gaahamo ra, kulu nda yaadin ay go araŋ do biya ra. Ay jin ka ciiti mo bora kaŋ na goyo din te se, danga day ay go noodin no." 
1Corinthians5:4 D'araŋ margu, ay biya mo go araŋ banda, d'iri Rabbi Yesu dabaro mo. Rabbi Yesu maa ra" 
1Corinthians5:5 araŋ ma boro wo dumi daŋ Saytan* kambe ra a gaahamo halaciyaŋ se, hal a biya ma du faaba Rabbi zaaro ra." 
1Corinthians5:6 Araŋ fooma wo si boori! Araŋ mana bay kaŋ dalbu kayna no ga motta kulu fuurandi? 
1Corinthians5:7 Araŋ ma dalbu zeena kaa, hal araŋ ma bara motto taji, kaŋ sinda dalbu, mate kaŋ araŋ go nda cimi. Zama Irikoy n'iri Paska* feejo, kaŋ ga ti Almasihu, sarga* iri se." 
1Corinthians5:8 Yaadin gaa, iri m'iri bato* te, manti nda dalbu zeeno, wala nda zamba nda laala wane bo, amma iri m'a te da buuru kaŋ sinda dalbu, ihanno nda cimi wane." 
1Corinthians5:9 Tira fo ra ay hantum araŋ se ka ne araŋ ma si hangasinay da zina-teerey. 
1Corinthians5:10 Ay si ndunnya ganako zina-teerey gaa, wala binikomey, wala komkoy, wala tooru ganakoy, zama nda yaadin no, a ga tilas araŋ ma fun ndunnya ra." 
1Corinthians5:11 Amma sohõ ay go ga hantum araŋ se ka ne araŋ ma si hangasinay da boro fo kaŋ i ga ne a se nya-ize, da bora din ya zina-teeri no, wala binikom, wala tooru ganako, wala wowko, wala baji-haŋ-ka-buguko, wala komko. Araŋ ma si baa ŋwa da bora din koy." 
1Corinthians5:12 Wala ay muraadu no ay ma ciiti borey kaŋ yaŋ go taray se? Manti araŋ Almasihu marga borey no ga care ciiti bo? 
1Corinthians5:13 Amma ngey kaŋ yaŋ go taray, Irikoy g'i ciiti. Araŋ ma boro laala din kaa araŋ game ra." 
1Corinthians6:1 Araŋ game ra, da boro fo na boro fo kalima, a ga yaaru ka koy ciitikoy kaŋ si Irikoy cimo gana do no, i ma ciiti dumbu i se? Manti hanantey do no araŋ ga hima ka koy?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Wala araŋ mana bay kaŋ hanantey no ga ndunnya ciiti? D'araŋ no ga ndunnya ciiti binde, araŋ mana to naŋ kaŋ araŋ ga sanni kayney ciiti?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Araŋ mana bay kaŋ iri no ga malaykey ciiti, sanku fa zamana wo harey?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Yaadin gaa, d'araŋ gonda zamana wo ciiti harey, araŋ ga boroyaŋ daŋ i ma ciiti, kaŋ yaŋ manti hay kulu Almasihu marga ra no?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ay go ga woodin ci zama araŋ ma haaw! Haba? Sohõ araŋ ga jaŋ laakalkooni folloŋ araŋ game ra kaŋ ga waani ka nya-izey da care sanni feeri? 
1Corinthians6:6 Amma sohõ nya-ize fo go ga konda nga nya-izo ciito do. A go ga woodin te mo ciitikoy kaŋ manti Almasihu ganakoy jine! 
1Corinthians6:7 Haciika, baa sohõ woone te mursay hari gumo araŋ da care game ra, za kaŋ araŋ ga konda care ciiti do. Manti a ga bisa araŋ ma yadda nda toonye bo? Manti a ga bisa i m'araŋ kom?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Amma araŋ bumbey no goono ga toonye, araŋ goono ga kom mo, hal araŋ nya-izey gaa." 
1Corinthians6:9 Wala araŋ mana bay kaŋ bora kaŋ sinda adilitaray si Irikoy koytara tubu no? Wa s'araŋ boŋ darandi! Boro ziibey, wala tooru ganakoy, wala zina-teerey, wala aru-ci-way, wala aru-baay," 
1Corinthians6:10 wala zayey, wala binikomey, wala baji-haŋ-ka-bugukoy, wala wowkoy, wala komkoy, ikulu si Irikoy koytara tubu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Araŋ ra afooyaŋ, yaadin no araŋ goro doŋ. Amma Irikoy n'araŋ nyumay, a n'araŋ hanandi, a n'araŋ adilandi* Rabbi Yesu Almasihu maa ra d'iri Irikoyo Biya do mo." 
1Corinthians6:12 Hay kulu ga halal ay se, day manti hay kulu no ga hagu ay se. Hay kulu ga halal ay se, amma ay si yadda hay kulu m'ay dabari." 
1Corinthians6:13 }waari ya gunde wane no, gunde mo go ŋwaari se, amma Irikoy ga ihinka kulu halaci. Amma i mana gaaham te zina se, amma day Rabbi se. Rabbi mo go gaaham se." 
1Corinthians6:14 Irikoy na Rabbi tunandi ka kaa buuyaŋ ra nga dabaro do, a g'iri mo tunandi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Wala araŋ mana bay kaŋ araŋ gaahamey ya Almasihu gaahamo jareyaŋ no? Ay ma Almasihu gaahamo jara sambu k'a ciya kaaruwa gaaham jare no? Abada! 
1Corinthians6:16 Wala araŋ mana bay kaŋ boro kaŋ margu nda kaaruwa, a te gaaham folloŋ nga nd'a? Zama a ne: «I boro hinka ga ciya gaaham folloŋ»." 
1Corinthians6:17 Amma boro kaŋ margu nda Rabbi, a te biya folloŋ nga nd'a." 
1Corinthians6:18 Araŋ ma zuru zina se! Zunubi kulu kaŋ boro ga te, a si lamba boro gaahamo gaa. Amma boro kaŋ go ga zina te, a koy go ga taali te nga bumbo gaahamo se." 
1Corinthians6:19 Wala araŋ mana bay kaŋ araŋ gaahamey ga ti Biya Hanna fuwo? Nga no go araŋ ra, Irikoy do mo no araŋ du a. Araŋ manti araŋ bumbey wane yaŋ mo no" 
1Corinthians6:20 zama Irikoy n'araŋ day da hay bambata. Yaadin gaa araŋ ma Irikoy beerandi araŋ gaahamey ra. 
1Corinthians7:1 Sohõ day, hayey din kaŋ araŋ hantum ay se ciine ra, ngey neeya: A ga boori alboro se a ma si lamba wayboro gaa." 
1Corinthians7:2 Amma, zama i ma si zina, wa naŋ alboro kulu ma bara nda nga boŋ wande, wayboro kulu mo ma bara nda nga boŋ kurnye." 
1Corinthians7:3 Kurnye ma nga wando no haŋ kaŋ hagu a se, wande mo yaadin nga kurnyo se." 
1Corinthians7:4 Wando sinda nga boŋ gaahamo dabari, kala day kurnyo. Yaadin mo no kurnyo sinda nga boŋ gaahamo dabari, kala day wando." 
1Corinthians7:5 Araŋ ma si wangu care se, kala day d'araŋ yadda araŋ ma te alwaatiyaŋ zama araŋ ma du ka mo ye adduwa gaa. Amma woodin banda araŋ ma ye ka margu, hala Saytan* ma si araŋ si zama araŋ jaŋ boŋ hiniyaŋ." 
1Corinthians7:6 Amma woodin ay goono ga ci no yadda boŋ, manti lordi* boŋ no." 
1Corinthians7:7 Kulu nda yaadin, ay diyaŋo gaa a ga bisa boro kulu ma bara sanda ay cine. Amma boro kulu gonda nga boŋ nooyaŋ kaŋ Irikoy n'a no. Boro fo woone cine, boro fo mo yaadin cine." 
1Corinthians7:8 Amma borey kaŋ sinda wande nda wayborey kaŋ kurnye bu se, ay ga ne woone: a ga boori i se d'i ga goro sanda ay cine." 
1Corinthians7:9 Amma d'i si du ka hin ngey boŋ, kal i ma hiiji, zama i ma hiiji ga bisa i ma ton." 
1Corinthians7:10 Amma borey kaŋ go hiijay ra se ay ga lordi no , manti ay boŋ wane no bo, amma Rabbi wane no , wande ma si nga kurnye fay." 
1Corinthians7:11 (Amma d'a fay, a ma goro yaadin, kurnye si, wala a ma ye ka saba nda nga kurnyo.) Kurnye mo ma si nga wande fay." 
1Corinthians7:12 Amma cindey se ay no go ga salaŋ, manti Rabbi no. Ay ne: da Almasihu ganako fo go no kaŋ wando mana cimandi, wando mo yadda nga ma goro a banda, ganakwa ma s'a fay." 
1Corinthians7:13 Wande mo kaŋ kurnyo mana cimandi, kurnyo mo yadda nga ma goro a banda, wando ma s'a fay." 
1Corinthians7:14 Zama kurnye kaŋ mana cimandi, a hanan wando do, wande mo kaŋ mana cimandi, a hanan kurnye kaŋ ga ti ganakwa do. Da manti yaadin no doŋ araŋ izey si hanan. Amma sohõ hananteyaŋ no." 
1Corinthians7:15 Amma da boro kaŋ mana cimandi ga nga boŋ fay, a ma nga boŋ fay. Ganako alboro wala wayboro kaŋ go yaadin si tamtaray ra. Amma Irikoy n'araŋ ce araŋ ma goro nda laakal kanay." 
1Corinthians7:16 Zama nin, wande, mate ni ga te ka bay hala nin no ga ni kurnyo faaba? Ni mo, kurnye, mate ni ga te ka bay hala nin no ga ni wando faaba?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kala day boro kulu ma nga goray te mate kaŋ Rabbi n'a no, mate kaŋ a go d'a waato kaŋ Irikoy n'a ce. Yaadin no ay go ga lordi ka ne Almasihu margey kulu ra." 
1Corinthians7:18 Irikoy na boro fo ce kaŋ jin ka du dambanguyaŋ* no? A ma si dambanguyaŋo kaa. Irikoy na afo mo ce kaŋ mana dambangu no? A ma s'a ceeci. 
1Corinthians7:19 Dambanguyaŋ manti hay fo no, dambanguyaŋ-jaŋay mo manti hay fo no, amma day Irikoy lordey ganayaŋ no ga ti hay kulu." 
1Corinthians7:20 Goray kaŋ ra Irikoy na boro ce, boro kulu ma goro yaadin." 
1Corinthians7:21 Irikoy na ni ce waato kaŋ ni go bannya no? Woodin ma si ni kankam. Amma da ni gonda daama ka du fansayaŋ, dambe ni ma nafa nd'a." 
1Corinthians7:22 Zama boro kaŋ Rabbi n'a ce, a go bannya, bora din te Rabbi burcini. Yaadin mo no, boro kaŋ Rabbi n'a ce a go burcini, a te Almasihu bannya." 
1Corinthians7:23 Irikoy n'araŋ day da hay bambata, wa si ciya Adam-izey se bannyayaŋ." 
1Corinthians7:24 Ay nya-izey, boro kulu ma goro Irikoy banda mate kaŋ a go waato kaŋ Irikoy n'a ce." 
1Corinthians7:25 Wandiyey ciine ra binde, ay sinda lordi kaŋ fun Rabbi do. Amma ay g'ay diyaŋey no, sanda boro kaŋ ciya naanaykoy Rabbi suujo sabbay se." 
1Corinthians7:26 Ay lasaabuyaŋo gaa, sohõ gurzuga sabbay se, a bisa bora se a ma goro mate kaŋ a go." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ni gonda wande? Ma si ceeci ni m'a fay. Ni na ni wando fay no? To, ma si wande ceeci." 
1Corinthians7:28 Amma baa da ni hiiji, ni mana zunubi te. Da wandiyo mo hiiji, a mana zunubi te. Amma borey din ga taabi haŋ ndunnya goray ra. Ay mo ga ba ay m'araŋ waa da taabi." 
1Corinthians7:29 Haŋ kaŋ ay ga ci neeya, nya-izey: alwaati boobo mana cindi. Zama hunkuna banda, baa borey kaŋ yaŋ gonda wande, i ga te danga ngey sinda." 
1Corinthians7:30 Borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga hẽ mo, sanda i si ga hẽ. Borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga farhã mo, sanda i si ga farhã. Daykoy mo, sanda boroyaŋ kaŋ sinda hay kulu." 
1Corinthians7:31 Borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga goy da ndunnya harey mo, i ga te sanda ngey na saalay kaa i gaa. Zama ndunnya wo alhaalo go ga bisa." 
1Corinthians7:32 Amma ay ga ba araŋ ma si goro nda karhã. Boro kaŋ si hiijay ra ga laakal da Rabbi muraadey, mate kaŋ a ga te ka kaanu Rabbi se." 
1Corinthians7:33 Amma boro kaŋ go hiijay ra ga laakal da ndunnya muraadey, mate kaŋ a ga te ka kaan nga wando se, a laakalo ciya fayante mo." 
1Corinthians7:34 Wayboro kaŋ sinda kurnye nda wandiyo mo ga laakal nda Rabbi muraadey, hal ngey ma goro ihanno gaaham nda biya ra. Amma wayboro kaŋ hiiji ga laakal da ndunnya muraadey, mate kaŋ a ga te ka kaan nga kurnyo se." 
1Corinthians7:35 Woodin ay go ga ci araŋ nafa se. Manti sanda ay ma korfo zorti araŋ gaa se no ay go ga woodin ci bo, amma day haŋ kaŋ ga hagu araŋ se, zama araŋ goyo kaŋ araŋ ga te Rabbi se ma si te da laakal fayante mo." 
1Corinthians7:36 Amma da boro fo di kaŋ a mana hagu nga ize wandiyo ma bisa hiijay alwaato gaa, d'a ga miila nga m'a hiijandi, a ma te haŋ kaŋ a ga ba, a mana zunubi te. Wa naŋ i ma hiiji." 
1Corinthians7:37 Amma boro kaŋ na sanka sambu nga bina saaware gaa, woodin mana tilas a gaa, amma a gonda dabari nga bumbo miila boŋ, a jin ka suuban mo nga bina ra kaŋ nga ize wandiya si hiiji, bora din te haŋ kaŋ ga boori." 
1Corinthians7:38 Yaadin mo no boro kaŋ na nga ize wandiya hiijandi te ihanno, amma boro kaŋ man'a hiijandi bis'a." 
1Corinthians7:39 Hiijay ga wande haw hala nga kurnyo fundo me. Amma da kurnyo bu, hiija n'a taŋ, a ma hiiji nda boro kaŋ a ga ba, kala day Rabbi ra." 
1Corinthians7:40 Amma, ay diyaŋ gaa, a ga farhã ka bisa d'a goro yaadin. Ay ga tammahã mo ay gonda Irikoy Biya." 
1Corinthians8:1 Sohõ, hayey kaŋ i ga sarga tooru se ciine ra, ngey neeya: Iri ga bay kaŋ iri boro kulu gonda bayray. Bayray binde ga kande boŋbeeray, amma baakasinay ga jina-koyyaŋ te." 
1Corinthians8:2 Da boro fo ga tammahã nga ga hay fo bay, a man'a bay jina mate kaŋ cine a ga hima k'a bay." 
1Corinthians8:3 Amma boro kaŋ ga ba Irikoy, Irikoy g'a bay." 
1Corinthians8:4 Hala boro ga hima ka haŋ kaŋ i sarga tooru se ŋwa binde, to: iri ga bay kaŋ tooru manti hay fo no ndunnya ra. Irikoy kulu si no mo kala afollonka." 
1Corinthians8:5 Zama baa da wo kaŋ yaŋ se i ga ne de-koyyaŋ* go no, d'i go beena ra, wala ganda, mate kaŋ de-koy boobo da koy boobo go no," 
1Corinthians8:6 kulu nda yaadin iri wo se Irikoy folloŋ no go no, Baaba no. Hay kulu, a do no a fun, iri mo go a se. Rabbi folloŋ mo go no, Yesu Almasihu no, kaŋ a do hay kulu bara. Iri mo, a do no iri ga funa." 
1Corinthians8:7 Amma bayray woodin si boro kulu do. Boro fooyaŋ mo, zama i doona tooru hala hõ, i go ga _hamey din|_ ŋwa danga hay fo no kaŋ i sarga tooru se, hal i biney go g'i foy zama i go ga miila kaŋ ngey go ga ngey boŋ ziibandi, za kaŋ i sinda gaabi." 
1Corinthians8:8 Amma ŋwaari fo si te iri se sabbu Irikoy jine. Da iri man'a ŋwa, iri si zabu. D'iri n'a ŋwa mo, iri si tonton." 
1Corinthians8:9 Amma araŋ ma haggoy hal araŋ dabaro din ma si ciya taali teeyaŋ sabaabu boro kaŋ sinda gaabi se. 
1Corinthians8:10 Zama nda boro fo di nin kaŋ gonda bayray, ni go ga goro ka ŋwa tooru windi ra, manti nga wo kaŋ sinda gaabi kaŋ a bina g'a foy mo, a ga yaaru no ka koy ka ŋwa haŋ kaŋ i sarga tooru se?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ni bayra do mo no, nga kaŋ sinda gaabi ga halaci, nya-ize no kaŋ sabbay se Almasihu bu." 
1Corinthians8:12 Waati kaŋ araŋ go ga taali te nya-izey se ya-cine, k'i biney kaŋ sinda gaabi kaŋ g'i foy maray, kulu araŋ go ga zunubi te Almasihu se nooya." 
1Corinthians8:13 Yaadin gaa, da ŋwaari no g'ay nya-izo daŋ a ma taali te, ay si ham kulu ŋwa hal abada, zama ay ma s'ay nya-izo daŋ a ma taali te." 
1Corinthians9:1 Manti ay wo burcini no? Manti ay wo diya no? Manti ay wo di iri Rabbi Yesu? Manti araŋ wo ay goyo no Rabbi ra? 
1Corinthians9:2 Da boro fooyaŋ do ay wo manti diya no, kulu nda yaadin araŋ do ay ya diya no, zama araŋ wo ay diyataray kawaatimi no Rabbi ra." 
1Corinthians9:3 Woone ga ti ay tuyaŋo kaŋ ay g'ay boŋ fansa sambu, borey se kaŋ yaŋ go g'ay gosi." 
1Corinthians9:4 Manti iri gonda fondo iri ma du ŋwa-da-haŋ? 
1Corinthians9:5 Manti iri gonda fondo mo iri ma naaru nda wande kaŋ ga ti cimandiko, danga mate kaŋ diya cindey go ga te, da Rabbi nya izey, da Kefas mo?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Wala in da Barnaba, iri hinne no ka sinda fondo iri ma si goy te?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Sooje woofo no go soojetaray ra kaŋ ga nga boŋ bana? May no ga reyzin* kali tilam kaŋ si a albarka ŋwa? May no ga alman kuru kaŋ si kuro wa haŋ? 
1Corinthians9:8 Wala ay go ga hayey din ci Adam-izey ciyaŋ hinne boŋ no? Manti yaadin no Tawreto* mo ci? 
1Corinthians9:9 Zama Musa asariya* ra i n'a hantum ka ne: «Yeeji kaŋ go ga kara, ni ma si takunkum daŋ a gaa.» E day! Yeejey _hinne|_ no Irikoy ga haggoy d'a?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Wala manti daahir iri sabbay se no a na woodin ci? Oho me, iri sabbay se no i n'a hantum. Zama boro kaŋ go ga far, a ga hima a ma far da beeje. Boro kaŋ go ga kara mo, a ma beeje daŋ kaŋ nga ga du a ra." 
1Corinthians9:11 D'iri na Biya Hanno harey duma araŋ se, sohõ d'iri g'araŋ ndunnya harey wi, woodin hari bambata no, wala?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Hala boro fooyaŋ ga du dabari wo araŋ boŋ, manti iri banda ciine no? Kulu nda yaadin, iri mana goy dabaro din boŋ, amma iri go ga suuru nda hay kulu, hal iri ma si Almasihu Baaru Hanna ganji jina-koyyaŋ." 
1Corinthians9:13 Araŋ mana bay no kaŋ borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga hananyaŋ goy te Irikoy windo ra, i go ga du ngey ŋwaaro Irikoy windo do? Borey mo kaŋ yaŋ go ga sargay* feema goyo te, i go ga du ngey baa feema wane gaa." 
1Corinthians9:14 Yaadin mo no, Rabbi waadu borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga Baaru Hanna waazu se, i ma funa nda Baaru Hanna waazo din." 
1Corinthians9:15 Amma ay mana goy da hayey din kulu. Ay si ga woone yaŋ hantum hala borey ma te ay se yaadin bo. Doŋ ay ma bu, a ga bisa boro fo m'ay farhã wo ye yaamo." 
1Corinthians9:16 Zama d'ay go ga Baaru Hanna waazu, manti fooma hari no ay se. A ga tilas ay gaa no. Zama kaari ay, d'ay si Baaru Hanna waazu!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Zama d'ay go ga woodin te ay yadda boŋ, kulu ay gonda alhakku. Amma za kaŋ manti nd'ay boŋ miila no, haŋ kaŋ Irikoy talfi ay gaa day no ay goono ga te." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ifo binde ga ti ay alhakko? Nga neeya: waati kaŋ ay go ga Baaru Hanna waazu, ay ma si hay kulu ceeci araŋ gaa, zama ay ma si goy da dabaro kaŋ go ay se Baaru Hanna ra." 
1Corinthians9:19 Zama baa kaŋ ay ya burcini no, ay n'ay boŋ te boro kulu se bannya hal ay ma du boro boobo ka tonton." 
1Corinthians9:20 Yahudancey* se ay ciya danga Yahudance, hal ay ma du Yahudancey. Borey kaŋ yaŋ go asariya* ganayaŋ ra se, ay ciya sanda asariya ganako, (baa kaŋ ay si asariya fonda ra), hal ay ma du asariya ganakoy." 
1Corinthians9:21 Borey kaŋ sinda asariya se, ay ciya sanda boro kaŋ sinda asariya, hal ay ma du ngey kaŋ yaŋ sinda asariya. (Manti danga ay si ga Irikoy asariya gana no bo, amma Almasihu asariya ganayaŋ ra n'ay go)." 
1Corinthians9:22 Londibuuney se ay ciya londibuuno hal ay ma du londibuuney. Borey kulu se, ay n'ay boŋ ye hay kulu, hala nda mate kaŋ cine no kulu ay ma afooyaŋ faaba." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ay go ga woone kulu te mo Baaru Hanna sabbay se, hal ay ma du baa Baaru Hanna albarka ra." 
1Corinthians9:24 Manti araŋ ga bay kaŋ borey kaŋ go ga zuru yoonay ra kulu go ga zuru no, amma boro folloŋ day no ga du ka yana? Yaadin gaa, araŋ ma zuru nda mate kaŋ gaa araŋ ga du ka yana." 
1Corinthians9:25 Boro kulu mo kaŋ go ga gurjay te foorey do, i ga hin ngey boŋ hay kulu ra. Borey din goono g'a te hal ngey ma du kobto boŋtobay kaŋ ga lakaw, amma iri wo go g'a te hal iri ma du boŋtobay kaŋ si halaci." 
1Corinthians9:26 Yaadin cine no ay go ga zuru nd'a, manti nda sikka. Yaadin mo no ay go ga kutubo te d'a, manti nda haw ra karyaŋ." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ay go g'ay gaahamo taabandi k'a daŋ tamtaray ra, zama a ma si te, waato kaŋ ay waazu afooyaŋ se, a banda i m'ay bumbo furu." 
1Corinthians10:1 Zama nya-izey, ay si ba araŋ ma jaŋ ka bay kaŋ iri kaayey kulu goro buru yuuma cire, ikulu na teeko daŋandi mo." 
1Corinthians10:2 Ikulu du baptisma Musa ra buro da teeko do. 
1Corinthians10:3 Ikulu na ŋwaari dumi folloŋ ŋwa kaŋ fun Irikoy do. 
1Corinthians10:4 Ikulu na hari dumi folloŋ haŋ mo kaŋ fun Irikoy do. Zama tondo kaŋ fun Irikoy do kaŋ go i banda din gaa no i haŋ. Tondo din mo ga ti Almasihu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Amma i boro boobo, Irikoy mana maa i kaani. A sabbay se no a n'i buukoy say-say ka furu ganjo ra." 
1Corinthians10:6 Hayey din binde bara misayaŋ iri se, hal iri ma si hari laaloyaŋ bini, mate kaŋ cine ngey wo bini." 
1Corinthians10:7 Araŋ ma si te tooru ganakoyaŋ mo, mate kaŋ cine i boro fooyaŋ te, mate kaŋ a go hantumante ka ne: «Jama goro ganda zama ngey ma ŋwa ka haŋ, i tun mo zama ngey ma fooru se.»" 
1Corinthians10:8 Iri ma si zina mo, mate kaŋ i boro fooyaŋ te. Zaari folloŋ ra i boro zambar waranka cindi hinza no bu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Iri ma si Rabbi si mo, mate kaŋ i boro fooyaŋ n'a si, gondey mo n'i halaci." 
1Corinthians10:10 Araŋ ma si jance mo, mate kaŋ i boro fooyaŋ te, i halaci mo halaciyankoyo do." 
1Corinthians10:11 Hayey din kulu te i gaa danga misayaŋ. I n'i hantum mo ka te iri se kaseetiyaŋ hari, iri kaŋ yaŋ zamaney toonandiyaŋ kaa iri gaa." 
1Corinthians10:12 Woodin sabbay se, boro kaŋ go ga tammahã nga go ga kay, a ma haggoy nga ma si kaŋ." 
1Corinthians10:13 Siyaŋ kulu mana du araŋ kala day wo kaŋ dumi ga kaa boro kulu gaa. Amma Irikoy ya naanaykoy no kaŋ si ta araŋ ma du siyaŋ kaŋ ga bisa araŋ hina, amma siyaŋo alwaato ra no a ga faaba fondo te araŋ se hal araŋ ma du ka hin a." 
1Corinthians10:14 Woodin sabbay se, ay baakoy, araŋ ma zuru tooru ganayaŋ se." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ay go ga salaŋ danga laakalkooniyaŋ se, araŋ ma guna haŋ kaŋ ay go ga ci." 
1Corinthians10:16 Gaasiya kaŋ ra albarka go, kaŋ se iri ga Irikoy sifa, manti nga no g'iri markasina da Almasihu kuro cabe? Buuru kunkuno kaŋ iri ga ceeri mo, manti nga no g'iri markasina da Almasihu gaahamo cabe?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Zama buuru kunkuni follonka go no, iri kaŋ ga ti iboobo, iri ciya gaaham folloŋ, zama iri kulu ga margu kunkuni follonka din gaa." 
1Corinthians10:18 Wa guna Israyla* kunda. Borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga sargayey ŋwa kaŋ i kande sargay feema do, manti i ga margu nda sargay feema no?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Yaadin gaa, ifo no ay go ga ne? Haŋ kaŋ i sarga tooru se ya hay fo no, wala tooru bumbo ya hay fo no? Abada!" 
1Corinthians10:20 Amma haŋ kaŋ dumi cindey go ga sarga toorey se, i go g'a sarga follayey se, manti Irikoy se no. Ay si ba mo araŋ ma margu nda follayey." 
1Corinthians10:21 Araŋ si hin ka Rabbi gaasiya haŋ, da follayey wano mo. Araŋ si hin ka margu Rabbi ŋwaaro do, da follayey wano mo." 
1Corinthians10:22 Wala iri go ga Irikoy zukku hal a ma canse? Iri ga bis'a gaabi no? 
1Corinthians10:23 Hay kulu ga halal, amma manti hay kulu no i ga hima ka te. Hay kulu ga halal, amma manti hay kulu no ga jina-koyyaŋ te." 
1Corinthians10:24 Boro kulu ma si nga boŋ nafa ceeci, amma day haŋ kaŋ ga nafa te nga gorokasin se." 
1Corinthians10:25 Hay kulu kaŋ fawakoy ga neera, araŋ m'a ŋwa. Araŋ ma si hãayaŋ kulu te bine lasaabu fonda ra." 
1Corinthians10:26 Zama «Ganda ya Rabbi wane no, nga nda hay kulu kaŋ go a ra.»" 
1Corinthians10:27 Da boro kaŋ mana cimandi n'araŋ ce ŋwaari se, araŋ yadda ka koy mo, to, ŋwaari kulu kaŋ i ga jisi araŋ jine, araŋ ma soobay k'a ŋwa. Araŋ ma si hãayaŋ kulu te bine lasaabu fonda ra." 
1Corinthians10:28 Amma da boro fo ci araŋ se ka ne: «I na woone sarga tooru se», araŋ ma s'a ŋwa, bora din kaŋ n'a cabe araŋ se sabbay se, da bine lasaabu sabbay se mo." 
1Corinthians10:29 Manti sanda ni bine lasaabo no ay go ga ne, amma day boro fa din wano. Zama ifo se no i g'ay hina neesi boro fo bine lasaabo boŋ?" 
1Corinthians10:30 D'ay go ga ŋwa da saabuyaŋ, ifo se no i g'ay jance nda hari laalo, hay fo boŋ kaŋ se ay na Irikoy saabu?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Yaadin gaa, d'araŋ go ga ŋwa, wala araŋ go ga haŋ, wala hay kulu kaŋ araŋ go ga te, kal araŋ ma ikulu te Irikoy darza se." 
1Corinthians10:32 Araŋ ma si ciya katiyaŋ hari Yahudancey, wala dumi cindey, wala Irikoy marga se." 
1Corinthians10:33 Wa ciya danga ay cine, mate kaŋ hay kulu ra ay go ga kaan boro kulu se. Ay s'ay boŋ nafa ceeci, amma boro boobo wane, hal i ma du faaba." 
1Corinthians11:1 Araŋ ma ciya ay dondonkoyaŋ, sanda mate kaŋ cine ay mo go Almasihu wane." 
1Corinthians11:2 Sohõ ay g'araŋ saabu kaŋ araŋ fongu nd'ay hay kulu ra. Araŋ go ga dondonandiyaŋey yaari mo, mate kaŋ cine ay n'i ci araŋ se." 
1Corinthians11:3 Amma ay ga ba araŋ ma faham nda woone: alboro kulu boŋo ga ti Almasihu, wayboro mo, a boŋo ga ti alboro, Almasihu mo, a boŋo ga ti Irikoy." 
1Corinthians11:4 Alboro kulu kaŋ go ga adduwa te, wala a go ga annabitaray te, d'a boŋo go daabante, a go ga nga koyo kaynandi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Amma wayboro kulu kaŋ go ga adduwa te, wala a go ga annabitaray te, d'a boŋo si daabante, nga mo go ga nga koyo kaynandi, zama a ga saba nda wayboro kaŋ na nga boŋo cabu." 
1Corinthians11:6 Zama da wayboro si nga boŋo daabu, a ma nga boŋ hamno dumbu mo. Amma da haawi hari no wayboro se a ma nga boŋ hamno dumbu wala a m'a cabu, kal a ma nga boŋo daabu." 
1Corinthians11:7 Zama alboro mana hima ka nga boŋo daabu, za kaŋ nga wo Irikoy alhaalo no, Irikoy darza mo no. Amma wayboro ga ti alboro darza." 
1Corinthians11:8 Zama i mana alboro kaa wayboro gaa, amma wayboro no i kaa alboro gaa." 
1Corinthians11:9 Woodin banda, i mana alboro taka wayboro sabbay se, amma day wayboro no i taka alboro sabbay se." 
1Corinthians11:10 Woodin sabbay se _da|_ malaykey sabbay se _mo|_, a ga hima wayboro ma bara nda dabaro kaŋ cire a go seeda nga boŋo gaa." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kulu nda yaadin, Rabbi do wayboro si bara alboro baa si, alboro mo si bara wayboro baa si." 
1Corinthians11:12 Zama mate kaŋ cine i na wayboro kaa alboro gaa, yaadin mo no i ga alboro hay wayboro do, woone yaŋ kulu mo, Irikoy do no i fun." 
1Corinthians11:13 Araŋ ma sanno dumbu araŋ boŋ se, hal a ga hima wayboro kaŋ mana daabu ma adduwa te Irikoy gaa?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Manti Adam-ize alhaalo bumbo g'araŋ dondonandi kaŋ, da alboro boŋ hamno ga ku, woodin haawi hari no a se?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Amma da wayboro gonda boŋ hamni kuuku, a darza hari no. Zama Irikoy na boŋ hamni no a se, a ma ciya a boŋo daabuyaŋ hari." 
1Corinthians11:16 Amma da boro fo ga ba nga ma kakaw woodin boŋ, iri nda Irikoy margey wo sinda alaada _kaŋ waana|_ woodin." 
1Corinthians11:17 Amma lordo wo kaŋ ay g'araŋ no ra, ay s'araŋ saabu. Zama manti araŋ ma hanse se, amma hasaraw se no araŋ go ga margu." 
1Corinthians11:18 Sintina day, ay maa fay-fayyaŋ go araŋ game ra waati kaŋ araŋ ga margu Almasihu marga ra. Ay ga jara cimandi mo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Zama haciika a ga tilas no wurdi waani-waani ma bara araŋ game ra, hala borey kaŋ yaŋ gonda cimi araŋ game ra ma bangay." 
1Corinthians11:20 Yaadin gaa, waati kaŋ araŋ ga margu nangu folloŋ, manti Rabbi ŋwaaro no araŋ go ga ŋwa." 
1Corinthians11:21 Zama ŋwaaro do boro kulu ga cahã ka nga wano ŋwa. Boro fo ga maa haray, afo mo ga haŋ ka bugu." 
1Corinthians11:22 Mate no? Araŋ sinda fuyaŋ kaŋ ra araŋ ga ŋwa ka haŋ no? Wala araŋ go ga donda Irikoy marga, ka borey kaŋ gaa jaŋay go haawandi? Ifo no ay ga ne araŋ se? Y'araŋ saabu nda woone? Ay si." 
1Corinthians11:23 Zama Rabbi do no ay du woone kaŋ ay n'araŋ no, kaŋ ga ti: Cino kaŋ ra i na Rabbi Yesu nooyandi, a na buuru sambu." 
1Corinthians11:24 Waato kaŋ a saabu, a banda a n'a ceeri-ceeri ka ne: «Woone ga ti ay gaahamo kaŋ i go ga pati araŋ sabbay se. Araŋ ma woone te ka fongu nd'ay.»" 
1Corinthians11:25 Yaadin mo no a na gaasiya sambu hawra banda ka ne: «Gaasiyo wo ga ti alkawli tajo ay kuro ra. Alwaati kulu kaŋ araŋ goono g'a haŋ, araŋ ma woone te ka fongu nd'ay.»" 
1Corinthians11:26 Zama alwaati kulu kaŋ araŋ ga buuro wo ŋwa ka gaasiya wo haŋ mo, araŋ go ga Rabbi buuyaŋo waazu no hal a ga kaa." 
1Corinthians11:27 Boro kulu mo kaŋ ga Rabbi buuro ŋwa, wala a g'a gaasiya haŋ da fondo kaŋ mana hima nd'a, bora din gonda taali Rabbi gaahamo d'a kuro do." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kala boro kulu ma nga boŋ neesi, woodin banda a ma ŋwa buuro gaa ka haŋ gaasiya gaa." 
1Corinthians11:29 Zama boro kaŋ go ga ŋwa ka haŋ, d'a si Rabbi gaahamo fayanka, ciiti no a go ga candi nga boŋ gaa, ŋwaayaŋo da haŋyaŋo din do." 
1Corinthians11:30 Woodin sabbay se no, araŋ game ra boro boobo te londibuunoyaŋ, i jante, iboobo mo kani." 
1Corinthians11:31 Amma d'iri g'iri boŋ neesi, doŋ Rabbi si ciiti nd'iri." 
1Corinthians11:32 Waato kaŋ Rabbi g'iri ciiti binde, a go g'iri gooji no, zama nga ma s'iri zeeri ndunnya banda." 
1Corinthians11:33 Yaadin gaa, ay nya-izey, waati kaŋ cine araŋ ga margu zama araŋ ma ŋwa se, kal araŋ ma care batu." 
1Corinthians11:34 Da boro fo haray, a ma ŋwa za fu, zama araŋ marguyaŋo ma si ciya ciiti daliili. Sanney kaŋ cindi, ay g'i hanse waati kaŋ ay ga kaa." 
1Corinthians12:1 Sohõ, nya-izey, Biya Hanno _nooyaŋey|_ ciine ra, ngey neeya: Ay si ba araŋ ma jaŋ ka bay i gaa." 
1Corinthians12:2 Araŋ bay kaŋ waato kaŋ araŋ goro dumi cindey boroyaŋ, i n'araŋ darandi tooru beebey do, sanda mate kaŋ i n'araŋ candi nd'a." 
1Corinthians12:3 Woodin sabbay se no ay g'araŋ fahamandi nda woone: boro kulu si no kaŋ ga salaŋ Irikoy Biya do ka ne: «Yesu ya laalante no!» Boro kulu si no mo kaŋ ga hin ka ne: «Yesu ya Rabbi no!» kala day Biya Hanno do. 
1Corinthians12:4 Nooyaŋ waani-waani yaŋ go no, amma Biya _Hanno|_ follonka no." 
1Corinthians12:5 Saajawyaŋ waani-waani yaŋ mo go no, amma Rabbi follonka no." 
1Corinthians12:6 Goy dumi waani-waani yaŋ mo go no, amma Irikoy follonka no, nga kaŋ ga hay kulu goy boro kulu ra." 
1Corinthians12:7 Amma boro fo kulu se Biya _Hanno|_ na nooyaŋ kaŋ ga nga bangandi no boro kulu nafa se. 
1Corinthians12:8 Zama boro fo du laakal sanni Biya _Hanno|_ do, afo mo du bayray sanni Biya _Hanno|_ follonka din do." 
1Corinthians12:9 Boro fo mo koyne du cimbeeri Biya _Hanno|_ follonka do, afo mo du baani nooyaŋ dabari Biya _Hanno|_ follonka din do." 
1Corinthians12:10 Afo mo du dabari goy teeyaŋ hin, afo mo annabitaray teeyaŋ, afo mo biyey fayankayaŋ, afo mo ciine waani-waani yaŋ, afo mo koyne ciine feeriyaŋ." 
1Corinthians12:11 Amma hayey din kulu, Biya _Hanno|_ follonka din no g'i te, a g'i fay ka zaban boro fo kulu se, mate kaŋ a ga ba." 
1Corinthians12:12 Zama mate kaŋ cine gaaham folloŋ gonda jare boobo, amma gaaham jarey kulu, kaŋ ga ti iboobo, i ga te gaaham folloŋ, yaadin mo no Almasihu go." 
1Corinthians12:13 Zama Biya _Hanno|_ folloŋ do no i na baptisma te iri kulu se gaaham folloŋ ra, da Yahudancey no wala Garekey no, da bannyey no wala burciney no, i n'iri kulu haŋandi mo da Biya _Hanno|_ folloŋ." 
1Corinthians12:14 Zama gaahamo bumbo manti jare folloŋ no, amma iboobo no." 
1Corinthians12:15 Da ce ne: «Za kaŋ ay wo manti kambe, yaadin gaa ay manti gaahamo wane» , woodin si naŋ a ma si ciya gaahamo wane." 
1Corinthians12:16 Da hanga mo ne: «Za kaŋ ay wo manti mo, yaadin gaa ay manti gaahamo wane» , woodin si naŋ a ma si ciya gaahamo wane." 
1Corinthians12:17 Da gaaham kulu ga ti mo, man hanga maayaŋ? D'a kulu ga ti maayaŋ, man niine maniyaŋ?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Amma sohõ Irikoy na jare fo kulu daŋ gaahamo ra mate kaŋ a ga ba. 
1Corinthians12:19 D'i kulu jare folloŋ no, man gaahamo?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Day sohõ jare boobo go no, amma gaaham folloŋ no." 
1Corinthians12:21 Yaadin gaa, mo si du ka ne kambe se: «Ay sinda ni muraadu,» wala boŋ ma ne cey se: «Ay sinda araŋ muraadu.»" 
1Corinthians12:22 Sanku fa gaaham jarey kaŋ go sanda i jaŋ gaabi, i ga tilas no." 
1Corinthians12:23 Woodin banda, wo kaŋ yaŋ iri ga guna sanda i sinda beeray, iri g'i beerandi ka tonton. Iri gaaham jarey mo kaŋ gunayaŋ si boori, iri g'i sutura ka tonton," 
1Corinthians12:24 amma wo kaŋ yaŋ ga boori si laami nda hay kulu. Amma Irikoy na gaahamo margu care banda ka beeray tonton jara kaŋ sinda gaa," 
1Corinthians12:25 hala fay-fayyaŋ ma si bara gaahamo ra, amma jarey kulu ma haggoy da care sabayaŋ ra." 
1Corinthians12:26 Da jare fo go taabi ra, jarey kulu go ga maa taabi a banda. Da jare fo du darza mo, jarey kulu ga farhã a banda." 
1Corinthians12:27 Araŋ binde, araŋ ga ti Almasihu gaahamo, araŋ boro fo kulu mo te jare fo a ra." 
1Corinthians12:28 Irikoy mo na boro fooyaŋ daŋ Almasihu marga ra: sintina, diyey; ihinkanta, annabey*; ihinzanta, dondonandikoy. Woodin banda, dabari goyey, gaa baani nooyaŋey hina, da gaakasinayey, da mayrayey, da ciine waani-waani yaŋ." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ikulu diyayaŋ no, wala? Wala ikulu annabiyaŋ no? Wala ikulu dondonandikoyaŋ no? Wala ikulu ga dabari goy te no?" 
1Corinthians12:30 Wala ikulu gonda baani nooyaŋ hina no? Wala ikulu ga salaŋ da ciine waani-waani yaŋ no? Wala ikulu ga ciine waani-waani yaŋ bare no? 
1Corinthians12:31 Amma araŋ ma nooyaŋey kaŋ ga boori nda ikulu bini. Day sohõ ay ga fondo cabe araŋ se kaŋ ga bisa ikulu. 
1Corinthians13:1 D'ay ga salaŋ da Adam-izey da malaykey deeney, day ay sinda baakasinay, ay ciya danga guuru-say kaŋ ga hẽ, wala can-caŋ kaŋ ga kosongu." 
1Corinthians13:2 Baa d'ay du annabitaray nooyaŋ, hal ay ga gundu kulu nda bayray kulu bay mo, d'ay gonda cimbeeri kulu hal ay ga tondi kuukuyaŋ ganandi, nga no ay sinda baakasinay, ay ya yaamo no." 
1Corinthians13:3 Baa d'ay n'ay arzaka kulu fay ka zaban alfukaarey se, d'ay g'ay gaahamo no mo hal i m'a ton, nga no ay sinda baakasinay, a si hay kulu hanse ay se." 
1Corinthians13:4 Baakasinay ga bara nda suuru kuuku, baakasinay gonda rongome. Baakasinay si canse. A si fooma, a si te boŋbeeray mo." 
1Corinthians13:5 Baakasinay si te haŋ kaŋ mana hagu, a si nga boŋ nafa ceeci, a baa si nda zukkuyaŋ, a si laala lasaabu." 
1Corinthians13:6 Baakasinay si farhã da cimi-jaŋay, amma a ga farhã cimi se." 
1Corinthians13:7 Baakasinay gonda bongu-daabay hay kulu ra, a ga ihanno cimandi hay kulu ra, a ga beeje hay kulu se, a ga suuru nda hay kulu." 
1Corinthians13:8 Baakasinay si gaze abada. Amma annabitarayey ga ban, ciine waani-waaney ga ban, bayray mo ga ban." 
1Corinthians13:9 Zama iri ga bay kayna, iri ga annabitaray jare te." 
1Corinthians13:10 Amma waati kaŋ toonanta ga kaa, gaa no jare-jara ga ban." 
1Corinthians13:11 Waato kaŋ ay go zanka, ay go ga salaŋ sanda zanka cine, ay go ga miila sanda zanka cine, ay go ga lasaabu sanda zanka cine. Amma sohõ kaŋ ay te albeeri, ay na zankataray harey jisi." 
1Corinthians13:12 Sohõ iri go ga di da kubay-kubay sanda diji ra cine, amma alwaati din iri ga di mo-da-mo. Sohõ ay ga bay kayna, amma alwaati din ay ga bay gumo mate kaŋ cine Irikoy n'ay bay gumo." 
1Corinthians13:13 Sohõ binde cimbeeri da beeje da baakasinay, ihinza din no ka bara. Amma i ra wo kaŋ bisa ikulu ga ti baakasinay." 
1Corinthians14:1 Araŋ ma anniya haw ka baakasinay di a ma boori. Amma araŋ ma beeje nda Biya Hanno nooyaŋey mo, sanku fa annabitaray teeyaŋ." 
1Corinthians14:2 Zama boro kaŋ ga salaŋ da ciine waani, Irikoy se no a go ga salaŋ, manti borey se, za kaŋ boro kulu si faham d'a, day Biya _Hanno|_ do a go ga gunduyaŋ salaŋ." 
1Corinthians14:3 Amma boro kaŋ go ga annabitaray te ga jina-koyyaŋ, da bakaraw, da bine gaabandiyaŋ sanni salaŋ borey se." 
1Corinthians14:4 Boro kaŋ go ga salaŋ nda ciine waani, nga boŋ se no a ga jina-koyyaŋ te, amma boro kaŋ go ga annabitaray te, Almasihu marga se no a ga jina-koyyaŋ te." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ay ga ba araŋ boro kulu ma salaŋ nda ciine waani-waani yaŋ, sanku fa annabitaray teeyaŋ. Zama boro kaŋ go ga annabitaray te, a bisa boro kaŋ go ga salaŋ nda ciine waani-waani yaŋ, da manti a g'a feeri no hala marga ma du ka koy jina." 
1Corinthians14:6 Sohõ binde, nya-izey, d'ay kaa araŋ do ka salaŋ da ciine waani-waani yaŋ, ifo no ay ga hanse araŋ se, da manti ay ga salaŋ araŋ se da bangandiyaŋ fo, wala bayray, wala annabitaray, wala dondonandiyaŋ?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Baa hayey kaŋ sinda fundi kaŋ boro g'i kar, da seese no wala moolo no, d'i s'a jinda fayanka, mate boro ga te ka bay haŋ kaŋ seesa wala moola ga ba ka ci?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Zama d'i na hilli kar kaŋ jinda mana kay ka boori, mate no boro ga te ka soola wongu se?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Yaadin mo no araŋ bumbey, d'araŋ deeney si sanni kaŋ i ga tara ka faham d'a salaŋ, mate no i ga te ka bay haŋ kaŋ araŋ goono ga ci? Zama araŋ goono ga salaŋ hawo ra." 
1Corinthians14:10 Baa kaŋ jinde waani-waani boobo go ndunnya ra, i afo kulu si jaŋ haŋ kaŋ ga fahamandi." 
1Corinthians14:11 Amma d'ay si faham d'a jinda, ay go sanda mebaraw cine bora kaŋ salaŋ se. Nga mo kaŋ go ga salaŋ ga hima ay se mebaraw." 
1Corinthians14:12 Yaadin gaa araŋ wo, za kaŋ araŋ gonda anniya araŋ ma du Biya Hanno nooyaŋey, kala araŋ ma ceeci nda baayaŋ wo kaŋ yaŋ ga naŋ Almasihu marga ma koy da jina." 
1Corinthians14:13 Woodin se no boro kaŋ go ga salaŋ nda ciine waani, a ma Irikoy ŋwaaray hala nga ma du k'a feeri." 
1Corinthians14:14 Zama d'ay te adduwa ciine waani ra, ay biya go ga salaŋ amma ay fahama mana du albarka." 
1Corinthians14:15 Mate no? Ay ga adduwa te da biya, ay ga adduwa te da fahamay mo. Ay ga baytu te da biya, ay ga baytu te da fahamay mo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Da manti yaadin, da ni go ga saabu nda biya, mate no boro kaŋ si waani ga te ka ne: «Amin!» ni saabuyaŋo banda, za kaŋ a si bay haŋ kaŋ no ni go ga ci?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Zama nin wo, daahir ni go ga saabu ihanna dumo, amma bora din mana du jina-koyyaŋ." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ay ga Irikoy saabu kaŋ ay ga salaŋ da ciine waani-waani yaŋ ka bisa araŋ kulu. 
1Corinthians14:19 Kulu nda yaadin, Almasihu marga ra a ga bisa ay se ay ma sann'ize gu ci d'ay fahama, ya du ka cindey dondonandi, ka bisa ay ma sann'ize zambar way te da ciine waani." 
1Corinthians14:20 Nya-izey, fahamay ra araŋ ma si ciya zankayaŋ. Amma laala do haray araŋ ma ciya zanka kaynayaŋ, fahamay do haray mo araŋ ma te albeeriyaŋ." 
1Corinthians14:21 Tawretu* ra i n'a hantum kaŋ Rabbi ne: «Ay ga salaŋ dumo wo se da ciine waani-waaney, da mebarawey meyey, amma kulu nda yaadin i ga wangu ka maa.»" 
1Corinthians14:22 Yaadin gaa, ciine waani-waaney ga ciya alaama borey kaŋ yaŋ mana cimandi se, manti cimandikoy se. Amma annabitaray ga ciya alaama cimandikoy se, manti borey kaŋ yaŋ mana cimandi se." 
1Corinthians14:23 Da Almasihu marga kulu margu care banda, nga no boro kulu ga salaŋ da ciine waani-waani mo, da boro fooyaŋ furo mo kaŋ mana caw, wala kaŋ mana cimandi, manti i ga ne araŋ follo no?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Amma d'araŋ kulu go ga annabitaray te, nga no boro fo furo mo kaŋ mana cimandi wala kaŋ mana caw, annabitaray sanney kulu g'a zeeri, ikulu g'a neesi," 
1Corinthians14:25 a bina gundey mo ga bangay. Nga mo, kal a ma kaŋ ganda birante ka sududu Irikoy se ka seeda kaŋ daahir Irikoy go araŋ game ra." 
1Corinthians14:26 Yaadin gaa, mate no a ga bara nd'a, nya-izey? Waati kaŋ araŋ ga margu care banda, boro fo kulu gonda zabura fo, wala dondonandiyaŋ fo, wala bangandiyaŋ fo, wala ciine waani fo, wala a feeriji fo. Wa naŋ hay kulu ma te jina-koyyaŋ se." 
1Corinthians14:27 Da boro ga salaŋ da ciine waani, kala ngey boro hinka, wala a ma si bisa ihinza. I ma salaŋ afo-fo, boro fo mo ma feeri." 
1Corinthians14:28 Amma da sanni feeriko si no, kala bora ma dangay Almasihu marga ra, a ma salaŋ nga boŋ se da Irikoy se mo." 
1Corinthians14:29 Annabey mo ma salaŋ, ngey boro hinka wala ihinza, cindey mo ma sanney neesi." 
1Corinthians14:30 Amma da boro fo kaŋ go ga goro noodin du bangandiyaŋ, bora kaŋ go ga salaŋ ma dangay." 
1Corinthians14:31 Zama araŋ kulu ga du ka annabitaray te afo-fo, hala boro kulu ma dondon, ikulu ma du yaamaryaŋ mo." 
1Corinthians14:32 Annabi kulu biya mo go nga bumbo dabaro ra," 
1Corinthians14:33 zama Irikoy ya manti kosongu wane no, amma laakal kanay wane no. Mate kaŋ a bara hanantey margey kulu ra," 
1Corinthians14:34 wa naŋ wayborey ma dangay Almasihu margey ra, zama i mana yadda i se i ma salaŋ, amma i ma ngey boŋ ye ganda, mate kaŋ cine Tawreto* ci." 
1Corinthians14:35 D'i ga ba ngey ma du boŋ-feeray mo, kal i ma ngey kurnyey hã fu, zama haawi hari no wayborey ma salaŋ Almasihu marga ra." 
1Corinthians14:36 Mate no? Araŋ do no Irikoy sanno fun? Wala araŋ do hinne no a kaa? 
1Corinthians14:37 Da boro fo ga miila nga ya annabi no, wala boro kaŋ gonda Biya Hanno nooyaŋ, kal a ma woone bay: hayo kaŋ ay go ga hantum araŋ se ya Irikoy lordo no." 
1Corinthians14:38 Amma da boro fo baa si nd'a, i ma saalay kaa bora din gaa." 
1Corinthians14:39 Yaadin gaa, ay nya-izey, wa beeje nda annabitaray teeyaŋ, wa si wangu mo borey ma salaŋ da ciine waani-waani yaŋ." 
1Corinthians14:40 Amma hay kulu ma te da laakal, i m'a te nga fonda boŋ mo." 
1Corinthians15:1 Sohõ, nya-izey, ay g'araŋ fongandi nda Baaru Hanna kaŋ ay waazu araŋ se, wo kaŋ araŋ ta, kaŋ ra araŋ go ga kay mo." 
1Corinthians15:2 A do mo no araŋ go ga du faaba, d'araŋ go ga sanno kaŋ ay waazu araŋ se gaay gumo. Da manti araŋ cimandi fahamay si." 
1Corinthians15:3 Zama ay no araŋ se haya kaŋ nafa bisa ikulu, kaŋ ay bumbo mo ta. Nga neeya: Almasihu bu iri zunubey sabbay se, sanda mate kaŋ i hantum Irikoy Tira Hanney ra," 
1Corinthians15:4 i n'a fiji, Irikoy n'a tunandi mo zaari hinzanta hane sanda mate kaŋ i hantum Irikoy Tira Hanney ra." 
1Corinthians15:5 A bangay Kefas se, waato din gaa talibi way cindi hinka se." 
1Corinthians15:6 Woodin banda a bangay nya-ize kaŋ bisa zangu gu se saaya folloŋ ra, kaŋ i baayaŋ kulu ga funa hala hõ, amma afooyaŋ jin ka kani." 
1Corinthians15:7 Waato din gaa a bangay Yakuba se, gaa diyey kulu se." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ikulu banda gaa, a bangay ay mo se, kaŋ go sanda booma cine." 
1Corinthians15:9 Zama ay ya diyey koda no, kaŋ a mana hima baa i ma ne ay se diya, za kaŋ ay na Irikoy marga gurzugandi." 
1Corinthians15:10 Amma Irikoy gomno do no ay go mate kaŋ ay bara. A gomno mo, kaŋ a n'ay no mana goro yaamo, amma ay goy ka bisa i kulu. Day manti ay no, amma Irikoy gomno kaŋ go ay banda no." 
1Corinthians15:11 Yaadin gaa, d'ay no wala da ngey no, woone no iri go ga waazu, nga mo no araŋ cimandi." 
1Corinthians15:12 Amma d'i go ga waazu ka ne Almasihu tun ka fun buukoy game ra, mate no araŋ boro fooyaŋ ga te ka ne buukoy tunandiyaŋ si no?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Da buukoy tunandiyaŋ si no, yaadin gaa Almasihu mo mana tun." 
1Corinthians15:14 Da mo Almasihu mana tun, iri waazuyaŋo ya yaamo no, araŋ cimbeero mo yaamo no." 
1Corinthians15:15 Koyne mo, i n'iri gar tangari seedakoyaŋ Irikoy boŋ. Zama iri seeda ka ne Irikoy na Almasihu tunandi. Amma da buukoy tunandiyaŋ si no, Irikoy man'a tunandi." 
1Corinthians15:16 Zama nda buukoy tunandiyaŋ si no, yaadin gaa Irikoy mana Almasihu mo tunandi." 
1Corinthians15:17 Da Irikoy mana Almasihu tunandi, yaadin gaa araŋ cimbeero ya yaamo no, hala hõ mo araŋ go araŋ zunubey ra." 
1Corinthians15:18 Koyne, borey kaŋ yaŋ kani Almasihu fonda ra, i halaci." 
1Corinthians15:19 D'iri gonda beeje Almasihu ra fundi wo ra hinne, yaadin gaa iri te bakaraw hari yaŋ ka bisa boro kulu." 
1Corinthians15:20 Amma haciika Irikoy na Almasihu tunandi ka kaa buukoy game ra. A te boŋ-jina borey kaŋ yaŋ go ga kani game ra. 
1Corinthians15:21 Zama za kaŋ boro do no buuyaŋ kaa, boro do mo no buukoy tunandiyaŋ kaa." 
1Corinthians15:22 Zama mate kaŋ cine Adamu ra boro kulu go ga bu, yaadin mo no Almasihu ra ikulu ga funa." 
1Corinthians15:23 Amma boro kulu nda nga nango no sasara ra: sintina Almasihu kaŋ ga ti boŋ-jina, waato din gaa Almasihu waney, alwaati kaŋ a ga kaa." 
1Corinthians15:24 Gaa no bananta _ga kaa|_, waati kaŋ Almasihu na koytara ye Baaba Irikoy se, saaya kaŋ a jin ka mayray kulu da hin kulu da koytaray kulu tuusu." 
1Corinthians15:25 Zama a ga tilas no Almasihu ma koytaray ŋwa, hal a ma nga ibarey kulu daŋ nga cey cire." 
1Corinthians15:26 Ibare bananta kaŋ a ga tuusu mo ga ti buuyaŋ. 
1Corinthians15:27 Zama: «Irikoy na hay kulu daŋ a cey cire.» Amma waato kaŋ a ne nga na hay kulu daŋ a _cey|_ cire, _danga Almasihu wane nooya|_, a go taray kwaaray kaŋ Irikoy kaŋ n'i daŋ a mayra ra si a ra." 
1Corinthians15:28 Amma waati kaŋ Irikoy na hay kulu daŋ Izo mayra ra ka ban, gaa no Izo bumbo ga nga boŋ ye ganda a se kaŋ na hay kulu daŋ a mayra ra, hala Irikoy ma bara a kulu hay kulu ra." 
1Corinthians15:29 Da manti yaadin no, ifo no borey wo ga te kaŋ se i go ga baptisma te buukoy se? Da buukoy si tun da cimi, ifo se no i go ga te borey din se baptisma buukoy sabbay se?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ifo se mo no iri ga kay kataru ra saaya kulu? 
1Corinthians15:31 Haciika, nya-izey, ay go buuyaŋ me gaa han kulu, ay ga woone daahirandi ay farhã boŋ kaŋ ay gonda iri Rabbi Almasihu Yesu do araŋ sabbay se." 
1Corinthians15:32 Da Adam-ize miila boŋ no ay tangam da ganji hamey Afasos ra, man ay riiba? Da buukoy si tun kala «iri ma ŋwa, iri ma haŋ zama suba no iri ga bu!»" 
1Corinthians15:33 Wa s'araŋ boŋ darandi! Hangasinay laalo ga daa hanno halaci. 
1Corinthians15:34 Araŋ ma laakal ye mate kaŋ a ga hima nd'a gaa, ka fay da zunubi, zama boro fooyaŋ si Irikoy bay. Ay ga woodin ci hala haawi m'araŋ di." 
1Corinthians15:35 Amma boro fo ga ne: «Mate no buukoy ga tun d'a? Gaaham woofo dumi mo no i ga kaa d'a?» 
1Corinthians15:36 Nin saamo! Haŋ kaŋ ni bumbo ga duma, a si fun bo kala nd'a bu jina." 
1Corinthians15:37 Haŋ kaŋ ni go ga duma mo gurayze koonu no, hambara alkama no, hambara dum'ize fo no. Amma wo kaŋ ga fun si hima gurayzo kaŋ ni duma." 
1Corinthians15:38 Amma Irikoy g'a no a himando da mate kaŋ nga miila, dumar'ize dumi kulu nda nga bumbo himando." 
1Corinthians15:39 Manti basi kulu mo no ga saba nda care. Zama boro basi go waani, alman wane go waani, curo wane go waani, hamisa wane mo go waani." 
1Corinthians15:40 Beene kaarey go no, da ndunnya gaahamey mo. Amma beene waney darza go waani, ndunnya waney darza mo go waani." 
1Corinthians15:41 Wayna gonda nga darza, hando darza go waani, handariyayzey darza go waani. Baa handariyayzey darza mo ga waana nda care." 
1Corinthians15:42 Yaadin mo no buukoy tunyaŋo ga te d'a: i ga gaaham duma fumbi ra, Irikoy g'a tunandi haŋ kaŋ si hin ka fumbu!" 
1Corinthians15:43 I g'a duma kayna ra, Irikoy g'a tunandi nda darza. I g'a duma londibuunay ra, Irikoy g'a tunandi dabarikooni!" 
1Corinthians15:44 I g'a duma Adam-ize gaaham, Irikoy g'a tunandi biya wane. Adam-ize gaaham go no, biya wane mo go no." 
1Corinthians15:45 Yaadin no i n'a hantum ka ne: «Alboro sintina, Adamu ciya takahari kaŋ gonda fundi.» Adamu bananta mo ciya biya kaŋ ga fundi no." 
1Corinthians15:46 Amma biya wane mana te sintina, kala day Adam-ize gaaham, woodin banda kala biya wane." 
1Corinthians15:47 Irikoy na alboro sintina kaa laabu gaa, laabu no. Boro hinkanta Rabbi no kaŋ fun beene." 
1Corinthians15:48 Mate kaŋ cine bora kaŋ i te da laabu bara, yaadin no a waney mo go. Mate kaŋ cine beene bora bara, yaadin no a waney mo go." 
1Corinthians15:49 Mate kaŋ cine iri na bora kaŋ i te da laabu hima-cara sambu, yaadin no iri ga beene wano hima-cara mo sambu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Koyne ay go ga woone ci, nya-izey: basi nda kuri si hin ka Irikoy koytara tubu, fumbi mo si haŋ kaŋ si hin ka fumbu tubu." 
1Corinthians15:51 Guna, ay go ga gundu fo ci araŋ se: Manti iri kulu no ga kani bo, amma iri kulu, Irikoy g'iri barmay." 
1Corinthians15:52 A ga te fap folloŋ, mo-ka-miyaŋ ra, waati kaŋ hilli bananta ga hẽ. Zama hillo ga hẽ, buukoy ga tun fumbi si, iri mo, Irikoy g'iri barmay." 
1Corinthians15:53 Zama tilas no fumbikoyo ma haŋ kaŋ si hin ka fumbu daŋ. Woone kaŋ ga bu mo, tilas a ma wo kaŋ si hin ka bu daŋ." 
1Corinthians15:54 Waati kaŋ fumbikoyo ga haŋ kaŋ si hin ka fumbu daŋ, waati kaŋ mo woone kaŋ ga bu ga wo kaŋ si hin ka bu daŋ, waato din no sanno ga kubay kaŋ i hantum ka ne: «Zaamayaŋ ra no i na buuyaŋ gon!" 
1Corinthians15:55 Ya buuyaŋ, man ni zaama? Ya buuyaŋ, man ni naajo?»" 
1Corinthians15:56 Buuyaŋ naajo ga ti zunubi, zunubi dabaro mo asariya no." 
1Corinthians15:57 Amma iri ma Irikoy saabu, nga kaŋ go g'iri no zaama iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu sabbo ra!" 
1Corinthians15:58 Woodin sabbay se, ay nya-izey, ay baakoy, wa kay a ma boori, wa si zinji. Alwaati kulu araŋ ma tonton Rabbi goyo ra, za kaŋ araŋ ga bay kaŋ araŋ taabo manti yaamo no Rabbi ra." 
1Corinthians16:1 Gaakasina kaŋ i go ga margu hanantey se ciine ra, nga neeya: Kal araŋ ma te mate kaŋ cine ay na lordi no Almasihu margey se kaŋ go Galatiya laabo ra:" 
1Corinthians16:2 Jirbi iyye kulu zaari sintina ra, kal araŋ boro kulu ma kaa nga wano ra waani ka daŋ jisiro ra, da mate kaŋ Irikoy na bora albarkandi, a ma si te kala waati kaŋ ay kaa no araŋ ga nooru margu." 
1Corinthians16:3 D'ay kaa mo, borey kaŋ yaŋ gaa araŋ yadda, ay g'i donton da tirayaŋ, i ma konda araŋ nooyaŋey Urusalima*." 
1Corinthians16:4 D'a ga hima ay mo ma koy, kal i m'ay dum ka koy." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ay ga kaa araŋ do waati kaŋ ay na Masidoniya kottu ka bisa, zama ay ga gana ka bisa Masidoniya laabu." 
1Corinthians16:6 Amma hambara ay ga goro araŋ do, wala baa ay ma jawo te noodin, hal araŋ m'ay gaakasinay da hindoonay kaŋ ga kond'ay nangu kaŋ ay ga koy hino." 
1Corinthians16:7 Zama ay si ba ay ma kabay ka di araŋ bisayaŋ boŋ. Ay gonda beeje ay ma te jirbiyaŋ araŋ banda, da Rabbi ba." 
1Corinthians16:8 Amma ay ga goro ne Afasos hala Pantakot* bato," 
1Corinthians16:9 zama me beeri fo feeri ay se, goy wane kaŋ gonda nafa boobo, yanjekaarey ga baa mo." 
1Corinthians16:10 Da Timotiyos kaa, wa te mate kaŋ ga naŋ a ma goro araŋ do humburkumay si, zama Rabbi goyo no a go ga te, danga ay cine." 
1Corinthians16:11 Yaadin gaa boro kulu ma si dond'a, amma araŋ m'a gaakasinay da hindoonay kaŋ ga kand'a baani kal ay do, zama ay go g'a hangan, nga nda nya-izey." 
1Corinthians16:12 Amma iri nya-izo Abolos ciine ra, ay n'a yaamar da himma a ma kaa araŋ do nya-izey banda, amma a mana yadda baa kayna nga ma kaa sohõ. Waati kaŋ a du daama no a ga kaa." 
1Corinthians16:13 Araŋ ma batu, araŋ ma kay da gaabi cimbeeri ra, w'araŋ boŋ te alboroyaŋ, araŋ ma te gaabi." 
1Corinthians16:14 Hay kulu kaŋ araŋ ga te, w'a te da baakasinay." 
1Corinthians16:15 Araŋ ga bay kaŋ Istifana kwaara borey ga ti sintina kaŋ yaŋ cimandi Akaya laabo ra. I na ngey boŋ ciya saajawkoyaŋ hanantey se mo. Sohõ, nya-izey, ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray" 
1Corinthians16:16 araŋ m'araŋ boŋ ye ganda borey din dumiyaŋ se, ngey nda borey kulu kaŋ go ga taabi care banda goyo ra." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ay farhã kaŋ Istifana nda Fortunatus da Akayos kaa, zama araŋ faajo kaŋ n'ay di, ngey wo n'a kaa." 
1Corinthians16:18 I n'ay bina yeenandi, da araŋ waney mo. Araŋ ma boro woone yaŋ dumi beeray di." 
1Corinthians16:19 Almasihu margey kaŋ go Aziya laabo ra go g'araŋ fo. Akila nda Birisila g'araŋ fo gumo Rabbi ra, ngey nda Almasihu marga kaŋ ga margu i windo ra." 
1Corinthians16:20 Nya-izey kulu go g'araŋ fo. Araŋ ma care fo da baakasinay garbe sunsumyaŋ hanna. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ay, Bulos no ka fooyaŋ wo hantum d'ay bumbo kamba." 
1Corinthians16:22 Boro kulu kaŋ si ba Rabbi, bora din koy ma ciya laali hari. Ya iri Rabbo, ma kaa." 
1Corinthians16:23 Rabbi Yesu gomno ma bara araŋ banda. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ay baakasina go araŋ kulu banda Almasihu Yesu ra. 
2Corinthians1:1 Ay, Bulos, ay ya Almasihu Yesu diya no Irikoy miila do. In da Timotiyos iri nya-izo, iri go ga Irikoy marga fo kaŋ go Korint kwaara, da hanantey kulu mo kaŋ yaŋ go Akaya laabo kulu ra." 
2Corinthians1:2 Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara araŋ banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun iri Baabo Irikoy da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu do. 
2Corinthians1:3 Iri m'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu Irikoyo kaŋ ti a Baabo mo saabu. Nga ga ti Baabo kaŋ to da suuji, bine-gaabandiyaŋ kulu Irikoyo mo no." 
2Corinthians1:4 A go g'iri biney gaabandi iri kankami kulu ra, hal iri ma du ka borey biney gaabandi kaŋ yaŋ go kankami dumi kulu ra. Iri m'a te mo da bine-gaabandiyaŋ kaŋ iri bumbey du Irikoy do." 
2Corinthians1:5 Zama mate kaŋ cine Almasihu gurzuga go ga baa ka tonton iri gaa, yaadin mo no iri ga du bine-gaabi nda baayaŋ Almasihu do." 
2Corinthians1:6 D'iri go kankami ra, a go araŋ bine-gaabandiyaŋ da faaba se no. Wala d'iri go ga du bine-gaabandiyaŋ, woodin mo go zama araŋ ma du bine-gaabi se no, kaŋ g'araŋ gaa araŋ ma suuru nda gurzuga din kaŋ iri mo go ga maa." 
2Corinthians1:7 Beeja kaŋ iri gonda araŋ boŋ tabbat, za kaŋ iri ga bay mate kaŋ cine in d'araŋ go gurzugay ra care banda, yaadin mo no in d'araŋ du bine-gaabi care banda." 
2Corinthians1:8 Zama iri si ba araŋ ma jaŋ ka bay, nya-izey, kankami kaŋ du iri Aziya ra. I n'iri jarandi gumo-gumo, hal a bisa iri gaabo, hal iri na laakal kaa baa iri fundey gaa." 
2Corinthians1:9 Haciika, iri bumbey biney ra iri maa i na buuyaŋ ciiti dumbu iri se, hal iri ma si naanay iri boŋ gaa, amma iri ma de Irikoy gaa, nga kaŋ ga buukoy tunandi." 
2Corinthians1:10 A n'iri kaa kambe buuyaŋ laalo wo dumi gaa, a g'iri kaa kambe mo. Iri na beeje sinji a do a ga ye k'iri kaa kambe hala hõ," 
2Corinthians1:11 za kaŋ araŋ mo go g'iri gaa d'araŋ ŋwaarayyaŋey, hala gomno kaŋ Irikoy n'iri no boro boobo adduwey sabbay se ma naŋ boro boobo ma saabuyaŋ te iri sabbay se."
