Philippians1:7 A ga saba mo ay ma fongu nd'araŋ kulu ya-cine, zama araŋ go ay bina ra. Baa kaŋ ay go hawante kaso ra, wala ay go ga Baaru Hanna faasa k'a tabbatandi mo, araŋ kulu ga margu ay banda Irikoy gomno ra." 
Philippians1:8 Zama Irikoy no ga ti ay seeda mate kaŋ ay go ga faaji araŋ kulu se, da Almasihu Yesu bine bakarawo." 
Philippians1:9 Haŋ kaŋ ay go ga ŋwaaray neeya: araŋ baakasina ma baa ka tonton bayray da fahamay kulu ra 
Philippians1:10 hal araŋ ma neesi ka di hayey kaŋ yaŋ ga bisa ikulu booriyaŋ. Woone ma te mo hal araŋ ma bara cimikoyyaŋ kaŋ sinda taali kulu, ka koy Almasihu zaaro gaa." 
Philippians1:11 Gaa no araŋ ga bara toonanteyaŋ da adilitaray goy kaŋ fun Yesu Almasihu do ka koy Irikoy darza d'a sifayaŋo gaa. 
Philippians1:12 Ay ga ba araŋ ma bay, nya-izey, kaŋ hayey kaŋ du ay sabbay se no, Baaru Hanna say-say ka tonton." 
Philippians1:13 Hala faada doogarey da boro cindey mo bay kaŋ sikka si ay go kasu ra Almasihu sabbay se. 
Philippians1:14 Zama ay go kaso ra se mo no, borey baayaŋo kulu du gaabi Rabbi ra. I bine-gaabo goono ga tonton gumo mo ka Irikoy sanno ci humburkumay si." 
Philippians1:15 Daahir, afooyaŋ goono ga Almasihu baaro waazu nda canse nda kusuuma. I goono g'a te fay-ka-ye-waani-waaniyaŋ ra, manti nda bine hanno. I goono ga miila ngey ma bine saray tonton ay se kaŋ ay go hawante." 
Philippians1:16  
Philippians1:17 Amma afooyaŋ goono ga Almasihu baaro waazu nda gomni miila. I goono g'a te da baakasinay. I ga bay kaŋ Irikoy n'ay daŋ ay ma ciya Baaru Hanna faasako. 
Philippians1:18 Kulu nda yaadin, mate kulu kaŋ no, da munaficitaray wala nda cimi no, i ya day goono ga Almasihu baaro waazu. Ay mo maa woodin kaani. Oho, ay ga soobay ka maa a kaani mo." 
Philippians1:19 Zama ay ga bay kaŋ araŋ adduwey do, da gaakasinay ra kaŋ Yesu Almasihu Biya _Hanna|_ g'ay no, woone kulu kaŋ du ay ga bare k'ay kaa kambe." 
Philippians1:20 Zama haŋ kaŋ ay ga ba gumo d'ay beeja ga ti woone: hay kulu ra ay ma si haaw. Day sohõ, sanda mate kaŋ ay doona, ay ma to da bine-gaabi waati kulu, hal ay ma Almasihu beerandi ay gaahamo ra, d'ay ga bu wala d'ay ga funa." 
Philippians1:21 Zama ay wo se fundi ga ti Almasihu, d'ay bu mo riiba no." 
Philippians1:22 Amma d'ay ga funa gaahamo ra, ay goyo ga te albarka, ay si bay mo wo kaŋ ay ga suuban." 
Philippians1:23 Ay laakalo fay ihinka, ay ga ba ay ma koy ka goro Almasihu banda, zama woodin ga bisa ay se gumo." 
Philippians1:24 Amma a ga bisa araŋ se d'ay ga goro gaahamo ra. 
Philippians1:25 Woodin bayray ga tabbat ay se: ay ga goro. Oho, ay ga goro araŋ kulu banda hal araŋ ma du ka koy jina nda farhã cimbeeri ra," 
Philippians1:26 hal araŋ farhã ma baa Almasihu Yesu ra ay sabbay se, waati kaŋ ay ga kaa araŋ do koyne." 
Philippians1:27 Kala day araŋ ma goray te kaŋ ga saba nda Almasihu Baaru Hanna, hal ay ma maa araŋ gora baaro, baa d'ay kaa ka di araŋ, wala d'ay mana du ka kaa. Ay ma maa kaŋ araŋ goono ga kay biya* folloŋ ra ka gurjay care banda laakal folloŋ ra mo cimbeero se, Baaru Hanna wane." 
Philippians1:28 Araŋ ma si humburu baa kayna borey kaŋ yaŋ ga gaaba nd'araŋ. Woodin binde ga ciya i se halaciyaŋ seeda. Amma araŋ wo, a ga ciya araŋ se faabayaŋ seeda kaŋ fun Irikoy do." 
Philippians1:29 Zama Irikoy n'araŋ no nga gomno ra, manti araŋ ma Almasihu cimandi hinne bo, amma araŋ ma maa taabi mo a sabbay se." 
Philippians1:30 Yaadin gaa no araŋ goono ga wongo kaŋ araŋ di ay te din dumo te. Wongo wo mo ay goono g'a te hala hõ, sanda mate kaŋ araŋ goono ga maa." 
Philippians2:1 Yaadin gaa, za kaŋ bine yaamaryaŋ go Almasihu ra, za kaŋ bine-gaabandiyaŋ go baakasinay ra, za kaŋ markasinay go Biya* _Hanno|_ do, za kaŋ bine bakaraw da suuji go no mo," 
Philippians2:2 w'ay farhã toonandi hal araŋ ma bara nda laakal folloŋ, da baakasinay folloŋ mo. Araŋ biney d'araŋ miiley mo ma ciya afolloŋ." 
Philippians2:3 Araŋ ma si hay kulu te da fayyaŋ, wala boŋbeeray yaamo, amma lalabu ra boro kulu ma nga boŋ lasaabu kaŋ boro fo bisa nga." 
Philippians2:4 Manti danga boro kulu ma haggoy da nga boŋ muraadey hinne bo, amma araŋ ra boro kulu ma haggoy da nga cala muraadey mo." 
Philippians2:5 Araŋ ma bara nda miila araŋ gaa kaŋ dumi go Almasihu Yesu ra mo. 
Philippians2:6 Nga kaŋ ga ti Irikoy bumbo mana nga Irikoytara sabayaŋo lasaabu haŋ kaŋ nga ga gaay da gaabi. 
Philippians2:7 Amma nga bumbo yadda ka nga Irikoytara hino dabaro naŋ ka nga boŋ ciya bannya, ka ciya mo boro taka cine." 
Philippians2:8 Kaŋ a kaa boro alhaali ra mo, a na nga boŋ kaynandi ka yadda ka to hala buuyaŋ gaa, oho, hala kanjiyaŋ* bundo gaa buuyaŋo do." 
Philippians2:9 Woodin sabbay se no Irikoy n'a beerandi ka bisa hay kulu, ka maa daŋ a gaa kaŋ bisa maa kulu." 
Philippians2:10 Zama Yesu maa gaa no kange kulu ga gurfa, beena ra waney, da ndunnya boŋ waney, da ndunnya cire waney." 
Philippians2:11 Deene kulu mo ma seeda ka ne: Yesu Almasihu ya Rabbi no, ka koy Baaba Irikoy darza gaa." 
Philippians2:12 Ya ay baakoy, araŋ goono ga gana waati kulu. Araŋ goono ga gana manti ay jine hinne bo, amma baa kaŋ ay si noodin araŋ goono ga koy da jina. Woodin se, goyey kaŋ araŋ go ga te zama araŋ jin ka du faaba, w'i te da humburkumay da jijiriyaŋ." 
Philippians2:13 Zama Irikoy no goono ga goy araŋ ra hal araŋ ma miila da goy mo te kaŋ ga kaan a se. 
Philippians2:14 Araŋ ma si hay kulu te da jance nda kakaw," 
Philippians2:15 hal araŋ ma ciya boroyaŋ kaŋ i si du ka jance, kaŋ ga hanan mo. Araŋ ma ciya mo Irikoy izeyaŋ kaŋ sinda taali zamana wo ize darantey da siirantey game ra. I game ra no araŋ goono ga kaari sanda handariyayzeyaŋ ndunnya ra," 
Philippians2:16 kaŋ araŋ goono ga fundi sanno salle. D'araŋ ga woodin te, ay ga farhã Almasihu zaaro ra, zama yaadin gaa ay mana zuru yaamo, ay mana taabi yaamo mo." 
Philippians2:17 Ay g'ay fundo lasaabu sanda haŋyaŋ sargay kaŋ i ga soogu. Baa d'i g'ay fundo no ya-cine araŋ sarga d'araŋ saajaw goy boŋ, kaŋ araŋ goono ga te cimbeeri ra, ay maa kaani. Ay ga farhã mo araŋ kulu banda." 
Philippians2:18 Yaadin no araŋ mo, araŋ ma farhã ka maa kaani ay banda." 
Philippians2:19 Amma ay gonda anniya Rabbi Yesu ra ay ma Timotiyos donton araŋ do d'a tonton kayna, zama ay mo ma du bine-gaabi waati kaŋ ay du k'araŋ gora baaru bay." 
Philippians2:20 Zama ay sinda boro kulu kaŋ laakalo ga saba nda Timotiyos wano, kaŋ g'araŋ gora haggoy da cimi." 
Philippians2:21 Zama borey kaŋ cindi goono ga haggoy da ngey boŋ muraadey, manti nda Yesu Almasihu waney bo." 
Philippians2:22 Amma araŋ ga Timotiyos seeda bay: danga mate kaŋ cine ize ga may baaba se, yaadin mo no a goy ay banda Baaru Hanna goyo ra." 
Philippians2:23 Nga binde no ay gonda anniya ay ma donton da waasi, waati kaŋ ay ga di haŋ kaŋ ga te ay do." 
Philippians2:24 Amma ay goono ga de Rabbi gaa kaŋ ay bumbo ga kaa d'a tonton kayna. 
Philippians2:25 Amma ay di a ga hagu ay m'ay nya-izo Abafaroditos donton araŋ do. Ay goy hangasino, d'ay wongu ra hangasino mo no, amma araŋ diya d'araŋ saajawko no hari kaŋ ay ga laami ciine ra." 
Philippians2:26 A faaji gumo araŋ kulu se, a bine sara gumo mo zama araŋ maa baaru kaŋ a jante." 
Philippians2:27 Da cimi mo a jante, hal a ba ka bu. Amma Irikoy n'a suuji, day manti nga hinne bo, hala nda baa ay mo, zama ay ma si du bine saray bine saray ra." 
Philippians2:28 Woodin sabbay se no ay n'a donton araŋ do da anniya zama waati kaŋ araŋ di a, araŋ ma farhã, zama ay bine sara mo ma te daama." 
Philippians2:29 Araŋ m'a ta mo Rabbi ra da farhã koonu. Araŋ ma boro wo dumi beerandi mo. 
Philippians2:30 Zama Almasihu goyo sabbay se no a ga ba ka bu. A na nga fundo yababa zama a ma tonton hari kaŋ gaze araŋ saajawo ra ay se. 
Philippians3:1 Ay nya-izey, haŋ kaŋ cindi kaŋ ay ga ba ay ma ci araŋ se neeya: araŋ ma farhã Rabbi ra. Kaŋ ay ga ye ka hayey din hantum araŋ se, manti kankami hari no ay se, amma a go araŋ hallasiyaŋ se." 
Philippians3:2 Araŋ ma haggoy da goy laalo teekoy, araŋ ma haggoy da ngey kaŋ ga ti hansey, araŋ ma haggoy da borey kaŋ ga gaaham dumbu." 
Philippians3:3 Zama iri no ga ti dambangantey, iri kaŋ goono ga sududu Irikoy Biya ra ka farhã Almasihu Yesu ra. Iri sinda mo gaaham do naanay," 
Philippians3:4 baa kaŋ ay gonda gaaham do naanay daliili. Da boro fo ga miila nga gonda gaaham do naanay daliili, ay wo du ka bis'a." 
Philippians3:5 Zaari ahakkanta no i n'ay dambangu*, Israyla* asuli* gaa no ay fun, Benyamin kunda ra, Ibrani boro nya hala baaba. Asariya* ciine ra, ay wo Farisi fonda boro no." 
Philippians3:6 Ay na anniya haw hal ay na Almasihu* marga gurzugandi. Adilitaray ciine ra mo (sanda asariya wano do), ay sinda taali." 
Philippians3:7 Kulu nda yaadin, hayey kaŋ ga ti riiba ay se doŋ, woodin yaŋ ay n'i lasaabu mursay Almasihu sabbay se." 
Philippians3:8 Oho, haciika ay goono ga hay kulu lasaabu mursay Almasihu Yesu ay Rabbo bayyaŋo sabbay se kaŋ bisa hay kulu. A sabbay se mo no ay na hay kulu himandi yaamo. Ay g'i lasaabu mo sanda kwaara banda cine zama ay ma du Almasihu," 
Philippians3:9 hala mo ay ma bara a ra da adilitaray kaŋ fun Irikoy do cimbeero boŋ. Adilitaray wo, manti ay bumbo wano kaŋ fun asariya ganayaŋ do. Amma nga ga ti adilitaray kaŋ boro ga du Almasihu ra cimbeeri do." 
Philippians3:10 Ay ga ba ay ma du ka Almasihu bay gumo, da Irikoy dabaro kaŋ n'a tunandi ka kaa buukoy game ra. Ay ga ba mo ay ma furo a gurzugayey ra, i m'ay himandi nda Almasihu a buuyaŋo ra." 
Philippians3:11 Zama mate kaŋ no kulu ay ma to bu-ka-tun gaa ka fun buukoy game ra. 
Philippians3:12 Manti danga ay jin ka to no, wala danga Irikoy jin k'ay toonandi no bo, amma ay goono ga anniya haw hal ay ma du ka haya di kaŋ sabbay se Almasihu Yesu jin k'ay di." 
Philippians3:13 Nya-izey, ay bumbo, ay mana lasaabu kaŋ ay jin ka du a bo, amma hari folloŋ no ay goono ga te: ay go ga dinya hayey kaŋ yaŋ go banda ka kookari ka to wo kaŋ yaŋ go jina gaa." 
Philippians3:14 Ay goono ga zuru zama ay ma du alhakko. Alhakko wo ga ti Irikoy beene ceeyaŋ wano, kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra." 
Philippians3:15 Iri binde, iri kulu kaŋ ga ti toonanteyaŋ, kala iri ma miila yaadin. D'araŋ di hay fo araŋ laakaley ra mo kaŋ waan'a, baa woodin Irikoy g'a bangandi araŋ se." 
Philippians3:16 Kala day nango kaŋ iri jin ka to din, iri ma soobay k'iri diraw te yaadin." 
Philippians3:17 Nya-izey, araŋ kulu, araŋ ma goro care banda ay dondonkoyaŋ. Araŋ ma laakal da borey mo kaŋ yaŋ goono ga dira iri alhaalo boŋ." 
Philippians3:18 Zama boro boobo goono ga dira kaŋ ibareyaŋ no Almasihu kanjiyaŋ bundo se. Ay binde n'i baaru ci araŋ se sorro boobo. Baa sohõ mo ay goono g'a ci araŋ se da mo-mundi. 
Philippians3:19 Borey din mo, i bananta ga ti halaciyaŋ. I irikoyo ga ti i gundey. I darza go i haawi ra. I goono ga laakal mo da ndunnya hayey." 
Philippians3:20 Amma iri wo beene boroyaŋ no. Iri goono ga batu mo iri Faabakwa ma fun noodin, nga Rabbi Yesu Almasihu." 
Philippians3:21 A g'iri gaahamey kaŋ ga ti kayna wane yaŋ bare zama a m'i te danga nga gaaham darzanta cine. A ga woodin te nga dabaro ra kaŋ do a ga hayey kulu daŋ nga boŋ mayra cire. 
Philippians4:1 Woodin se, ay nya-izey, ay baakoy, kal araŋ ma kay da gaabi Rabbi ra. Ay gonda araŋ faaji. Araŋ ciya ay farhã hari d'ay boŋtoba, ya ay baakoy." 
Philippians4:2 Ay goono ga Afodiya yaamar, ay goono ga Sintici mo yaamar, i ma goro da laakal folloŋ Rabbi ra." 
Philippians4:3 Oho, nin mo, ay goy hangasin naanaykoyo, ay goono ga ni ŋwaaray ni ma wayborey din gaa. Zama i taabi ay banda Baaru Hanna goyo ra, ngey nda Kilimandos, d'ay goy hangasin cindey mo kaŋ yaŋ maa go fundi tira ra." 
Philippians4:4 Araŋ ma farhã Rabbi ra waati kulu! Ay ga ye k'a ci koyne: araŋ ma farhã! 
Philippians4:5 Araŋ bine-baano ma bangay boro kulu se. A go, Rabbi maan." 
Philippians4:6 Araŋ ma si karhã da hay kulu, amma hay kulu ra araŋ ma naŋ Irikoy ma bay araŋ ŋwaarayyaŋey gaa. Araŋ ma adduwa nda ŋwaarayyaŋo wo te mo da saabuyaŋ." 
Philippians4:7 Irikoy laakal kana mo, kaŋ bisa fahamay kulu g'araŋ biney d'araŋ fonguyaŋey batu Almasihu Yesu ra." 
Philippians4:8 Bananta ra mo, nya-izey, araŋ ma laakal da hay kulu kaŋ ga ti cimi wane, da haŋ kaŋ gonda beeray, da haŋ kaŋ gonda adilitaray, da haŋ kaŋ ga hanan, da haŋ kaŋ hima nda baakasinay, da haŋ kaŋ gonda seeda hanno mo. Da hayey din gonda booriyaŋ wala saabuyaŋ, kal araŋ ma laakal ye i gaa." 
Philippians4:9 Hayey kaŋ araŋ dondon, da haŋ kaŋ araŋ ta, da haŋ kaŋ araŋ maa, da haŋ kaŋ araŋ di ay do, kal araŋ ma hayey din te. Irikoy kaŋ ga laakal kanay no mo ga bara araŋ banda." 
Philippians4:10 Amma ay goono ga farhã gumo Rabbi ra zama araŋ ye k'araŋ fonguyaŋ cabe ay se. Baa waato din araŋ fongu, amma araŋ mana du daama." 
Philippians4:11 Ay si ga hayey din ci zama ay ga laami hay fo bo, zama ay jin ka woone dondon: goray kulu kaŋ dumi ra ay go, ay fundo ma maa a kaani." 
Philippians4:12 Ay ga waani jaŋay goray, ay ga waani duure goray mo. Nangu kulu hay kulu ra ay dondon ay ma kungu, ay dondon ay ma maa haray mo. Ay dondon ay ma bara nda iboobo, ay dondon ay ma bara nda kayna mo." 
Philippians4:13 Ay ga hin ka hay kulu te ay Gaabandikwa do. 
Philippians4:14 Kulu nda yaadin, araŋ te haŋ kaŋ ga boori kaŋ araŋ n'ay gaakasinay ay kankamo ra." 
Philippians4:15 Filibi borey, araŋ bumbey ga bay kaŋ za araŋ sintin ka Baaru Hanna bay, waato kaŋ ay fun Masidoniya laabu, Almasihu marga kulu man'ay gaakasinay nooyaŋ da tayaŋ ciine ra kala araŋ hinne." 
Philippians4:16 Zama waato kaŋ ay go Tassalonika kwaara, araŋ donton sorro hinka ay laamo se." 
Philippians4:17 Ay siino ga nooyaŋ ceeci, amma albarka no ay goono ga ceeci kaŋ ga naŋ araŋ arzaka kaŋ go beena ra jisante ma tonton." 
Philippians4:18 Amma ay du hay kulu nda yulwa. Ay kungu nda wo kaŋ ay du, gomno kaŋ araŋ na Abafaroditos donton d'a. A ciya haw kaano salleyaŋ hari, sargay kaŋ Irikoy ga yadda nd'a, kaŋ ga kaan a se mo." 
Philippians4:19 Ay Irikoyo mo g'araŋ laamey kulu bana nga arzaka boŋ darza ra, Almasihu Yesu ra." 
Philippians4:20 Darza ma bara iri Baabo Irikoy se hal abada abadin! Amin. 
Philippians4:21 Araŋ ma Almasihu Yesu ra hanantey kulu fo. Nya-izey kaŋ go ay banda mo g'araŋ fo. 
Philippians4:22 Hanantey kulu go g'araŋ fo, sanku fa binde ngey kaŋ ga ti Kaysar* windi waney." 
Philippians4:23 Rabbi Yesu Almasihu gomno ma bara araŋ biya banda. 
Colossians1:1 Ay, Bulos, ay ya Almasihu* Yesu diya no Irikoy miila do. In da Timotiyos, iri nya-izo," 
Colossians1:2 iri go ga hanantey da nya-ize naanaykoyey fo kaŋ yaŋ go Kolosi kwaara Almasihu ra. Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara araŋ banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun iri Baabo Irikoy do. 
Colossians1:3 Iri goono g'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu Irikoyo kaŋ ti a Baabo saabu, ka adduwa te araŋ se alwaati kulu." 
Colossians1:4 Iri goono ga saabu zama iri maa araŋ cimbeero baaru Almasihu Yesu ra, d'araŋ baakasinay baaro mo kaŋ araŋ gonda hanantey kulu se." 
Colossians1:5 Araŋ cimbeero d'araŋ baakasina fun beeja do kaŋ go jisante beena ra araŋ se. Araŋ jin ka maa beeja din baaru cimi sanno kaŋ go Baaru Hanna ra 
Colossians1:6 kaŋ kaa araŋ do. Ndunnya kulu ra a goono ga albarka no, a goono ga tonton mo, mate kaŋ cine a goono ga te araŋ ra, za hano kaŋ hane araŋ maa ka faham ka boori mo da Irikoy gomno cimo ra." 
Colossians1:7 Araŋ na woodin dondon iri baakoy Abafaras do, kaŋ ga ti iri tamtaray hangasino. Nga ga ti Almasihu saajawko naanaykoy araŋ sabbay se." 
Colossians1:8 A binde n'araŋ Biya ra baakasina baaru dede iri se. 
Colossians1:9 Woodin sabbay se no iri mo, za hano kaŋ hane iri maa woodin, iri mana fay da adduwa nda ŋwaaray teeyaŋ araŋ sabbay se. Iri go ga ŋwaaray araŋ ma to da Irikoy miila bayyaŋ, laakal da fahamay ra kaŋ Biya _Hanno|_ ga no." 
Colossians1:10 Iri go ga ŋwaaray araŋ ma diraw te kaŋ ga saba nda Rabbi beerandiyaŋo hal a ma maa araŋ kaani gumo, goy hanney kulu ra mo araŋ ma albarka no, araŋ ma tonton mo Irikoy bayray ra." 
Colossians1:11 Iri ga ŋwaaray araŋ ma ciya dabarikooniyaŋ kaŋ gonda dabari kulu kaŋ araŋ du a hin darzanta do, hal araŋ ma hin hay kulu ka suuru nda farhã." 
Colossians1:12 Araŋ ma Baaba saabu kaŋ n'iri to iri ma du baa hanantey tubo gaa kaŋ go annura ra. 
Colossians1:13 A n'iri faaba kubay dabaro gaa k'iri daŋ nga Izo kaŋ nga ga ba din koytara ra. 
Colossians1:14 A Izo ra mo no iri du fansayaŋ, iri zunubey yaafayaŋo nooya." 
Colossians1:15 Boro si du ka di Irikoy, amma Almasihu ya Irikoy follonka no kaŋ bangay iri se. Nga no go no za takahari kulu mana taka." 
Colossians1:16 Zama nga no ka hay kulu taka, beena ra waney da ganda waney, haŋ kaŋ boro ga di da haŋ kaŋ boro si di, hala kargey no wala koytarayey wala koyey wala hinkoyey. Nga no na hay kulu taka, a sabbay se mo no i go no." 
Colossians1:17 Nga no go no za hay kulu mana te. Nga no goono ga hay kulu haw care gaa. 
Colossians1:18 Nga no ga ti boŋo gaahamo se, kaŋ ga ti a marga. Nga no ga ti sintina nda boro jina kaŋ tun ka fun buukoy game ra, zama hay kulu ra a ma ciya ibeero." 
Colossians1:19 Zama a kaan Baabo se no nga toonandiyaŋ kulu ma goro Almasihu ra. 
Colossians1:20 A kaan a se mo nga ma hay kulu sasabandi nga do, hala hayey kaŋ go ganda wala hayey kaŋ go beena ra, Almasihu do. Kuro kaŋ Almasihu dooru nga kanjiyaŋ bundo boŋ no ka laakal kana wo daŋ _boro nda Irikoy game ra|_." 
Colossians1:21 Waato araŋ ya mebarawyaŋ no Irikoy se, araŋ ya a ibareyaŋ mo no araŋ laakaley d'araŋ goy laaley ra." 
Colossians1:22 Kulu nda yaadin sohõ Almasihu n'araŋ sasabandi nga gaahamo ra nga buuyaŋo do, hal nga m'araŋ salle hananteyaŋ kaŋ sinda taali nda foyray mo nga jine." 
Colossians1:23 Woodin ga te da day araŋ goono ga koy jina cimbeeri ra, sinjanteyaŋ da kayyanteyaŋ kaŋ mana banda bare Baaru Hanna beeja gaa. Baaru Hanno wo ga ti wo kaŋ araŋ maa, kaŋ i waazu takahari kulu se kaŋ yaŋ go beena cire. Ay, Bulos, Irikoy n'ay ciya Baaru Hanna saajawko." 
Colossians1:24 Sohõ day, ay goono ga farhã ay gurzuga kulu ra araŋ sabbay se. Ay goono ga toonandi ay gaahamo ra haŋ kaŋ gaze Almasihu kankamey ra a gaahamo sabbay se, danga Almasihu* marga nooya." 
Colossians1:25 A se no ay ciya saajawko, mate kaŋ Irikoy n'ay daŋ goyo wo ra araŋ se, zama ay ma Irikoy sanno toonanta _waazu|_." 
Colossians1:26 Sanno toonanta din ya gundu* no kaŋ go tugante za doŋ alwaatey da zamaney se, amma sohõ Irikoy n'a bangandi nga hanantey se." 
Colossians1:27 I se no Irikoy ba nga ma gundo wo darza arzakanta bangandi dumi* cindey game ra. Gundo neeya: Almasihu go araŋ ra, nga kaŋ ga ti beeje darzanta." 
Colossians1:28 Iri goono ga Almasihu baaro waazu, iri goono ga boro kulu yaamar. Iri goono ga boro kulu dondonandi laakal kulu ra, hal iri ma boro kulu salle toonante Almasihu ra." 
Colossians1:29 Miila woodin se no ay goono ga goy. Ay goono ga kookari a dabaro boŋ kaŋ go ga goy ay ra da gaabi. 
Colossians2:1 Zama ay ga ba araŋ ma bay ay tangami bambata gaa kaŋ ay go ga te araŋ sabbay se, da ngey mo sabbay se kaŋ go Lawodisiya ra, da borey kulu mo kaŋ mana di ay mo-da-mo." 
Colossians2:2 Ay go ga tangam zama i biney ma du gaabi, i ma goro margante baakasinay ra hal i ma du arzaka kaŋ ga fun fahamay tabbatante ra. Woodin yaŋ no ga naŋ i ma Irikoy gundo bay, kaŋ ga ti Almasihu." 
Colossians2:3 A ra no laakal da bayray arzaka kulu go tugante. 
Colossians2:4 Woodin no ay goono ga ci hala boro kulu ma si araŋ halli nda sanni kaŋ ga darandi. 
Colossians2:5 Zama baa kaŋ ay si araŋ do noodin gaaham ra, ay go araŋ do Biya _Hanno|_ ra. Ay goono ga farhã ka di mate kaŋ araŋ sasare ka kay care banda nda gaabi araŋ cimbeero do Almasihu ra." 
Colossians2:6 Mate kaŋ araŋ na Rabbi Almasihu Yesu ta, yaadin cine mo no a ga hima araŋ ma dira a ra." 
Colossians2:7 Araŋ kaajey sinji a ra. Araŋ cina a boŋ mo hal araŋ te gaabi cimbeeri ra, mate kaŋ cine i n'araŋ dondonandi nd'a. Araŋ goono ga yulwa a ra da saabuyaŋ mo." 
Colossians2:8 Araŋ ma te laakal hala boro kulu ma si du araŋ da nga bayray da halliyaŋ yaamey, borey alaadey boŋ da ndunnya hayey boŋ, kaŋ manti Almasihu boŋ." 
Colossians2:9 Zama a ra no Irikoytara toonanta kulu goono ga goro a gaahamo ra. 
Colossians2:10 Irikoy n'araŋ toonandi Almasihu ra mo, nga kaŋ ga ti koytaray da hin kulu boŋo." 
Colossians2:11 A ra mo no i n'araŋ dambangu*, manti nda dambanguyaŋ kaŋ kambe ga te bo, amma da Almasihu wane dambanguyaŋo kaŋ a te, kaŋ na Adam-ize daa laalo dabaro kaa." 
Colossians2:12 I n'araŋ fiji a banda baptisma* ra, i n'araŋ tunandi mo a banda, _araŋ|_ cimbeero do Irikoy goyo ra, nga kaŋ na Almasihu tunandi ka kaa buukoy game ra." 
Colossians2:13 Araŋ mo kaŋ go buukoyaŋ araŋ taaley d'araŋ Adam-ize daa laala dambanguyaŋ-jaŋay sabbay se, Irikoy n'araŋ funandi a banda k'iri taaley kulu yaafa iri se." 
Colossians2:14 Asariya* hantumo kaŋ kay iri gaa ka gaaba nd'iri mo, Irikoy n'a tuusu ka kaa k'a kanji kanjiyaŋ* bundo gaa." 
Colossians2:15 A na koyey da hinkoyey kaa nga gaa. Gaa no a n'i haawandi taray kwaaray ka du zaama i boŋ kanjiyaŋ bundo do. 
Colossians2:16 Wa si ta boro kulu m'araŋ ciiti ŋwa da haŋ ciine ra, wala batu hane, wala handu kayyaŋ, wala asibti* zaari ciine ra." 
Colossians2:17 Hayey din ya biyayaŋ* no hayey kaŋ yaŋ ga aniya ka kaa se, amma Almasihu ga ti biyey din Koyo." 
Colossians2:18 Boro fooyaŋ go no kaŋ ga maa kaani ka ngey boŋ kaynandiyaŋ alhaali cabe ka sombu malaykey* se. Wa si naŋ borey wo dumi m'araŋ zamba k'araŋ zaamayaŋ alhakko zay. Borey din goono ga kay _bangayyaŋey|_ kaŋ ngey di ra. I ga ngey boŋ beerandi sabaabu si, ngey Adam-ize lasaabey boŋ." 
Colossians2:19 I fay no ka fun boŋo gaa. A do no gaahamo kulu goono ga gaay ka haw care gaa dabey da kaajey do, ka tonton da toonandiyaŋ kaŋ ga fun Irikoy do." 
Colossians2:20 Za kaŋ araŋ bu Almasihu banda ka fay da ndunnya hayey, ifo se no araŋ goono g'araŋ gora te danga ndunnya goray, k'a lordey* gana." 
Colossians2:21 Danga i ma ne: «Ma si woone ham! Ma si woone taba! Ma si lamba woone gaa!» 
Colossians2:22 Hayey din binde ga halaci ngey goyey ra, zama i n'i sinji borey lordey* d'i dondonandiyaŋey boŋ." 
Colossians2:23 Hayey din ga hima danga i gonda laakal, zama fundi ibaay sombuyaŋ anniya ra n'i bara, da boŋ kaynandiyaŋ da gaaham taabandiyaŋ ra, amma i sinda nafa kulu gaaham ibaay laaley boŋ hiniyaŋ se." 
Colossians3:1 Za kaŋ i n'araŋ tunandi Almasihu banda, araŋ ma hayey kaŋ yaŋ go beene ceeci, nango kaŋ Almasihu goono ga goro Irikoy kambe ŋwaaro gaa." 
Colossians3:2 Araŋ ma laakal dake hayey kaŋ yaŋ go beena ra gaa, manti hayey kaŋ yaŋ go ndunnya ra gaa." 
Colossians3:3 Zama araŋ bu no. Araŋ fundey mo goono ga tugu Almasihu banda Irikoy do. 
Colossians3:4 Waati kaŋ Almasihu kaŋ ga ti araŋ fundo ga bangay, araŋ mo ga bangay a banda darza ra." 
Colossians3:5 Araŋ ma ndunnya hayey kaŋ goono ga goy araŋ gaaham jarey ra wi. Ngey neeya: zina, da ziibi, da canse laalo, da ibaay laalo, da biniyay (zama biniyay ya tooru ganayaŋ dumi fo no)." 
Colossians3:6 Woodin yaŋ sabbay se mo no Irikoy bine tuna goono ga kaa borey kaŋ ga wangu ka Irikoy gana yaŋ gaa. 
Colossians3:7 I game ra mo no araŋ n'araŋ diraw te waato, waato kaŋ araŋ goro hayey din ra." 
Colossians3:8 Amma sohõ, kal araŋ ma woone yaŋ kulu naŋ: bine tunay, da futay, da zamba, da alaasiray. Sanni ziibo mo ma si fatta araŋ meyey ra." 
Colossians3:9 Koyne, araŋ ma si taari care se, zama araŋ na boro* zeena kaa, nga nda nga goyey kulu." 
Colossians3:10 Araŋ na boro* tajo faka mo kaŋ Irikoy, a Takakwa, goono ga tajandi bayray ra nga bumbo alhaalo boŋ." 
Colossians3:11 Boro tajitara din ra fayanka si no: da Garekey no wala Yahudancey*, da dambanguyankoy wala boro kaŋ si dambangu, wala mebaraw, wala Sitancey _(danga mebaraw kulu koda)|_, wala bannya, wala burcini. Amma Almasihu no ga ti hay kulu, a go hay kulu ra mo." 
Colossians3:12 Yaadin gaa, zama araŋ ya Irikoy suubananteyaŋ no, a hanantey no, da borey kaŋ a ga ba mo, kal araŋ ma bakaraw bine faka, da booriyaŋ, da boŋ kaynandiyaŋ, da lalabu, da suuru kuuku." 
Colossians3:13 Araŋ ma suuru care se, araŋ ma care yaafa mo. D'araŋ ra boro fo gonda kalima sanni boro fo boŋ, a ga hima, mate kaŋ cine Rabbi n'araŋ yaafa, yaadin mo no araŋ ma te care se." 
Colossians3:14 Hayey din kulu boŋ, araŋ ma bara nda baakasinay, zama nga no g'araŋ haw care gaa gumo hal araŋ ma ciya afolloŋ." 
Colossians3:15 Almasihu laakal kana mo m'araŋ biney may, zama laakal kanay wo se no i n'araŋ ce gaaham folloŋ ra. Araŋ ma saabu mo." 
Colossians3:16 Almasihu sanno ma goro araŋ ra, a ma yulwa mo laakal kulu ra. Araŋ ma care dondonandi ka care yaamar mo da Zaburayaŋ da saabu baytuyaŋ da dooniyaŋ kaŋ fun Biya Hanno do. Araŋ ma baytuyaŋ te da gomni araŋ biney ra Irikoy se." 
Colossians3:17 Hay kulu mo kaŋ araŋ goono ga te, da sanni ra no wala goy ra no, araŋ m'a kulu te Rabbi Yesu maa ra ka Baaba Irikoy saabu a do." 
Colossians3:18 Wandey, araŋ m'araŋ boŋ ye ganda araŋ kurnyey se, mate kaŋ a ga hima nd'a Rabbi ra." 
Colossians3:19 Kurnyey, araŋ ma ba araŋ wandey, araŋ ma si fottu i gaa mo." 
Colossians3:20 Zankey, araŋ m'araŋ hayrey gana hay kulu ra, zama woodin no ga kaan Rabbi se." 
Colossians3:21 Baabey, araŋ ma si araŋ izey kurtunandi, zama i biney ma si sara." 
Colossians3:22 Bannyey, araŋ m'araŋ koyey gana, kaŋ yaŋ ga ti ndunnya waney. Araŋ m'i gana hay kulu ra, manti waati kaŋ i goono g'araŋ guna hinne bo, zama se i ma maa araŋ kaani. Amma araŋ m'i gana nda bine folloŋ Rabbi humburkumay ra." 
Colossians3:23 Hay kulu mo kaŋ araŋ ga te, araŋ m'a te da bine kulu, danga Rabbi se, manti borey se." 
Colossians3:24 Zama araŋ ga bay kaŋ Rabbi do araŋ ga du tubuyaŋ kaŋ ga ti araŋ alhakko. Wa may Rabbi Almasihu se! 
Colossians3:25 Zama boro kaŋ ga laala te, i ga laala din yeti a se. Baar'a-baar'a si no mo." 
Colossians4:1 Koyey, araŋ ma te araŋ bannyey se haŋ kaŋ ga hagu, da haŋ kaŋ ga saba mo, zama araŋ ga bay kaŋ araŋ mo gonda Koy beena ra." 
Colossians4:2 Araŋ ma mo ye adduwa ra ka batu a ra mo nda saabuyaŋ. 
Colossians4:3 Araŋ ma te adduwa iri mo se, Irikoy ma fondo feeri iri se nga sanno se, hal iri ma Almasihu gundu ci kaŋ sabbay se no ay go kasu." 
Colossians4:4 Zama ay m'a bangandi mate kaŋ cine a ga hima ay se ay ma ci. 
Colossians4:5 Araŋ ma dira nda laakal ngey kaŋ yaŋ mana cimandi jine. Araŋ ma alwaati wi mo da laakal. 
Colossians4:6 Alwaati kulu araŋ sanney ma ciya gomni waney, danga ŋwaari kaŋ maa ciiri, zama araŋ ma du ka bay mate kaŋ cine no araŋ ga tu d'a boro kulu se." 
Colossians4:7 Ticikos ga ti iri nya-izo, iri baakwa, saajawko naanaykoy, ay tamtaray hangasin mo no Rabbi ra. A g'araŋ bayrandi d'ay baaru kulu." 
Colossians4:8 Woodin sabbay se no ay n'a donton araŋ do, zama araŋ ma du k'iri gora bay, a m'araŋ biney gaabandi mo." 
Colossians4:9 Ay na Onisimos donton a banda mo. Onisimos ga ti nya-ize naanaykoy, iri baakwa, araŋ do boro no. Nga mo no ga hay kulu ci araŋ se kaŋ goono ga te neewo." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkos, ay kasu hangasino g'araŋ fo. Markos, Barnaba waymayzo mo goono g'araŋ fo. Araŋ jin ka du lordi a boŋ, d'a kaa araŋ do araŋ m'a zumandi." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkos, ay kasu hangasino g'araŋ fo. Markos, Barnaba waymayzo mo goono g'araŋ fo. Araŋ jin ka du lordi a boŋ, d'a kaa araŋ do araŋ m'a zumandi." 
Colossians4:11 Yasuwa mo, kaŋ se i ga ne Yustos, goono g'araŋ fo. Ikulu Yahudance yaŋ no. Ngey hinne no ga ti ay goy hangasiney Irikoy koytara se kaŋ n'ay saajaw." 
Colossians4:12 Abafaras mo, kaŋ ga ti araŋ bora, Almasihu Yesu tamo, g'araŋ fo. Alwaati kulu a goono ga kookari araŋ se nga adduwey ra zama araŋ ma kay timmanteyaŋ da toonanteyaŋ Irikoy miila kulu ra." 
Colossians4:13 Zama ay g'a seeda: a go ga taabi araŋ se gumo, da ngey mo se kaŋ yaŋ go Lawodisiya da Hiyarapolis." 
Colossians4:14 Lokotoro Luka, iri baakwa, da Dimas goono g'araŋ fo." 
Colossians4:15 Araŋ ma nya-izey fo kaŋ yaŋ go Lawodisiya. Araŋ ma Nimfas da nga windo ra Almasihu marga fo. 
Colossians4:16 Waati kaŋ i na tira wo caw araŋ do, i m'a caw mo Lawodisiya Almasihu marga ra. Araŋ mo, araŋ ma Lawodisiya tira caw." 
Colossians4:17 Araŋ ma ne Arkipas se a ma haggoy da saajaw goyo kaŋ a ta Rabbi do, hal a m'a toonandi." 
Colossians4:18 Ay, Bulos no ka fooyaŋ wo hantum d'ay bumbo kamba. Araŋ ma fongu kaŋ ay go hawante kasu ra. Gomni ma bara araŋ banda." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ay, Bulos, da Sila nda Timotiyos, iri go ga Tassalonika borey Almasihu* marga fo kaŋ go Baaba Irikoy da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu ra. Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara araŋ banda." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Iri goono ga Irikoy saabu waati kulu araŋ kulu sabbay se, waati kaŋ iri ga fongu araŋ adduwa ra." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Iri goono ga fongu waati kulu nd'araŋ goyo cimbeeri ra, d'araŋ saajaw goyo baakasinay ra, d'araŋ beeja ra suuro mo kaŋ go iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu ra, iri Baabo Irikoy jine." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Nya-izey, araŋ kaŋ Irikoy ga ba, iri ga bay kaŋ a n'araŋ suuban no." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Zama iri Baaru Hanna, manti sanni hinne no a kaa d'a araŋ do bo, amma hala nda dabari, da Biya* Hanno mo. A kaa tabbatante mo gumo. Zama araŋ ga bay goray kaŋ dumi iri te araŋ game ra araŋ sabbay se." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Araŋ ciya iri dondonkoyaŋ da Rabbi wane yaŋ mo, za kaŋ araŋ n'a sanno ta taabi boobo ra, da Biya Hanno farhã ra mo." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Hal araŋ ciya di-ka-dondonyaŋ hari borey kulu se kaŋ go ga cimandi Masidoniya laabo ra, da Akaya laabo ra mo." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Zama araŋ do no Rabbi sanno sintin ka yooje, hal a koy Masidoniya nda Akaya ra. Day manti Masidoniya nda Akaya ra hinne no bo, amma araŋ Irikoy cimandiyaŋ baaro koy naŋ kulu, hal iri si hay kulu ci koyne." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Zama ngey bumbey go ga dede iri boŋ da furoyaŋ kaŋ dumi iri te araŋ do. I go ga dede mo mate kaŋ cine araŋ na toorey naŋ ka bare Irikoy do, zama araŋ ma may Irikoy cimi-cimo, fundikoono se," 
1Thessalonians1:10 k'a Izo kaŋ ga fun beena ra hangan mo. Izo din ga ti Yesu, kaŋ Irikoy n'a tunandi ka kaa buukoy game ra. Nga no g'iri faaba bine futay _alwaato|_ kaŋ ga kaa gaa." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Zama, nya-izey, araŋ bumbey ga bay kaŋ iri furoyaŋ araŋ do mana te yaamo." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Iri jin ka maa gurzugay da wowi boobo Filibi kwaara ra, mate kaŋ araŋ ga bay. Amma iri te bine-gaabi iri Irikoyo ra ka Irikoy Baaru Hanna salaŋ araŋ se, baa kaŋ gaabakasina boobo go no." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Zama iri yaamaryaŋ, manti siiriyaŋ ra no a go, manti nda ziibi wane mo no, manti mo gulinci ra no." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Amma mate kaŋ cine Irikoy n'iri gosi hal iri bara yaddante yaŋ a se, hal a na Baaru Hanna daŋ iri kambe ra, yaadin cine no iri goono ga salaŋ. Iri go ga salaŋ manti zama iri ma kaan borey se bo, amma zama iri ma kaan Irikoy se, nga kaŋ g'iri biney neesi." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Zama araŋ ga bay kaŋ iri mana sanni kaanoyaŋ ci baa ce fo. Iri mana sanni ci biniyay kobay ra, (Irikoy no ga ti seeda)." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Iri mana darza ceeci mo borey do, d'araŋ do no wala boro fo do no, baa kaŋ iri gonda dabari iri m'araŋ tiŋandi, iri kaŋ ga ti Almasihu diyey." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Amma iri ciya baanikomyaŋ araŋ game ra, danga mate kaŋ cine ize hampako ga haggoy da nga izey." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Yaadin no iri mo, iri gonda araŋ muraadu gumo. Iri maa kaani iri m'araŋ no, manti Irikoy Baaru Hanna hinne bo, amma baa iri fundey mo, zama araŋ ciya iri se baakasinay hari gumo." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Nya-izey, araŋ ga fongu nda iri goyo d'iri taabo. Iri goy cin da zaari zama iri ma si boro kulu tiŋandi araŋ game ra. Yaadin no iri te ka Irikoy Baaru Hanna waazu araŋ se." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Araŋ ya seedayaŋ no, goray hanna, da adilitaray gora, da gora kaŋ sinda jance kaŋ dumi iri cabe araŋ game ra, araŋ kaŋ goono ga cimandi. Irikoy mo ga ti seeda." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Araŋ ga bay mate kaŋ iri goro araŋ boro fo kulu se, sanda baaba nda nga izey cine." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Iri n'araŋ yaamar, iri n'araŋ bine gaabandi, iri n'araŋ ŋwaaray araŋ ma diraw te kaŋ ga saba nda Irikoy beerandiyaŋ, nga kaŋ g'araŋ ce nga bumbo koytara nda nga darza ra." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Woodin sabbay se no iri goono ga Irikoy saabu waati kulu, zama waato kaŋ araŋ na Irikoy Sanno ta kaŋ araŋ maa iri do, araŋ n'a ta manti danga borey sanni no, amma mate kaŋ a go da cimi, Irikoy Sanno no. A goono ga goy araŋ ra mo, araŋ kaŋ ga ti cimandikoy." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Zama araŋ, ay nya-izey, araŋ kulu ciya dondonkoyaŋ Irikoy margey kaŋ yaŋ go Yahudiya ra Almasihu Yesu ra se. Zama araŋ mo na taabi haŋ araŋ dumey kambe ra sanda mate kaŋ i na taabi haŋ Yahudancey* do." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Ngey no ka Rabbi Yesu nda annabey wi. I n'iri mo gaaray. I si kaan Irikoy se, i goono ga gaaba nda borey kulu mo." 
1Thessalonians2:16 I goono g'iri ganji iri ma salaŋ dumi* cindey se hal i ma du faaba. Woodin gaa no i ga ngey zunubey toonandi alwaati kulu. Amma _Irikoy|_ futay toonanta zumbu i boŋ. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Nya-izey, i n'iri fay d'araŋ alwaati kayna, manti bina ra bo, amma gaaham ra. Amma iri wo, iri ga tonton ka kookari gumo da anniya, iri ma du ka di araŋ moydumey." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Zama iri ga ba iri ma kaa araŋ do, sanku fa ay Bulos, ay ba ay ma kaa araŋ do kaŋ manti ce fo, amma Saytan n'iri ganji." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Zama ifo ga ti iri beeja, d'iri farhã, d'iri farhã boŋtoba? Manti araŋ no, iri Rabbi Yesu jine a kaayaŋo waate?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Zama araŋ no ga ti iri darza d'iri farhã. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Woodin sabbay se no, waato kaŋ iri mana ye ka hin suuru koyne, iri di kaŋ a ga boori iri hinne ma goro Atina kwaara." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Iri mo n'iri nya-izo Timotiyos donton, kaŋ ga ti Irikoy goy-teeri Almasihu Baaru Hanna ra. Iri n'a donton zama a m'araŋ sinji, a m'araŋ biney gaabandi mo araŋ cimbeero ra," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hala boro kulu ma si ye banda masiibey din sabbay se. Zama araŋ bumbey ga bay kaŋ i na woodin yaŋ waadu iri se. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Zama haciika za iri go araŋ do, iri soobay ka ci araŋ se kaŋ taabi ga ba ka kaa iri gaa. Kala woodin te mo, mate kaŋ araŋ ga bay." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Woodin sabbay se no ay mo, waato kaŋ ay mana du ka hin suuru koyne, ay donton hal ay ma du k'araŋ cimbeero bay, a ma si te mate kulu kaŋ cine no, siikwa m'araŋ si, hal iri goyo ma ciya yaamo." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Amma sohõ kaŋ Timotiyos kaa ka fun araŋ do, a kande iri se baaru hanno araŋ cimbeero d'araŋ baakasina boŋ. A ne araŋ gonda fonguyaŋ hanno iri se alwaati kulu. A ne mo kaŋ araŋ gonda iri diyaŋ muraadu, danga mate kaŋ iri mo gonda araŋ diyaŋ muraadu." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Woodin sabbay se, nya-izey, iri taabey d'iri kankamey kulu ra, iri du bine-gaabi araŋ sabbay se araŋ cimbeero do." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Zama sohõ d'araŋ goono ga sinji Rabbi ra, iri wo ga funa." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Zama saabuyaŋ woofo dumi no iri ga yeti Irikoy se araŋ sabbay se, da farhã kulu kaŋ iri goono ga te se araŋ sabbay se Irikoy jine?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Cin da zaari iri goono ga te adduwa gumo iri ma du ka di araŋ moydumey ka haŋ kaŋ gaze toonandi araŋ cimbeero ra. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Sohõ Irikoy kaŋ ti iri Baabo bumbo, d'iri Rabbi Yesu m'iri fonda soola hal iri ma du ka kaa araŋ do." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Rabbi mo ma naŋ araŋ ma koy jina ka tonton baakasinay ra araŋ da cara se da borey kulu se mo, mate kaŋ cine iri wano mo goono ga te araŋ se." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Araŋ ma koy jina ka tonton baakasinay ra hal a ma araŋ biney sinji, sinjiyaŋ kaŋ sinda jance, hananyaŋ ra iri Baaba Irikoy jine, iri Rabbi Yesu kaayaŋo alwaato ra, waati kaŋ a ga kaa, nga nda nga hanantey kulu nga banda." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Woodin banda, nya-izey, iri g'araŋ ŋwaaray, iri g'araŋ yaamar mo Rabbi Yesu ra. Araŋ dondon iri do mate kaŋ araŋ ga hima ka dira ka kaan Irikoy se, araŋ goono ga dira mo yaadin cine. Kal araŋ ma tonton mo ka koy jina a ra." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Zama araŋ ga bay lordey* kaŋ iri no araŋ se Rabbi Yesu maa gaa. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Zama wo kaŋ Irikoy ga ba ga ti araŋ hananyaŋo. Araŋ m'araŋ boŋ fay da zina dumi kulu. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Araŋ ra boro fo kulu ma bay mate kaŋ cine a ga nga gaahamo gaay hananyaŋ da darza ra," 
1Thessalonians4:5 manti bine* ibaay laaley ra bo, danga dumi cindey cine kaŋ yaŋ si Irikoy bay." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Boro kulu ma si nga nya-izo darga k'a zamba haya din ra, zama Rabbi ya banako no hayey din kulu ra, danga mate kaŋ cine iri jin ka ci araŋ se k'araŋ kaseeti mo." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Zama Irikoy n'iri ce, manti zama iri ma goro ziibi ra se bo, amma zama iri ma goro hananyaŋ ra se." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Woodin sabbay se mo boro kaŋ wangu _dondonandiyaŋey din|_, manti boro se n'a wangu bo, amma Irikoy se no a wangu, nga kaŋ goono g'araŋ no nga Biya Hanna." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Amma nya-izey baakasina ciine ra, araŋ si laami iri ma hantum araŋ se, zama araŋ bumbey, Irikoy n'araŋ dondonandi araŋ ma ba care." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Haciika yaadin no araŋ goono ga te nya-izey kulu se kaŋ go Masidoniya laabo kulu ra. Amma iri goono g'araŋ yaamar, nya-izey, araŋ ma tonton ka koy jina." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Araŋ ma kookari ka goro nda baani. Wa laakal d'araŋ boŋ muraadey, ka goy d'araŋ kambey mate kaŋ cine iri n'araŋ no lordi." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Zama araŋ ma goray te kaŋ ga saba borey kaŋ yaŋ go taray jine, araŋ ma si jaŋ hay kulu mo." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Amma, nya-izey, iri si ba araŋ ma jaŋ ka bay ngey kaŋ yaŋ kani ciine ra, hal araŋ ma si te bine saray danga boro cindey kaŋ yaŋ sinda beeje cine." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Za kaŋ iri cimandi kaŋ Yesu bu, a tun koyne, yaadin gaa iri cimandi mo kaŋ borey kaŋ yaŋ kani Yesu ra, Irikoy ga kand'ey a banda." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Zama woone no iri goono ga ci araŋ se Rabbi sanno boŋ: iri kaŋ ga ti fundikooney, kaŋ yaŋ ga cindi hala Rabbi kaayaŋo hane, iri si borey kaŋ yaŋ kani jin baa kayna." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Zama Rabbi bumbo ga fun beena ra da jinde gaabikooni, da malayka* jine boro fo jinde, da Irikoy hillo jinda mo. Buukoy kaŋ yaŋ go Almasihu ra no ga jin ka tun." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Woodin banda iri kaŋ ga ti fundikooney, kaŋ yaŋ ga cindi, Rabbi g'iri sambu sabat i banda kala burey ra ka nga gar beene batama ra. Yaadin no iri ga goro hal abada Rabbi banda." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Woodin sabbay se araŋ ma care bine gaabandi nda sanney din. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Amma alwaatey da zamaney ciine ra, ay nya-izey, araŋ si laami iri ma hay kulu hantum araŋ se i baaro boŋ." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Zama araŋ bumbey ga bay gumo kaŋ Rabbi zaaro ga kaa danga cin ra zay cine. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Waati kaŋ i goono ga ne: «Baani nda laakal kanay!» kala halaciyaŋ ma kaa, fap folloŋ! ka kaŋ i boŋ, mate kaŋ cine hay-zaŋay ga kaa waykuno gaa. Faaba si no i se mo baa kayna." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Amma araŋ wo, nya-izey, manti kubay ra no araŋ go, hala zaaro din m'araŋ jirsi danga zay cine." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Zama araŋ kulu annura izeyaŋ no da kaari izeyaŋ mo. Iri manti cin wala kubay wane yaŋ. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Yaadin gaa iri ma si jirbi danga boro cindey cine, amma iri m'iri mo hay k'iri boŋ di." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Zama borey kaŋ goono ga jirbi, cin ra no i ga jirbi. Borey kaŋ goono ga baji haŋ ka bugu mo, cin ra no i ga bugu." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Amma iri kaŋ manti cin wane yaŋ, iri ma hin iri boŋ ka cimbeeri nda baakasinay daŋ i ma ciya iri se gande gaa kosaray, ka faaba beeja mo daŋ a ma ciya iri se wongu fuula." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Zama Irikoy mana iri waadu nga bine futa se, amma faaba duure se iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu do." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Nga no ka bu iri sabbay se hal d'iri goono ga mo hay no wala nd'iri goono ga kani no, iri ma funa nga banda." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Woodin sabbay se araŋ ma care bine gaabandi, wa care gaa jina-koyyaŋ ra mo, mate kaŋ cine araŋ goono ga te." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Sohõ iri g'araŋ ŋwaaray, nya-izey, araŋ ma bara nda lalabu borey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga goy araŋ game ra se, kaŋ yaŋ goono g'araŋ candi, kaŋ yaŋ goono g'araŋ kaseeti mo." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Araŋ m'i beerandi gumo baakasinay ra i goyey sabbay se. Laakal kanay ma bara araŋ game ra. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Iri mo g'araŋ yaamar, nya-izey, araŋ ma kaseeti borey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga hawfunay goray te gaa. Araŋ ma bine kulu kaŋ ga humburu gaabandi. Wa londibuuney gaa. Wa suuru nda boro kulu." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Wa haggoy boro kulu ma si ye ka laala bana nda laala. Amma waati kulu wa ceeci haŋ kaŋ ga ti ihanno care se da boro kulu mo se. 
1Thessalonians5:16 Araŋ ma farhã alwaati kulu. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Araŋ ma adduwa te waati kulu. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Hay kulu ra araŋ ma saabu, zama woodin ga ti Irikoy miila araŋ se Almasihu Yesu ra." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Araŋ ma si Biya _Hanno|_ ganji nga goyo. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Araŋ ma si donda annabitaray. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Araŋ ma hay kulu neesi ka ihanno gaay. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Araŋ ma fay da goy laalo kulu dumi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Irikoy bumbo, kaŋ ga laakal kanay no, m'araŋ hananyaŋo kubandi. Irikoy m'araŋ boro fo kulu, biya* da fundo da gaahamo kulu, gaay kaŋ sinda jance, iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu kaayaŋo alwaato ra." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Irikoy ga woodin te mo, zama nga kaŋ g'araŋ ce ya naanaykoy no." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nya-izey, wa adduwa te iri se." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Wa nya-izey kulu fo da baakasinay garbe sunsumyaŋ hanna. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ay g'araŋ ŋwaaray Rabbi maa ra, araŋ ma tira wo caw nya-izey kulu se." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu gomno ma bara araŋ banda. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ay, Bulos, da Sila nda Timotiyos, iri go ga Tassalonika borey Almasihu* marga fo kaŋ go iri Baabo Irikoy da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu ra." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara araŋ banda, kaŋ yaŋ ga fun Baaba Irikoy da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu do." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Nya-izey, a ga hima iri ma Irikoy saabu alwaati kulu araŋ sabbay se. Woodin no ga hagu, za kaŋ araŋ cimbeero goono ga beeri gumo. Araŋ baakasina mo kaŋ araŋ boro fo kulu goono ga cabe care se go ga tonton." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Woodin sabbay se iri bumbey goono g'araŋ sifa Irikoy margey ra araŋ suuro d'araŋ cimbeero sabbay se, araŋ gurzugayey kulu ra da kankamey kaŋ ra araŋ goono ga hin suuru." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Woodin ga ti seeda Irikoy cimi ciito boŋ, kaŋ ga naŋ Irikoy m'araŋ lasaabu kaŋ araŋ to araŋ ma furo nga koytara ra, kaŋ se haciika araŋ goono ga maa taabi." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Zama adilitaray hari no Irikoy se a ma kankami ye borey kaŋ yaŋ goono g'araŋ kankam din se. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Adilitaray hari mo no a m'araŋ kaŋ go kankami ra no fulanzamay iri banda. Woodin yaŋ ga te waati kaŋ Rabbi Yesu ga bangay ka fun beena ra da nga malayka* dabarikooney danji beele ra. 
2Thessalonians1:8 A ga borey kaŋ yaŋ si Irikoy bay ciiti, da borey kaŋ yaŋ wangu ka iri Rabbi Yesu Baaru Hanna gana." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Borey din ga du alhakku kaŋ ti halaciyaŋ, hal abada wane, kaŋ g'i fay da Rabbi moyduma d'a dabaro darza." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Woodin ga te zaaro din ra waati kaŋ Yesu ga kaa ka du beeray nga hanantey ra. Borey kulu kaŋ yaŋ cimandi ga dambara nd'a mo ngey game ra. Zama araŋ na seeda kaŋ iri te araŋ se cimandi. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Woodin sabbay se binde, alwaati kulu iri goono ga adduwa te araŋ se hal iri Irikoyo m'araŋ lasaabu kaŋ araŋ to ceeyaŋo wo. A ma muraadu hanno kulu da cimbeeri goy kulu toonandi araŋ se da nga dabaro mo," 
2Thessalonians1:12 hal iri Rabbi Yesu maa ma du beeray araŋ ra, araŋ mo ma du beeray a do, iri Irikoyo da Rabbi Yesu Almasihu gomno boŋ." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Sohõ, nya-izey, iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu kaayaŋo ciine ra, da iri marguyaŋo a do, iri goono g'araŋ ŋwaaray" 
2Thessalonians2:2 araŋ ma si zinji nda waasi araŋ laakaley ra. Araŋ laakaley ma si tun mo biya* fo fahamandiyaŋ sabbay se, wala sanni fo sabbay se, wala tira kaŋ i ne, way, a fun iri do sabbay se, kaŋ ne, way, Rabbi zaaro jin ka kaa." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Mate kulu kaŋ no, wa si naŋ boro kulu m'araŋ halli. Zama zaaro din si kaa kala nda murteyaŋo jin ka te. Asariya taamukwa mo ma bangay jina, nga kaŋ ti halaciyaŋ izo." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Nga no ga murte ka nga boŋ beerandi ka bisa hay kulu kaŋ se i ga ne irikoy, wala hay kulu kaŋ se i goono ga sombu, hal a ga goro Irikoy* fuwo ra, ka nga boŋ fe ka ne nga wo Irikoy no." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Araŋ si fongu kaŋ ay na hayey din ci araŋ se za waato kaŋ ay go araŋ do? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Sohõ mo araŋ ga bay haŋ kaŋ no goono g'a gaay, kaŋ ga naŋ a ma si bangay kala nga alwaato ra." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Zama asariya taamuyaŋ gundo goono ga goy baa sohõ. Kala day nga kaŋ goono g'a gaay sohõ g'a te hal i ma nga kaa fonda gaa. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Waato din gaa no asariya taamukwa ga bangay. Rabbi g'a zeeri nda nga me funsuyaŋo k'a halaci mo da nga kaayaŋo kaaro. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Asariya taamukwa din kaayaŋo ga te Saytan* dabaro ra, da dabari goy kulu dumi, da alaama, da dambara hari kaŋ yaŋ ciya tangari wane yaŋ," 
2Thessalonians2:10 da fafagay goy laalo kulu dumi borey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga halaci se. I goono ga halaci zama i wangu ka ba cimo hal i ma du faaba. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Woodin sabbay se mo no Irikoy ga halliyaŋ gaabikooni samba i se hal i ma tangaro cimandi. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Gaa no borey kulu kaŋ yaŋ mana cimo cimandi, amma i maa kaani goy laalo teeyaŋ ra, Irikoy m'i ciiti ka zeeri." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Iri ga hima ka Irikoy saabu alwaati kulu araŋ sabbay se, nya-izey kaŋ Rabbi ga ba. Zama Irikoy n'araŋ suuban za sintina araŋ ma du faaba se, fayyaŋo kaŋ Biya* _Hanno|_ te araŋ se da cimi gaa deyaŋo do." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Woodin sabbay se a n'araŋ ce iri Baaru Hanna do hal araŋ ma du iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu darza. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Woodin sabbay se binde, nya-izey, araŋ ma kay, araŋ ma dondonandiyaŋey kaŋ iri n'araŋ dondonandi nd'a gaay, da me-da-me no wala nd'iri tira do waney." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu bumbo d'iri Baabo Irikoy m'araŋ biney gaabandi k'araŋ sinji goy hanno nda sanni hanno kulu ra. Nga no ba iri k'iri no hal abada bine-gaabi nda beeje hanno gomni do. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Woodin banda, nya-izey, araŋ ma te iri se adduwa, hala Rabbi sanno ma waasu ka say-say ka du beeray mo, mate kaŋ cine a goono ga te araŋ do." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Wa ŋwaaray mo iri ma fun boro laalo siirantey kambe ra, zama manti boro kulu no ga ti cimi fonda ganakoyaŋ bo." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Amma Rabbi ya naanaykoy no. A g'araŋ sinji k'araŋ wa da Izefuto. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Iri gonda araŋ gaa naanay mo Rabbi do kaŋ araŋ goono ga hayey kaŋ iri n'araŋ lordi nd'a din te, araŋ ga soobay k'i te mo." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Rabbi mo m'araŋ biney candi ka kande Irikoy baakasina da Almasihu suuro ra mo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Amma iri g'araŋ lordi, nya-izey, iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu maa ra, araŋ ma fay da nya-ize kulu kaŋ goono ga hawfunay goray te, kaŋ manti nda dondonandiyaŋey kaŋ araŋ ta iri do." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Araŋ bumbey ga bay mate kaŋ cine a ga hima araŋ m'iri dondon. Zama iri wo mana hawfunay goray te araŋ game ra. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Iri mana boro kulu ŋwaari ŋwa yaamo. Amma goy da taabi ra no cin da zaari iri goy hal iri ma si boro kulu tiŋandi araŋ ra. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Manti danga iri sinda dabari no bo, amma zama iri m'iri boŋ ciya deedandiyaŋ hari araŋ se, hal araŋ ma dondon iri do." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Zama baa waato kaŋ iri go araŋ do, iri n'araŋ lordi nda woodin ka ne: boro kulu kaŋ wangu ka goy, bora koy ma si ŋwa mo." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Zama iri go ga maa baaru kaŋ araŋ game ra boro fooyaŋ goono ga hawfunay goray te. I si ga goy baa kayna, amma kawlanteyaŋ no." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Borey din dumi yaŋ binde iri goono g'i lordi k'i yaamar Rabbi Yesu Almasihu ra, ka ne i ma goy da laakal kanay ka ngey boŋ ŋwaayandi mo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Araŋ mo, nya-izey, araŋ ma si farga nda ihanno teeyaŋ." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Boro kulu kaŋ mana iri sanno gana kaŋ go tira wo ra, araŋ ma haggoy da bora din, araŋ ma si margu nd'a zama a ma du ka haaw." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Araŋ ma s'a lasaabu danga ibare cine bo, amma araŋ m'a yaamar danga nya-ize cine." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Sohõ Irikoy bumbo, kaŋ ga ti Laakal-Kanay-Koy m'araŋ no laakal kanay alwaati kulu da mate kulu kaŋ no. Rabbi ma goro araŋ kulu banda." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ay, Bulos, ay fooyaŋo neeya d'ay bumbo kamba. Woone no ga ti seeda ay tirey kulu ra. Ya-cine no ay goono ga hantum." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu gomno ma bara araŋ kulu banda. 
1Timothy1:1 Ay, Bulos, ay ya Almasihu Yesu diya no, Irikoy iri Faabakwa da Almasihu Yesu kaŋ ti iri beeja lordo boŋ." 
1Timothy1:2 Ay go ga tira wo hantum Timotiyos se, ay ize no da cimi cimbeeri* ra. Gomni nda suuji nda laakal kanay ma bara ni banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun iri Baabo Irikoy d'iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu do." 
1Timothy1:3 Ay ga ba ni ma goro Afasos kwaara ra, danga mate kaŋ cine ay na ni ŋwaaray waato kaŋ ay goono ga koy Masidoniya, hala ni ma boro fooyaŋ lordi ka ne i ma si dondonandiyaŋ waani fo dondonandi." 
1Timothy1:4 I ma si laakal ye jandey da asuli* lasaabuyaŋ kaŋ sinda me gaa mo. Woodin yaŋ no ga kande kosongu kaŋ si naŋ Irikoy goyo ma koy da jina cimbeeri ra. 
1Timothy1:5 Amma lordo wo mafaaro ga ti baakasinay kaŋ ga fun bine kaŋ ga hanan do da bine lasaabu hanno nda cimbeeri kaŋ sinda munaficitaray mo do. 
1Timothy1:6 Boro fooyaŋ mo na hayey din harta ka kamba ka furo sanniyaŋ kaŋ sinda nafa ciyaŋ ra. 
1Timothy1:7 I ga ba ngey ma ciya asariya* dondonandikoyaŋ, amma i si ga faham da haŋ kaŋ yaŋ ngey goono ga ci, da haŋ kaŋ yaŋ ngey goono ga daahirandi." 
1Timothy1:8 Amma iri ga bay kaŋ asariya ga boori da boro ga goy d'a mate kaŋ a ga hima. 
1Timothy1:9 Iri ga bay kaŋ i mana asariya te boro hanno se, amma asariya taamukoy, da murtantey, da borey kaŋ yaŋ wangu Irikoy, da zunubikooney, da borey kaŋ yaŋ si lalabu Irikoy da hay kulu kaŋ ga hanan gaa, da baaba wiikoy da nya wiikoy, da boro-wiyey sabbay se," 
1Timothy1:10 da zina-teerey, da aru-baay, da boro zaykoy, da tangarikomey, da borey kaŋ yaŋ ga ze tangari boŋ, da hay kulu kaŋ ga gaaba nda dondonandiyaŋ cimi-cimo." 
1Timothy1:11 Dondonandiyaŋo wo ga ti Baaru Hanna wano, kaŋ i talfi ay gaa, kaŋ fun Irikoy darza nda albarka Koyo do." 
1Timothy1:12 Ay goono ga saabu Almasihu Yesu iri Rabbo se, nga kaŋ n'ay no gaabi. Ay go ga saabu zama a n'ay lasaabu naanaykoy k'ay daŋ nga goyo ra," 
1Timothy1:13 baa kaŋ waato ay ya Irikoy wanga no, da gurzugandiko, da halaciko. Amma ay du suuji zama ay na woodin yaŋ te jaŋ-ka-bayyaŋ da cimbeeri-jaŋay ra mo." 
1Timothy1:14 Iri Rabbi gomno mo baa gumo, da cimbeeri nda baakasinay kaŋ yaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra." 
1Timothy1:15 Sanno wo naanaykoy no kaŋ to boro kulu m'a ta: Almasihu Yesu kaa ndunnya ra zama nga ma zunubikooney faaba. I ra mo ay ga ti ikulu ibeero. 
1Timothy1:16 Amma woodin sabbay se ay du suuji, hala Yesu Almasihu na nga suuru kuuko bangandi ay do, ay kaŋ ga ti zunubikooney kulu ibeero, zama ay ma ciya deedandiyaŋ hari borey se kaŋ yaŋ ga aniya k'a cimandi ka du fundi hal abada." 
1Timothy1:17 Sohõ, zamaney Koyo, nga kaŋ si bare ka sara, kaŋ boro kulu si di a, Irikoy follonka, beeray da darza ma bara a gaa hal abada abadin. Amin!" 
1Timothy1:18 Ya ay izo Timotiyos, ay goono ga lordo wo haw ni gaa, annabitara do kaŋ i ci ni boŋ za doŋ. Woodin no ga ti, annabitaray sanney din boŋ, ni ma tangam da tangami hanna." 
1Timothy1:19 Ma cimbeero gaay nda bine lasaabu hanno, kaŋ boro fooyaŋ tuti ka hibandi ngey gaa, ka ngey cimbeero jisandi, sanda mate kaŋ cine hi ga jisi hari ra." 
1Timothy1:20 Himinayos da Iskandari go borey din ra. Ay n'i no Saytan* se zama i ma dondon i ma si Irikoy kayna. 
1Timothy2:1 Sintina gaa binde, ay go ga _Almasihu ganakoy|_ yaamar i ma hãayaŋ te, da adduwa, da ŋwaarayyaŋ, da saabuyaŋ borey kulu se." 
1Timothy2:2 I ma te adduwa bonkooney da boro beerey se, zama iri m'iri goray te da baani laakal kanay ra, Irikoy ganayaŋ da goray hanno kulu ra." 
1Timothy2:3 Woodin no ga boori, a ga kaan mo Irikoy iri Faabakwa se," 
1Timothy2:4 nga kaŋ a miila ga ti borey kulu ma du faaba ka du ka cimo bay. 
1Timothy2:5 Zama Irikoy folloŋ no go no, sasabandiko folloŋ mo no go borey da Irikoy game ra, nga wo boro no, Almasihu Yesu." 
1Timothy2:6 A na nga boŋ no mo zama nga ma ciya fansayaŋ hari boro kulu se. Woodin no ga ti seeda kaŋ te seeda din alwaato bumbo ra. 
1Timothy2:7 Woodin se no Irikoy n'ay daŋ ay ma ciya waazuko da diya, dumi* cindey se dondonandiko cimi nda cimbeeri ra. (Ay go ga cimi ci, ay si taari bo.)" 
1Timothy2:8 Ay binde ga ba alborey ma te adduwa nangu kulu ra. I ma kambe hannoyaŋ salle, manti nda futay, manti mo da kakaw." 
1Timothy2:9 Yaadin mo no ay ga ba wayborey ma bankaaray kaŋ ga hagu daŋ da gaakuri, da lalabu, manti nda turu ka doodo daŋyaŋ, wala wura, wala tondi hiir'ize caadanteyaŋ, wala bankaaray caadanteyaŋ." 
1Timothy2:10 Amma i ma taalam da goy hanno yaŋ, mate kaŋ ga hima nd'a wayborey se kaŋ yaŋ goono ga Irikoy gana." 
1Timothy2:11 Wa naŋ wayboro ma dondon dangayyaŋ ra da boŋ-ye-gandayaŋ ra. 
1Timothy2:12 Amma ay si yadda wayboro se a ma dondonandi wala a ma alborey dabari, amma a ma bara dangayyaŋ ra." 
1Timothy2:13 Zama Adamu no i jin ka te, gaa Hawa." 
1Timothy2:14 Koyne, manti Adamu no _Iblisi|_ halli bo, wayboro no a halli, hal a na Irikoy lordo daaru." 
1Timothy2:15 Amma a ga du dogonay ize hayyaŋ ra d'a soobay ka gana cimbeeri, da baakasinay, da bine hanante, da laakal ra." 
1Timothy3:1 Sanno wo naanaykoy no: da boro go ga Almasihu marga jine boro goy ceeci, goy hanno no bora go ga ceeci." 
1Timothy3:2 Jine boro mo, tilas kal a ma bara boro kaŋ i si du ka jance, wayboro folloŋ kurnye, boŋ hinko, laakalkooni, boro kaŋ gaa lalabu go, yaw gaayko, boro kaŋ ga waani dondonandiyaŋ." 
1Timothy3:3 A ma si ciya baji boobo hanko, wala yanjekaari, amma a ma ciya bine baanikoy. A ma si ciya kusuumante, a ma si ciya nooru baako mo." 
1Timothy3:4 A ma waani ka nga boŋ windo dabari hal a ma boori, kaŋ ga naŋ a izey ma maa a se k'a beerandi." 
1Timothy3:5 Zama nda boro si waani ka nga boŋ windo dabari, mate no a ga te ka hin ka Irikoy marga kuru?" 
1Timothy3:6 A ma si ciya mo ganako taji, hal a ma koy ka boŋbeeray te ka kaŋ ciito kaŋ dumi ra Iblisi kaŋ." 
1Timothy3:7 A ga tilas mo a ma ciya boro kaŋ gonda seeda hanno borey do kaŋ yaŋ si Almasihu marga ra, hal a ma si ciya wowi hari ka kaŋ Iblisi hirrimi ra." 
1Timothy3:8 A ga tilas mo saajawkoy ma ciya boroyaŋ kaŋ gaa lalabu go. I ma si ciya me-hinka koyyaŋ. I ma si doona baji boobo haŋyaŋ, i ma si riiba ziibo bini." 
1Timothy3:9 I ma cimbeeri gundo gaay bine lasaabu hanno ra. 
1Timothy3:10 Borey din mo, i m'i gosi jina, woodin banda nda janceyaŋ hari si i gaa, i ma te saajawkoyaŋ." 
1Timothy3:11 Yaadin mo no wandey ma ciya boroyaŋ kaŋ gaa lalabu go. I ma si ciya kormotanteyaŋ, amma i ma ciya boŋ hinkoyaŋ, da naanaykoyyaŋ hay kulu ra." 
1Timothy3:12 Saajawko kulu mo ma ciya wayboro folloŋ kurnye. I ma waani ka ngey izey da ngey windey dabari hal a ma boori. 
1Timothy3:13 Zama borey kaŋ yaŋ ga saajawko goy te a ma boori ga du beeray nangu ngey boŋ se. I ga du bine-gaabi bambata mo cimbeeri ra kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra. 
1Timothy3:14 Ay go ga hayey din hantum ni se, baa kaŋ ay gonda beeje ay ma kaa ni do d'a tonton kayna." 
1Timothy3:15 Amma d'ay gay, kala day ni ma bay mate kaŋ a ga hima borey ma ngey boŋ cabe Irikoy fuwo ra, kaŋ ga ti Irikoy fundikoono marga, kaŋ ga ti cimi bonjara da nga gaayyaŋ haro." 
1Timothy3:16 Sikka si, iri Irikoy ganayaŋ gundo ga beeri: Irikoy bangay gaaham ra. Biya* _Hanno|_ n'a cabe adilitaraykoy. Malaykey di a. I n'a waazo te dumi cindey game ra. I n'a cimandi ndunnya ra. I n'a sambu beene darza ra." 
1Timothy4:1 Amma Biya _Hanno|_ go ga ci taray kwaaray ka ne: alwaati banantey ra boro fooyaŋ ga murte cimi fonda gaa, ka laakal ye biyey kaŋ yaŋ ga borey fafagu gaa, da dondonandiyaŋey kaŋ yaŋ ga fun follayey do gaa." 
1Timothy4:2 Woodin yaŋ ga te tangarikomey munaficitara ra. Borey din bine lasaabey ga sandi, danga haŋ kaŋ i kakatu da guuru kaŋ i daŋ danji ra." 
1Timothy4:3 I ga wangu borey ma hiiji. I ga ne mo borey ma si ŋwaari dumi fooyaŋ ŋwa kaŋ Irikoy te borey m'i ŋwa nda saabuyaŋ se, borey kaŋ go ga cimandi, kaŋ ga cimi bay mo." 
1Timothy4:4 Zama hay kulu kaŋ Irikoy taka ga boori. I mana hima ka wangu hay kulu d'i g'a ŋwa da saabuyaŋ," 
1Timothy4:5 zama a halal Irikoy sanno da adduwa mo do. 
1Timothy4:6 Da ni ga nya-izey fahamandi nda woodin yaŋ, ni ga ciya Almasihu goy-teeri hanno, kaŋ ga nga boŋ funa nda cimbeeri sanney da dondonandiyaŋ hanna kaŋ ni gana hala hõ." 
1Timothy4:7 Amma ma fay da wayboro zeeney jandey kaŋ yaŋ sinda Irikoy ganayaŋ. Ma ni boŋ gooji Irikoy ganayaŋ fonda ra. 
1Timothy4:8 Zama gaaham goojiyaŋ gonda albarka kayna, amma Irikoy fonda ganayaŋ gonda albarka hay kulu ra, zama a gonda alkawli fundi woone se da wo kaŋ ga kaa mo se." 
1Timothy4:9 Sanno din naanaykoy no kaŋ to boro kulu m'a ta. 
1Timothy4:10 Woodin sabbay se iri go ga goy, iri go ga kookari, zama iri n'iri beeja sinji Irikoy Fundikoono gaa. Nga ga ti boro kulu Faabako, sanku fa ngey kaŋ n'a cimandi binde." 
1Timothy4:11 Ma hayey din lordi k'i dondonandiyaŋ te mo. 
1Timothy4:12 Ma si naŋ boro kulu ma donda ni zankatara, amma ma ciya deedandiyaŋ hari borey kaŋ goono ga cimandi se. Ma ciya yaadin sanni ra, da te-goy, da baakasinay, da cimbeeri, da bine hananyaŋ ra mo." 
1Timothy4:13 Ma laakal ye Irikoy Sanno cawyaŋ gaa Almasihu margey ra, da yaamaryaŋ da dondonandiyaŋ gaa mo, hal ay ma kaa." 
1Timothy4:14 Ma si nooyaŋo kaŋ go ni ra muray, kaŋ i na ni no annabitaray da arkusey* kambe dakeyaŋ do." 
1Timothy4:15 Ma laakal ye hayey din gaa, ma ni boŋ no i se da cimi, hala boro kulu ma ni jina-koyyaŋo bay." 
1Timothy4:16 Ma haggoy da ni boŋ da ni dondonandiyaŋo mo, ma mo ye woodin yaŋ gaa, zama woodin yaŋ teeyaŋ gaa no ni ga ni boŋ faaba, da borey mo kaŋ yaŋ go ga hangan ni se." 
1Timothy5:1 Ma si deeni arkusey gaa, amma m'i yaamar danga ni baaba cine. Arwasey mo danga ni nya-izeyaŋ cine," 
1Timothy5:2 wayboro zeeney mo danga nyayaŋ cine, wo kaŋ yaŋ ga zanka mo danga waymeyaŋ cine, bine hananyaŋ kulu ra." 
1Timothy5:3 Ma wayborey kaŋ kurnyey bu yaŋ beerandi kaŋ ga ti goboroyaŋ da cimi. 
1Timothy5:4 Amma goboro kulu kaŋ gonda izeyaŋ wala haamayaŋ, ma naŋ i ma dondon ka cabe ngey fu almayaaley se jina kaŋ i ga Irikoy gana. I ma bana ngey hayrey se, zama woodin ga kaan Irikoy se." 
1Timothy5:5 Wayboro kaŋ goboro no da cimi, kaŋ sinda boro kulu kaŋ g'a jare, a na nga beeja sinji Irikoy gaa. A go ga mo ye ŋwaarayey da adduwey gaa mo cin da zaari." 
1Timothy5:6 Amma goboro kaŋ ga nga laakalo ye ndunnya kaani gaa ya buuko no za a ga funa. 
1Timothy5:7 M'i lordi nda hayey din, hal i ma goro jance hari si." 
1Timothy5:8 Amma boro kulu kaŋ si ga nga borey saajaw, sanku fa nga almayaaley, a na cimi fonda ze, a jaase boro kaŋ mana cimandi." 
1Timothy5:9 Ma si wayboro kulu hantum goboro d'a mana to jiiri waydu. A ma ciya wayboro kaŋ te alboro folloŋ se wande," 
1Timothy5:10 kaŋ du seeda nga goy hanney se. A ma ciya mo boro kaŋ na izeyaŋ biiri, a na yawyaŋ gaay, a na hanantey cey nyun, a na borey kaŋ go kankami ra gaakasinay, a na goy hanno kulu gana nda kookari." 
1Timothy5:11 Amma saatarey kaŋ kurnyey bu, ma s'i hantum, zama waati kaŋ i tun zalay se ka gaaba nda Almasihu, i ga ba ngey ma hiiji," 
1Timothy5:12 ka kande ciiti ngey boŋ za kaŋ i wangu ngey sintina cimbeero. 
1Timothy5:13 I ga hawfunay dondon mo dira-ka-kayyaŋ ra. Amma manti hawfuna hinne bo, amma i ga ciya mimandakomyaŋ da kormotanteyaŋ kaŋ ga ci haŋ kaŋ si hima nda ciyaŋ." 
1Timothy5:14 Yaadin gaa, ay ga ba saatarey kaŋ kurnyey bu ma hiiji ka izeyaŋ hay. I ma haggoy da ngey fuwey, hal ibara ma si du kobay k'iri maa sara." 
1Timothy5:15 Zama za sohõ afooyaŋ kamba ka Saytan gana. 
1Timothy5:16 Amma wayboro cimandiko kulu, d'a gonda goboroyaŋ, kal a m'i gaakasinay. A ma si marga tiŋandi, zama marga ma goboro cimi-cimey gaa." 
1Timothy5:17 Arkusey kaŋ go ga Almasihu marga dabari hal a ma boori, i m'i lasaabu kaŋ i to i m'i beerandi sorro hinka, sanku fa ngey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga goy _Irikoy Sanno|_ waazo d'a dondonandiyaŋo ra." 
1Timothy5:18 Zama Irikoy Tira Hanna ne: «Yeeji kaŋ go ga kara, ni ma si takunkum daŋ a gaa.» A ne mo: «Goy-teeri to a ma du nga banando.»" 
1Timothy5:19 Ma si kalima ta kaŋ i te arkusu boŋ da manti seeda hinka wala ihinza me ra no. 
1Timothy5:20 Ngey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga zunubi te, ma deeni i gaa marga kulu jine, hala cindey ma du ka humburu." 
1Timothy5:21 Ay go ga ni lordi Irikoy, da Almasihu Yesu, da malayka* suubanantey jine: ma hayey din gaay manti nda baar'a-baar'a teeyaŋ." 
1Timothy5:22 Ma si waasu ka Rabbi goyo kambe dakeyaŋ te boro kulu se. Ma si margu nda boro kulu a zunubey ra. Ni bumbo, ma ni boŋ gaay hananyaŋ ra." 
1Timothy5:23 Ma si hari bi hinne haŋ koyne, amma ma duvan* kayna haŋ ni gunde dooro sabbay se, da ni jante buuno-buuney kaŋ ni ga hatta ka te mo se." 
1Timothy5:24 Boro fooyaŋ zunubey, taray kwaaray no i go, za i man'i ciiti. Afooyaŋ mo, i ga kokor ka bay i gaa." 
1Timothy5:25 Yaadin mo no goy hanney go taray kwaaray. Wo kaŋ yaŋ manti yaadin mo si tugu. 
1Timothy6:1 Borey kulu kaŋ go bannyataray calu* ra ma ngey koyey lasaabu kaŋ i to beeray kulu cine, zama borey ma si Irikoy maa d'iri dondonandiyaŋo jance." 
1Timothy6:2 Bannyey kaŋ koyey ga cimandi ma si donda ngey koyey zama nya-izeyaŋ no. A ga bisa zaati i ma may ka tonton i se, zama borey kaŋ goono ga du i goyo albarka ga ti cimandikoy kaŋ i ga baa gumo. Ma hayey din dondonandi k'i waazu mo." 
1Timothy6:3 Boro kulu kaŋ goono ga dondonandiyaŋ waani fo te, nga no, bora si g'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu sanni cimikoyey ta, da dondonandiyaŋo kaŋ ga saba nda Irikoy ganayaŋ," 
1Timothy6:4 bora din furo boŋbeeray ra. A si hay kulu bay, amma yanje nda kakaw sanni no a ga ba gumo. Woodin yaŋ mo no ga kande canse, da yanje, da alaasiray, da sikkayaŋ laaley," 
1Timothy6:5 da kakawey kaŋ si ban, kaŋ yaŋ fun borey kaŋ laakaley sara yaŋ do. I si cimi bay koyne. I ga tammahã kaŋ Irikoy ganayaŋ ya riiba ceeciyaŋ fondo no." 
1Timothy6:6 Haciika, Irikoy ganayaŋ da bine kaŋ ga ne a wasa nga se, ya riiba bambata no." 
1Timothy6:7 Zama iri mana furo ndunnya ra da hay kulu. Iri si fun a ra mo da hay kulu. 
1Timothy6:8 Amma d'iri gonda ŋwaari nda bankaaray, woodin yaŋ ga wasa iri se." 
1Timothy6:9 Amma borey kaŋ ga ba ngey ma ciya arzakanteyaŋ go ga kaŋ siyaŋ da hirrimi da bine ibaay laalo yaamo boobo ra kaŋ yaŋ ga borey candi ka daŋ hasaraw da halaciyaŋ ra. 
1Timothy6:10 Zama nooru baakasinay ga ti laala dumi kulu kaaji. Woodin ceeciyaŋ do mo no boro fooyaŋ daray ka kamba cimi fonda ganayaŋ gaa, ka ngey boŋ gooru mo da bine saray boobo." 
1Timothy6:11 Amma nin wo, Irikoy bora, kala ni ma zuru hayey din se. Ma adilitaray, da Irikoy ganayaŋ, da baakasinay, da suuru, da lalabu mo gana." 
1Timothy6:12 Ma cimbeeri wongo kaŋ ga ti ihanna te. Ma fundi hal abada di, kaŋ se Irikoy na ni ce, hala ni na seeda hanno no seeda boobo yaŋ jine." 
1Timothy6:13 Ay ga ni lordi Irikoy jine, nga kaŋ ga hay kulu funandi, da Almasihu Yesu jine mo kaŋ na seeda hanno te Bilatos Buntus jine:" 
1Timothy6:14 ni ma lordo wo gaay ka goro mo taali nda jance hari si, hala zaaro kaŋ iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu ga bangay." 
1Timothy6:15 Irikoy g'a cabe a alwaato kaŋ ga hagu ra, Irikoy kaŋ ga ti Dabariko follonka, kaŋ albarka go a se, nga kaŋ ga ti bonkooney Bonkoono da koyey Koyo." 
1Timothy6:16 Nga hinne se no buuyaŋ-jaŋay go, nga kaŋ go annura ra kaŋ boro kulu si du ka to a gaa, nga kaŋ boro kulu mana du ka di a baa ce fo, i si hin ka di a mo. Darza nda dabari mo ma bara a gaa hal abada. Amin!" 
1Timothy6:17 Ma zamana woone arzakantey lordi ka ne i ma si te boŋbeeray. I ma si ngey beeje daŋ arzaka kaŋ sinda naanay gaa, amma kala Irikoy gaa. Nga no g'iri no hay kulu nda baayaŋ, iri ma maa i kaani se." 
1Timothy6:18 M'i lordi ka ne i ma gomni te, ka ciya arzakanteyaŋ goy hanney ra. I ma bara nda nooyaŋ anniya, i ma bara mo soolante ka borey gaakasinay." 
1Timothy6:19 Woodin gaa no i ga albarka jisi ngey boŋ se kaŋ ga ciya daba hanno alwaatey kaŋ ga kaa se. Yaadin gaa mo no i ga du fundi, cimi wano." 
1Timothy6:20 Ya Timotiyos, ni ma jisiro kaŋ Irikoy talfi ni gaa gaay. Ma banda bare sanney kaŋ yaŋ sinda nafa gaa, da wo kaŋ manti Irikoy wane yaŋ gaa, da bayray kakawey kaŋ i ga ne cimiyaŋ no, amma tangari no." 
1Timothy6:21 Boro fooyaŋ ne ngey go ga cimo din gana, amma i harta cimi fonda ganayaŋ gaa. Gomni ma bara araŋ banda." 
2Timothy1:1 Ay Bulos, ay ya Almasihu Yesu diya no Irikoy miila do, fundi alkawlo boŋ kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra." 
2Timothy1:2 Ay go ga tira wo hantum Timotiyos se, ay izo no kaŋ ay ga ba gumo. Gomni nda suuji nda laakal kanay ma bara ni banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun iri Baabo Irikoy d'iri Rabbo Yesu Almasihu do." 
2Timothy1:3 Ay goono ga Irikoy saabu, nga kaŋ se ay goono ga may da bine lasaabu hanno danga mate kaŋ ay kaayey te. Alwaati kulu ay goono ga fongu ni gaa ay adduwey ra cin da zaari." 
2Timothy1:4 Kaŋ ay go ga fongu nda ni mo-mundey, ay ga ba ay ma di nin zama ay ma to da farhã." 
2Timothy1:5 Ay go ga fongu nda cimbeero kaŋ sinda munaficitaray kaŋ go ni ra, cimbeero kaŋ jin ka bara ni kaayo Lowis ra da ni nyaŋo Yuniki ra, kaŋ ay ga tabbat a go ni ra mo." 
2Timothy1:6 Woodin sabbay se no ay goono ga ni fongandi ni ma Irikoy nooyaŋo kaŋ go ni ra ay kambe dakeyaŋo do tunandi. 
2Timothy1:7 Zama Irikoy mana iri no humburkumay bine, amma a n'iri no dabari nda baakasinay da boŋ hinyaŋ wane." 
2Timothy1:8 Yaadin gaa, ma si naŋ haawi ma ni di d'iri Rabbo seeda teeyaŋ, wala nda ay kaŋ ga ti a kas'izo. Amma ma taabi haŋ ay banda Baaru Hanno sabbay se Irikoy dabaro boŋ." 
2Timothy1:9 Nga no k'iri faaba, a n'iri ce mo da ceeyaŋ hanno, manti iri goyey boŋ bo, amma nga bumbo miila d'a gomno boŋ, kaŋ a n'iri no Almasihu Yesu ra za zamaney mana sintin." 
2Timothy1:10 Amma sohõ a n'a bangandi iri se iri Faabakwa Almasihu Yesu bangandiyaŋo do, nga kaŋ na buuyaŋ ciya yaamo, ka fundi nda haŋ kaŋ si sara kaa taray Baaru Hanna do." 
2Timothy1:11 Baaru Hanna din se no Irikoy n'ay daŋ waazuko da diya da dondonandiko. 
2Timothy1:12 Woodin sabbay se mo no ay goono ga maa hayey din taabi. Amma kulu nda yaadin haawi s'ay di, zama ay ga bay nga kaŋ ay cimandi. Ay ga tabbat mo kaŋ a gonda dabari ka jisiro kaŋ ay talfi a gaa batu kala zaaro din gaa." 
2Timothy1:13 Ma sanni hanney kaŋ ni maa ay do gaay, danga fondo kaŋ ni ga gana, cimbeeri nda baakasinay ra kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra." 
2Timothy1:14 Jisiri hanna kaŋ Irikoy talfi ni gaa, ni m'a batu Biya* Hanno do, nga kaŋ goono ga goro iri ra." 
2Timothy1:15 Ni ga bay kaŋ borey kulu kaŋ go Aziya ra na ngey banda bare ay gaa. Fijelus da Hermojenes mo go i ra. 
2Timothy1:16 Rabbi ma suuji cabe Onisifaros windo se, zama sorro boobo a n'ay bina yeenandi. Haawi man'a di baa kaŋ ay go hawante ay sisiro gaa," 
2Timothy1:17 amma waato kaŋ a to Roma kwaara a n'ay ceeci nda anniya hal a di ay. 
2Timothy1:18 Rabbi ma yadda a se mo, a ma du suuji Rabbi do zaaro din ra. Ni mo, ni ga bay gumo mate kaŋ a na hari boobo te ay se k'ay saajaw Afasos ra." 
2Timothy2:1 Ni binde, ay izo, ma gaabu gomni ra kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra." 
2Timothy2:2 Hayey din kaŋ ni maa ay do mo seeda boobo jine, kala ni m'i talfi boro naanaykoyyaŋ gaa kaŋ yaŋ ga hin ka afooyaŋ mo dondonandi koyne." 
2Timothy2:3 Ma maa taabi ay banda sanda Almasihu Yesu sooje hanno. 
2Timothy2:4 Sooje kulu si nga boŋ didiji nda ndunnya wo muraadu, hala bora kaŋ n'a suuban ma maa a kaani." 
2Timothy2:5 Da boro go yoonay ra mo, i s'a alhakko no a se kala nd'a n'a te da mate kaŋ cine a ga hima nd'a." 
2Timothy2:6 A ga hima mo farikoy kaŋ go ga goy ma jin k'a albarka ŋwa. 
2Timothy2:7 Ni ma laakal daŋ haŋ kaŋ ay go ga ci gaa, gaa no Rabbi ga fahamay no ni se hay kulu ra." 
2Timothy2:8 Ma fongu nda Yesu Almasihu kaŋ tun ka fun buukoy game ra, nga kaŋ fun Dawda dumo gaa, ay Baaru Hanna boŋ." 
2Timothy2:9 Barru Hanna din sabbay se no ay goono ga taabi hal i n'ay haw danga zambante cine. Day, i mana Irikoy sanno haw." 
2Timothy2:10 Woodin sabbay se no ay goono ga suuru nda hay kulu borey kaŋ Irikoy suuban sabbay se, zama ngey mo ma du faaba kaŋ go Almasihu Yesu ra da hal abada darza." 
2Timothy2:11 Sanno wo naanaykoy no: D'iri bu Almasihu banda, iri ga funa mo a banda." 
2Timothy2:12 D'iri go ga suuru, iri ga koytaray ŋwa mo a banda. D'iri n'a ze, nga mo g'iri ze." 
2Timothy2:13 D'iri wo sinda naanay, nga wo go naanaykoy, zama a si hin ka wangu nga boŋ." 
2Timothy2:14 Ma borey fongandi nda hayey din k'i lordi Irikoy jine i ma si kakaw sann'izey boŋ, zama woodin si hay kulu hanse, kal a ma borey kaŋ ga maa halaci." 
2Timothy2:15 Ma gurjay ka ni boŋ salle yaddante Irikoy se, goy-teeri kaŋ sinda haawi mafaari, kaŋ goono ga cimi sanno fay-fay mate kaŋ a ga hima." 
2Timothy2:16 Amma ma fay da sanney kaŋ sinda nafa da wo kaŋ yaŋ manti Irikoy wane, zama i teekoy ga borey candi ka konda Irikoy wangay ra." 
2Timothy2:17 I dondonandiyaŋo mo ga ŋwa danga bi ŋwaari cine. Himinayos da Filitos mo go i ra," 
2Timothy2:18 kaŋ yaŋ kamba cimi fonda gaa. I goono ga ne buukoy tunyaŋo jin ka te, i goono ga boro fooyaŋ cimbeero zeeri mo." 
2Timothy2:19 Kulu nda yaadin, Irikoy daba gaabikoono si zinji. A kawaatimo ga ti Rabbi ga bay boro kaŋ ga ti nga wane. Koyne, boro kulu kaŋ goono ga Rabbi maa ce ma fay da goy laalo." 
2Timothy2:20 Amma fu bambata ra manti wura da nzarfu jinayyaŋ hinne no go no, amma bundu nda botogo wane yaŋ mo go no. Afooyaŋ darza goy wane yaŋ no, afooyaŋ mo kayna goy wane yaŋ no." 
2Timothy2:21 Boro kulu kaŋ ga nga boŋ hanandi ka waana kayna waney ga ciya darza goy teeyaŋ jinay, kaŋ i fay waani. A gonda nafa mo nga Koyo se. A go soolante goy hanno kulu se." 
2Timothy2:22 Ma zuru zankataray ibaay laaley se. Ma soobay ka adilitaray, da cimbeeri, da baakasinay da laakal kanay gana, borey banda kaŋ yaŋ goono ga Rabbi ce da bine hanno yaŋ." 
2Timothy2:23 Amma ma fay da kakaw yaamey da saamotaray waney, za kaŋ ni ga bay kaŋ i ga kande yanje." 
2Timothy2:24 A ga hima mo Rabbi bannya ma si yanje, amma a ma ciya baanikom boro kulu se. A ma ciya dondonandiko hanno kaŋ gonda suuru." 
2Timothy2:25 A ma ciya mo goojiko borey kaŋ ga gaaba nd'a se lalabu ra, zama hambara Irikoy ga naŋ i ma tuubi hal i ma du ka cimo bay gumo." 
2Timothy2:26 I ma ye ngey laakaley gaa mo ka fun Iblisi hirrimo ra, nga kaŋ n'i di k'i tilasandi i ma nga miila te." 
2Timothy3:1 Amma ni ma bay kaŋ zamana wo bananta ra alwaati laaloyaŋ ga kaa. 
2Timothy3:2 Zama borey ga bara ngey boŋ hinne baakoyaŋ da nooru baakoyaŋ, da foomanteyaŋ, da boŋbeeraykoyyaŋ. I ga bara alaasirayyaŋ, i ga murte ngey hayrey gaa, i si saabu, i biney si hanan." 
2Timothy3:3 I sinda baakasinay kaŋ ga hima nd'a, i sinda suuji. Kormotanteyaŋ no, i si hin ngey boŋ, bine-biyaŋ no, i ga konna ihanno." 
2Timothy3:4 Amaana ŋwaakoyaŋ, boŋ-hari-waasoyaŋ, i ga haw zi gumo, i ga ba ndunnya kaani ka bisa mate kaŋ i ga ba Irikoy." 
2Timothy3:5 I gonda Irikoy ganayaŋ alhaali, amma i wangu wo kaŋ ga ti a dabaro. Ma ni banda bare borey din yaŋ gaa." 
2Timothy3:6 Zama borey din dumi ra afooyaŋ go no kaŋ ga mollo ka furo fuwey ra ka wayborey kaŋ yaŋ biney si gaabu di ka daŋ tamtaray ra, wayborey kaŋ yaŋ to da zunubi tiŋay, kaŋ yaŋ daray bine ibaay laalo waani-waani ganayaŋ sabbay se." 
2Timothy3:7 Waati kulu i goono ga dondon, amma i si hin ka to cimo bayra gaa hal abada." 
2Timothy3:8 Mate kaŋ cine Yannisu nda Yambirisu murte Musa gaa, yaadin mo no borey din goono ga murte cimo gaa. Boroyaŋ no kaŋ laakaley sara gumo. Boroyaŋ no kaŋ i mana yadda nd'ey, zama i cimbeero manti cimi wane no." 
2Timothy3:9 Amma i si jina-koyyaŋ beeri te, zama i lasaabu-jaŋa ga bangay boro kulu se, mate kaŋ cine mo boro hinka din wano ciya." 
2Timothy3:10 Amma ni wo, ni n'ay dondonandiyaŋo gana, d'ay gora kaŋ dumi ay te, d'ay anniya, d'ay cimbeero, d'ay suuro, d'ay baakasina, d'ay munya," 
2Timothy3:11 d'ay gurzugandiyaŋey, d'ay taabi haŋyaŋey. Taabi woofo dumi yaŋ no mana du ay Antiyos ra, da Ikoniya, da Listra ra, gurzugay woofo dumi yaŋ mo no ay mana suuru nd'a? Rabbi mo n'ay faaba i kulu ra." 
2Timothy3:12 Yaadin gaa, borey kulu kaŋ ga ba ngey ma Irikoy gana Almasihu Yesu ra ga maa gurzugay." 
2Timothy3:13 Amma boro laaley da hiilantey ga koy jina goy laalo ra. I goono ga halli, i goono g'i halli mo." 
2Timothy3:14 Amma ni wo, ni ma soobay ka hayey din kaŋ ni dondon ka cimandi gana, zama ni ga bay borey kaŋ yaŋ gaa ni na hayey din dondon." 
2Timothy3:15 Ni ga bay mo kaŋ za ni go zanka no ni na Tira Hanney bay kaŋ gonda dabari ka ni no fahamay ka koy faaba do kaŋ go cimbeeri ra Almasihu Yesu ra. 
2Timothy3:16 Irikoy Tira Hanney kulu funsanteyaŋ no nda Irikoy fulanzama. I gonda nafa mo dondonandiyaŋ da deeniyaŋ da daŋ fondoyaŋ da goojiyaŋ se mo adilitaray ra," 
2Timothy3:17 hala Irikoy bora ma bara toonante, soolante mo da cimi, goy hanno kulu teeyaŋ se." 
2Timothy4:1 Ay goono ga ni lordi Irikoy da Almasihu Yesu jine, nga kaŋ ga fundikooney da buukoy ciiti, ay ga ni lordi mo a bangandiyaŋo d'a koytara boŋ:" 
2Timothy4:2 Ni ma Sanno waazu. Da daama go no, wala nd'a si no, ni ma kookari. Ma deeni, ma kaseeti, ma yaamar da suuru nda dondonandiyaŋ kulu." 
2Timothy4:3 Zama alwaati ga kaa kaŋ borey si hin suuru nda dondonandiyaŋ cimi-cimo, amma i ga dondonandikoyaŋ margu ngey boŋ se, ngey bine ibaay laaley boŋ, kaŋ ga ci i se haŋ kaŋ ga kaan i hangey se." 
2Timothy4:4 I ga ngey hangey kaa cimi gaa ka kamba ka koy jandey gaa. 
2Timothy4:5 Amma ni wo, ni ma hin ni boŋ hay kulu ra. Ma hin taabi suuru, ma Baaru Hanna waazuko goyo te, ma ni saajaw goyo toonandi." 
2Timothy4:6 Zama za sohõ ay ciya haŋyaŋ sargay kaŋ i ga soogu. Ay koyyaŋo alwaato mo to. 
2Timothy4:7 Ay na wongu hanno te, ay n'ay bata toonandi, ay na cimbeero fonda gana ka haggoy d'a a ma boori." 
2Timothy4:8 Sohõ binde adilitaray boŋtoba go jisante ay se, kaŋ Rabbi, Adilitaraykoyo kaŋ ga ciiti te, g'ay no zaaro din ra. Manti ay hinne se n'a g'a no bo, amma borey kulu kaŋ yaŋ ga ba a bangandiyaŋo mo se." 
2Timothy4:9 Ma waasu ka kaa ay do, ma si gay bo." 
2Timothy4:10 Zama zamana wo baakasinay sabbay se no Dimas dira k'ay naŋ ka koy Tassalonika. Karaska koy Galatiya laabu, Titos mo koy Dalmatiya laabu." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka hinne no go ay banda. Ma Markos kabay ni banda, zama a gonda albarka ay se goyo ra." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka hinne no go ay banda. Ma Markos kabay ni banda, zama a gonda albarka ay se goyo ra." 
2Timothy4:12 Amma ay na Ticikos donton Afasos. 
2Timothy4:13 Da ni ga kaa, ma kande ay kwaayo kaŋ ay naŋ Karbus kambe ra Tarawasa kwaara. Ma kande tirey mo, sanku fa wo kaŋ yaŋ i hantum kuuru gaa." 
2Timothy4:14 Iskandari, guuru-ciray zamo, na hari laalo boobo te ay se. Rabbi g'a bana a goyo boŋ." 
2Timothy4:15 Ni ma haggoy d'a mo fa, zama a murte iri sanney gaa gumo." 
2Timothy4:16 Ay faasayaŋ sintina kaŋ ay te, boro kulu mana kay ay se, amma i kulu n'ay naŋ ay hinne. Irikoy ma si woodin lasaabu i se." 
2Timothy4:17 Amma Rabbi kay ay se. A n'ay gaabandi mo, hal ay na Baaru Hanna waazuyaŋo te, dumi* cindey kulu mo maa. Irikoy n'ay faaba mo muusu beero meyo gaa." 
2Timothy4:18 Rabbi g'ay faaba ka kaa hari laalo kulu kambe. A g'ay faaba mo ka kond'ay nga beene koytara ra. Darza ma bara a gaa hal abada abadin! Amin. 
2Timothy4:19 Ma Birisila nda Akila fo, da Onisifaros windo borey." 
2Timothy4:20 Arastos goro Korint, amma ay na Turofimos naŋ Militos kwaara, zama a go ga jante." 
2Timothy4:21 Ma te ni hina ka kaa za jawo mana to. Obulos goono ga ni fo, da Budens da Linos da Kalawdiya nda nya-izey kulu." 
2Timothy4:22 Rabbi ma bara ni biya* banda. Gomni ma bara araŋ banda. 
Titus1:1 Ay Bulos, ay ya Irikoy bannya nda Yesu Almasihu diya no Irikoy suubanantey cimbeero se da cimo bayra se kaŋ ga to da boro Irikoy ganayaŋ do." 
Titus1:2 Woodin yaŋ go fundi hal abada beeja ra. Irikoy kaŋ si taari, a n'a alkawlo sambu za zamaney kulu mana te." 
Titus1:3 A na nga sanno bangandi mo a alwaato ra, waazuyaŋo kaŋ a talfi ay gaa do iri Faabakwa Irikoy lordo boŋ." 
Titus1:4 Ay, Bulos, go ga hantum Titos se, ay izo no da cimi cimbeero ra kaŋ g'iri boro hinka kulu margu. Gomni nda laakal kanay ma bara ni banda kaŋ yaŋ ga fun Baaba Irikoy d'iri Faabakwa Almasihu Yesu do." 
Titus1:5 Haŋ kaŋ se ay na ni naŋ Karita laabo ra neeya: zama ni ma hay kulu kaŋ ga ba teeyaŋ sasabandi, ni ma arkusuyaŋ* daŋ mo _Almasihu margey ra|_ kwaara kulu ra, sanda mate kaŋ cine ay na ni lordi nd'a." 
Titus1:6 Arkusu ma ciya boro kaŋ i si du ka jance, wayboro folloŋ kurnye. A izey mo ma ciya cimandikoyaŋ, kaŋ i mana i kalima furkutaray wala hanga sanday sabbay se." 
Titus1:7 Zama jine boro, za kaŋ a ga te jine funa Irikoy goyo boŋ, tilas kal a ma bara boro kaŋ i si jance. A ma si ciya boŋ sando, wala boro kaŋ ga waasu ka te bine, wala baji boobo hanko, wala yanjekaari, wala mo boro kaŋ ga riiba ziibo bini." 
Titus1:8 Amma a ma ciya yaw gaayko, a ma ciya mo boro kaŋ ga ba ihanno teeyaŋ. A ma ciya laakalkooni, adilitaraykoy, boro kaŋ ga Irikoy gana nda cimi, boŋ hinko." 
Titus1:9 A ma gaabu sanni naanaykoyo gaa kaŋ ga saba nda dondonandiyaŋo kaŋ a du, hal a ma du ka borey yaamar da dondonandiyaŋ cimi-cimo, ka hin borey kaŋ ga gaaba nd'a mo." 
Titus1:10 Zama boro boobo go no kaŋ murtanteyaŋ no, sanni kaŋ sinda nafa salankoyaŋ no, fafagukoyaŋ mo no, sanku fa borey kaŋ go dambanguyaŋ* borey do haray." 
Titus1:11 A ga hima i m'i meyey daabu, zama i ga dira no windi ka kaa windi ka borey laakaley tunandi. I goono ga haŋ kaŋ si hima dondonandi, zama ngey ma du riiba ziibo se." 
Titus1:12 I ra boro fo, kaŋ ngey bumbo wane annabi* no ka ci ka ne: «Karita borey ya tangarikomyaŋ no alwaati kulu. Ganji ham futoyaŋ no, ŋwaari boobo ŋwaakoyaŋ no kaŋ yaŋ ga hawfun mo.»" 
Titus1:13 Seeda din kaŋ a te mo, cimi no. Woodin sabbay se binde, ni ma deeni i gaa da deeniyaŋ konno, hal i ma te gaabi cimbeeri fonda ra." 
Titus1:14 I ma si hangan Yahudancey jandey se da Adam-izey lordey* kaŋ goono ga fun borey kaŋ na banda bare cimo gaa do. 
Titus1:15 Hay kulu ga hanan fundi hannokoyey se, amma borey kaŋ ga ziibi, kaŋ si cimandi mo, hay kulu si hanan i se. Amma i laakaley d'i bine lasaabey kulu ga ziibi no." 
Titus1:16 I goono ga ne ngey ga Irikoy bay, amma i goyey do no i goono g'a ze. Fanta hariyaŋ no, murtanteyaŋ, kaŋ yaŋ si hin ka goy hanno kulu te." 
Titus2:1 Amma ni wo, kala ni ma haŋ kaŋ ga saba nda dondonandiyaŋ cimi-cimo ci." 
Titus2:2 Ma ne dottijey se i ma ciya boŋ hinkoyaŋ, boroyaŋ kaŋ gaa lalabu go, laakalkooniyaŋ, boroyaŋ kaŋ gonda gaabi cimbeero da baakasina da suuro ra." 
Titus2:3 Yaadin mo no ni ma ne wayboro zeeney se i ma goro danga mate kaŋ hanantey hima ka te. I ma si ciya kormotanteyaŋ, i ma si ciya mo baji tamyaŋ. I ma hari hanno yaŋ dondonandi," 
Titus2:4 hal i ma saatarey cabe ka ne i ma ba ngey kurnyey da ngey izey. 
Titus2:5 I ma ciya laakalkooniyaŋ, fundi-hanno-koyyaŋ, fu-koy hannoyaŋ, dogonandikoyaŋ, kaŋ ga ngey kurnyey gana, zama boro kulu ma si Irikoy Sanno ciinay da laala." 
Titus2:6 Yaadin mo no, ma ko-arey yaamar ka ne i ma ciya laakalkooniyaŋ." 
Titus2:7 Ni mo, hay kulu ra ma ni boŋ cabe deedandiyaŋ hari goy hanney ra. Ma ciya boro kaŋ ga dondonandiyaŋ cimi-cimo te, ma ciya mo laakal-kanay-koy." 
Titus2:8 Ma sanni hanno yaŋ te kaŋ yaŋ i si hin ka zeeri, hala borey kaŋ ga gaaba nda nin, haawi m'i di, zama i sinda hari laalo kulu kaŋ i ga ci iri boŋ." 
Titus2:9 Ma bannyey mo yaamar i ma ngey koyey gana zama i ma maa i kaani hay kulu ra. Bannyey ma si ngey koyey me bana. 
Titus2:10 I ma si n'i zay mo, amma i ma ngey boŋ cabe naanaykoyyaŋ, hal i ma Irikoy iri Faabakwa boŋ dondonandiyaŋo boriyandi borey jine hay kulu ra." 
Titus2:11 Zama Irikoy gomno kaŋ ga kande faaba boro kulu do bangay. 
Titus2:12 Gomno din g'iri dondonandi iri ma fay da Irikoy wangay da ndunnya ibaay laaley, k'iri baafuna te da laakal, da adilitaray, da Irikoy ganayaŋ sohõ zamana woone ra." 
Titus2:13 Gomno din g'iri dondonandi iri ma goro yaadin ka bangandiyaŋ darzakoyo batu kaŋ ga ti iri beeje albarkanta. Bangandiyaŋ darzakoyo din ga ti iri Irikoy Beeraykoyo kaŋ ga ti iri Faabakwa, Yesu Almasihu, wano." 
Titus2:14 Nga no ka nga boŋ no _ka bu|_ iri se zama a m'iri fansa zunubi kulu gaa. Zama a m'iri ciya mo nga boŋ se jama hanante kaŋ ga ti nga bumbo wane, kaŋ gonda ihanno teeyaŋ anniya." 
Titus2:15 Ma woodin yaŋ ci, ka yaamaryaŋ te, ka deeni da ni dabaro kulu. Ma si ta boro kulu ma donda nin." 
Titus3:1 M'i fongandi mo i ma ngey boŋ ye ganda koyey kulu nda hinkoyey kulu se. I m'i sanney gana, i ma goro soolante goy hanno kulu teeyaŋ se." 
Titus3:2 I ma si boro kulu ciinay da laala, i ma si ciya kusuumanteyaŋ, amma i ma ciya bine baanikoyyaŋ, ka ngey boŋ cabe lalabukoyaŋ boro kulu se." 
Titus3:3 Zama iri mo, waato iri jaŋ laakal, iri goro murtanteyaŋ, i n'iri halli mo. Iri goro ka bannyataray te bine ibaay laaley da watay kulu dumi se. Iri goro k'iri baafuna te zamba nda canse ra. Iri goro konnaari hari, iri konna care mo." 
Titus3:4 Amma waato kaŋ Irikoy, iri Faabakwa booro d'a borey se baakasina bangay,"
