2Peter1:15 Oho, ay ga te anniya hal ay dirawo banda araŋ ma du ka fongu nda hayey din alwaati kulu." 
2Peter1:16 Zama manti nda carmaykomey jandey ganayaŋ no iri n'araŋ bayrandi nd'iri Rabbi Yesu Almasihu dabaro d'a kaayaŋo, amma iri ya seedayaŋ no kaŋ yaŋ di Yesu beera mo-da-mo." 
2Peter1:17 Zama a du beeray da darza Baaba Irikoy do, waato kaŋ jinda kaŋ fun beera kaŋ ga bisa ikulu do kaa a do ka ne: «Boro woone ga ti ay Izo kaŋ ay ga ba, kaŋ ay goono ga maa a kaani gumo.»" 
2Peter1:18 Iri bumbey mo, iri maa jinda din kaŋ fun beena ra, waato kaŋ iri go Yesu banda tondi hanna boŋ." 
2Peter1:19 Iri gonda annabitaray sanno mo kaŋ ga tabbat ka bisa _haŋ kaŋ iri di|_. A ga boori araŋ se araŋ ma laakal ye a gaa, zama a go danga fitilla kaŋ goono ga kaari kuba ra, hala mo ma bo, mo boyaŋ handariya mo ma tun araŋ biney ra." 
2Peter1:20 Sintina day araŋ ma woone bay: annabitaray kulu kaŋ go Irikoy Tira Hanna ra sinda fasaryaŋ Adam-ize fahamay boŋ. 
2Peter1:21 Zama annabitara din mana kaa boro miila boŋ baa ce fo, amma borey salaŋ da haŋ kaŋ fun Irikoy do, zama Biya Hanno no goono g'i tuti." 
2Peter2:1 Amma sanda mate kaŋ cine tangari annabiyaŋ goro jama ra za doŋ, yaadin cine no tangari dondonandikoyaŋ mo ga bangay araŋ game ra. I ga furo nda carmay ka kande dondonandiyaŋey kaŋ manti cimi wane yaŋ, kaŋ ga kande halaciyaŋ mo. I ga baa Koyo kaŋ n'i day din ze, ka halaciyaŋ candi ka kande ngey boŋ da waasi." 
2Peter2:2 Boro boobo mo g'i gana ngey furkutara ra. I sabbay se mo borey ga cimi fonda jance. 
2Peter2:3 I biniya ra mo no tangari dondonandikoy ga pati-ka-dake sanniyaŋ te k'araŋ ciya fatawci hari. Ciito mo kaŋ Irikoy dumbu i se za doŋ si gay, i halaciyaŋo mo ga ba ka to." 
2Peter2:4 Zama Irikoy mana malaykey* naŋ waato kaŋ i na zunubi te, amma a n'i catu Alaahara kaso ra k'i daŋ kubay guusey ra k'i jisi ciito se." 
2Peter2:5 A mana doŋ ndunnya naŋ mo, amma a na Nuhu, kaŋ ga ti adilitaray waazukwa faaba, nga nda boro iyye fooyaŋ, waato kaŋ a kande tunfaana ndunnya borey kaŋ yaŋ wangu Irikoy boŋ." 
2Peter2:6 A na Saduma* nda Gomorata* birney ciiti mo da halaciyaŋ ciiti k'i ciya boosu. A n'i ciya deedandiyaŋ hari borey se kaŋ ga wangu Irikoy. 
2Peter2:7 A na Lotu kaŋ ti boro adili faaba mo, nga kaŋ bina sara gumo boro laaley furkutaray gora sabbay se." 
2Peter2:8 (Zama boro adilo din kaŋ goono ga goro i game ra na nga bine adilanta* taabandi zaari ka kaa zaari asariya-jaŋay goyey kaŋ a goono ga di, kaŋ a goono ga maa mo sabbay se.)" 
2Peter2:9 Za kaŋ Rabbi na woodin yaŋ te, a ga bay mate kaŋ nga ga te ka nga ganakoy faaba taabi ra ka borey kaŋ sinda adilitaray gaay mo alhakku se hala ciiti zaaro ma kaa," 
2Peter2:10 sanku fa borey kaŋ yaŋ goono ga dira ngey bine ibaay laalo ziibey ra, kaŋ yaŋ ga donda mayray mo. Tangari dondonandikoy wo, farratanteyaŋ no, boŋ sando yaŋ mo no. I si jijiri waato kaŋ i goono ga beena beeraykoyey wow." 
2Peter2:11 Guna, baa malaykey kaŋ ga bis'ey gaabi ra da dabari ra si kande wowi ciiti i boŋ Rabbi jine." 
2Peter2:12 Amma boro woodin yaŋ goono ga hayey kaŋ i si faham nd'a kayna. I ga hima ganji hamyaŋ kaŋ yaŋ sinda laakal, kaŋ i n'i hay zama i m'i di ka halaci se. Haciika borey din ga halaci ngey hasarawo sabbay se." 
2Peter2:13 I g'i bana nda taabi, taabandiyaŋo kaŋ i te din se. Bine kaani hari no i se i ma goy yaamoyaŋ te zaari kwaaray. Boroyaŋ no kaŋ ciya tombi nda laru. I goono ga maa kaani ngey hiila goyey ra, waati kaŋ i ga ŋwa araŋ banda." 
2Peter2:14 I moy ga to da zina, i si hin ka zunubi naŋ, i goono ga borey kaŋ mana kay ka boori hirri ka di. I na ngey biney dondonandi biniyay, izeyaŋ no kaŋ laali." 
2Peter2:15 I na cimi fonda taŋ ka daray. I goono ga Balaam* Beyor izo fonda gana, nga kaŋ na nga bina daŋ goy laalo teeyaŋ alhakku gaa." 
2Peter2:16 Amma farka deeni a gaa a zunubo sabbay se. Farka kaŋ si waani sanni salaŋ a se da boro jinde ka annabo din bonkoma gaay. 
2Peter2:17 Borey din ya mansaarayaŋ no kaŋ koogu, beene buruyaŋ mo no kaŋ haw goono ga gaaray. Irikoy na kubay bi tik soola ka jisi i se." 
2Peter2:18 Zama waato kaŋ i goono ga fooma sanni yaamoyaŋ ci, i ga goy da bine ibaay laaley furkutaray ra ka te kumsay borey se kaŋ mana gay ka du faaba ka fun darantey kambe ra." 
2Peter2:19 I goono ga burcinitaray alkawli sambu i se, amma ngey bumbey go halaciyaŋ tamtaray ra. Zama haŋ kaŋ zaama boro boŋ, kulu boro ga ciya a se tam." 
2Peter2:20 Zama nda borey du faaba ndunnya ziibey gaa Rabbi kaŋ ti Faabakwa Yesu Almasihu bayra do, woodin banda i ye ka didiji koyne ndunnya ziibey ra hal i n'i zeeri, i kokora ga jaase i sintina gora." 
2Peter2:21 Zama a ga bisa i se i ma si adilitaray fonda bay, d'i ma bay a gaa, woodin banda i ma banda bare lordi* hanna kaŋ i no i se gaa." 
2Peter2:22 Haŋ kaŋ te i se ga yaasay woone daahirandi kaŋ ne: «Hansi ga ye nga yeero do, gursuna way kaŋ nyumay mo ga ye ka bimbilko botogo ra.»" 
2Peter3:1 Ay baakoy, woone ga ti tira hinkanta kaŋ ay go ga hantum araŋ se. I boro hinka ra mo ay goono ga fonguyaŋ hanno cimikoyo tunandi araŋ laakaley ra k'araŋ fongandi." 
2Peter3:2 Ay ga ba araŋ ma fongu nda sanney kaŋ annabi* hanantey jin ka ci, da Rabbi kaŋ ti Faabakwa lordo mo kaŋ araŋ diyey ci."

2Peter3:4 ka ne: «Man a kaayaŋo alkawlo? Zama za hano kaŋ hane iri kaayey kani, hayey kulu go no danga mate kaŋ cine i go za takayaŋ sintina.»" 
2Peter3:5 Zama i cacar ka dinya woone: za doŋ Irikoy sanno boŋ beena go no, laabo te mo ka fatta haro ra haro bindo ra mo." 
2Peter3:6 Hayey din do ndunnya kaŋ go no alwaato din halaci, waato kaŋ tunfaana haro n'a daabu." 
2Peter3:7 Amma beena da ganda kaŋ go no sohõ, sanni follonka din boŋ no Irikoy n'i jisi danji se. A goono g'i gaay hala zaaro kaŋ ra a ga borey kaŋ yaŋ wangu nga ciiti ka halaci." 
2Peter3:8 Amma, ay baakoy, araŋ ma si dinya hari folloŋ kaŋ ga ti: zaari folloŋ Rabbi do danga jiiri zambar no, jiiri zambar mo danga zaari folloŋ no." 
2Peter3:9 Rabbi si muray da nga alkawlo, mate kaŋ cine boro fooyaŋ ga muray lasaabu, amma a ciya suurante araŋ se. A si ba boro kulu ma halaci, amma a ga ba boro kulu ma tuubi." 
2Peter3:10 Amma Rabbi zaaro ga kaa danga zay cine. Zaaro din ra mo beena ga bisa nda kosongu bambata. Hayey kaŋ Irikoy na hay kulu kaŋ go ndunnya ra taka nd'a mo ga manne nda konni bambata. Ndunnya da goyey kaŋ go a ra ga ton. 
2Peter3:11 Za kaŋ hayey din kulu ga halaci yaadin cine, boro woofo yaŋ dumi no a ga hima araŋ ma bara goray hanna ra da Irikoy ganayaŋ ra," 
2Peter3:12 waati kaŋ araŋ goono ga Irikoy zaaro batu k'a kaayaŋo muraadu gumo? A kaayaŋ zaaro sabbay se beena ga di da danji ka halaci. Hayey kaŋ Irikoy na hay kulu kaŋ go ndunnya ra taka nd'a mo ga manne nda konni bambata. 
2Peter3:13 Amma Irikoy alkawlo boŋ iri goono ga hangan beene tajey da ganda tajo se, nangey kaŋ adilitaray ga nga gora te." 
2Peter3:14 Woodin sabbay se, ay baakoy, za kaŋ araŋ goono ga hayey din batu, kal araŋ ma anniya haw hala Irikoy m'araŋ gar tombi si, taali si laakal kanay ra." 
2Peter3:15 Koyne, araŋ ma iri Rabbo suuro lasaabu danga faaba _alwaati|_, mate kaŋ cine iri nya-izo, Bulos, iri baakwa hantum araŋ se fahama boŋ kaŋ Irikoy n'a no." 
2Peter3:16 Yaadin mo no a hantum nga tirey kulu ra, nangey kaŋ a ga salaŋ nda hayey din. Hay fooyaŋ mo go a tirey ra kaŋ i fahama ga sandi, kaŋ boŋ-biyey da borey kaŋ yaŋ mana cimi bay goono g'i fasaryaŋo diibi nda tangari. I goono ga woodin te da Irikoy Tira Hanney nangu cindey mo ka koy ngey boŋ halaciyaŋ gaa." 
2Peter3:17 Yaadin gaa, araŋ wo, ay baakoy, zama araŋ jin ka woodin bay, araŋ ma haggoy boro laaley ma s'araŋ candi darayyaŋ ra hal araŋ ma fun araŋ kayyaŋ nangu gaabikoono ra ka kaŋ." 
2Peter3:18 Amma araŋ ma soobay ka beeri iri Rabbo kaŋ ti iri Faabakwa Yesu Almasihu gomno d'a bayra ra. Darza ma bara a se sohõ da hal abada abadin. Amin!

2John1:7 Zama halliko boobo say-say ndunnya ra, borey kaŋ yaŋ si seeda kaŋ Yesu Almasihu kaa gaaham ra. Bora din dumi ya halliko no, Almasihu wane yanjekaari mo no." 
2John1:7 Zama halliko boobo say-say ndunnya ra, borey kaŋ yaŋ si seeda kaŋ Yesu Almasihu kaa gaaham ra. Bora din dumi ya halliko no, Almasihu wane yanjekaari mo no." 
2John1:8 Araŋ ma haggoy d'araŋ boŋ hal araŋ ma si haŋ kaŋ araŋ te darandi, amma araŋ ma alhakku toonanta ta." 
2John1:8 Araŋ ma haggoy d'araŋ boŋ hal araŋ ma si haŋ kaŋ araŋ te darandi, amma araŋ ma alhakku toonanta ta." 
2John1:9 Boro kulu kaŋ siino ga goro Almasihu dondonandiyaŋo ra, amma a ga bisa ka koy jina, bora din sinda Irikoy. Amma boro kaŋ goono ga goro dondonandiyaŋo ra, bora din gonda Baabo da Izo mo." 
2John1:9 Boro kulu kaŋ siino ga goro Almasihu dondonandiyaŋo ra, amma a ga bisa ka koy jina, bora din sinda Irikoy. Amma boro kaŋ goono ga goro dondonandiyaŋo ra, bora din gonda Baabo da Izo mo." 
2John1:10 Boro kulu kaŋ kaa araŋ do kaŋ siino ga kande dondonandiyaŋo din, araŋ ma si ta a ma furo araŋ windo ra, araŋ ma s'a to baani mo." 
2John1:10 Boro kulu kaŋ kaa araŋ do kaŋ siino ga kande dondonandiyaŋo din, araŋ ma si ta a ma furo araŋ windo ra, araŋ ma s'a to baani mo." 
2John1:11 Zama boro kaŋ g'a to baani ga margu a goy laaley ra. 
2John1:11 Zama boro kaŋ g'a to baani ga margu a goy laaley ra.

3John1:9 Ay na tira kayna hantum Almasihu marga se, amma Diyotrifas, kaŋ ga ba nga ma ciya i jine boro mana iri sanney ta."

3John1:11 Ay baakwa, ma si laala dondon, amma ma dondon haŋ kaŋ ga boori. Boro kaŋ goono ga goy hanno te ya Irikoy wane no. Boro kaŋ goono ga goy laalo te mana di Irikoy."
